[**June 4, 1919:** The 19th Amendment was passed by Congress on June 4, 1919, and later ratified on August 18, 1920. This amendment granted women the right to vote after a lengthy and complicated struggle of protests over decades. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a3d1962812284108b940c5ad2b805243&_e=y1rSRTfsFNZmnpywWgnIMqbKFE4NndD8h8vDG3OusVbsfE17mPLOyjXWm1UzxkgxekJxLMWydUHyiGm5HoHU4mTGZ9xAPWM_9MH_uqqCVEfxYmDy0GNaO_LPjEwYIKOIuCxOy29t9lLb3guhHvZv50Cz0pmY_pBpCHBTTHWnWmkuUMlOyqegSS3M4Pz9fVxuoMfuESQEH6QkN2dZKx8C22POuXEpQnqvis6SCIjfg8Y6IZWWCaNuww8Yljskw1U2kPsTwoLFJAAzT0_Lp-pI8g%3D%3D) **Source -[archives.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a3d1962812284108b940c5ad2b805243&_e=y1rSRTfsFNZmnpywWgnIMqbKFE4NndD8h8vDG3OusVbsfE17mPLOyjXWm1UzxkgxekJxLMWydUHyiGm5HoHU4mTGZ9xAPWM_9MH_uqqCVEfxYmDy0GNaO_LPjEwYIKOIxvsk40CQy4Rbs5gHtW5BqlFhCnb8y8KvYfGoyn4Yd2a8vCNmgPg8adqrQz_d5UTt1t9QjxMcxrsTeBvkjTeTlcRz3R7t44b-0v0HCRgIMqevEBEwFD2gk03vZ0N6SPAr-d8IYthc1_stPHwdy-a61g%3D%3D)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a3d1962812284108b940c5ad2b805243&_e=y1rSRTfsFNZmnpywWgnIMqbKFE4NndD8h8vDG3OusVa_mENbJ1A634jU77ir4NOZ1RrHrNdEc3yLTelq9sq0JyQWfIjrDBiNxvw9shqmjdSOtuoDCPL_R0W70lTSkvOpeP0AWy6DXjs6SAHN9oaJrC28ukvpR4g69XI_L_0dOwMwI6VkavD2RG47iS-olreSfcn6_y911r3rgo3CAUX2y9rbTE82ii5UukjdsByurKHW2zTSCjdx7eqnuhHax3icZkTWUMmgRwuyL2SXEsmWxd9cm3AY6c7eiZVJzlxvLYc%3D)**

[**June 4, 1937:** The world's first shopping carts were introduced by Sylvan Goldman at Humpty Dumpty grocery stores in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma. Sylvan Goldman's creation revolutionized the way people shopped and became an integral part of the retail industry.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a3d1962812284108b940c5ad2b805243&_e=y1rSRTfsFNZmnpywWgnIMqbKFE4NndD8h8vDG3OusVYAZfBf2viGsDa-w15pYBYAhNJIS1h3_0mKh5SYctswupJZTh-mt4A1pbi_hLViaUtPeoCbR7baZ1CeRIdJ-PcNA_C5BxeOcYGW8kzYJFgC_Dx_RefyR8C4NfFFW-ElPpEiqLBFUxgJw1nTgYTe26Sr9AcZohIqswrZ5tKYrojdmZr_FX2dhvphISjAga9VQIx-5IwLSqRK-4sMl7rIViGl4BG4kqZV7o2j5eSGKMFJTrNri0h3oldBwptruuFlsc0%3D) **Source -[americanhistory.si.edu](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a3d1962812284108b940c5ad2b805243&_e=y1rSRTfsFNZmnpywWgnIMqbKFE4NndD8h8vDG3OusVYAZfBf2viGsDa-w15pYBYAhNJIS1h3_0mKh5SYctswupJZTh-mt4A1pbi_hLViaUtPeoCbR7baZ1CeRIdJ-PcNZzTY2Mmz8OBrvILsPL5qPn6ug9k5jgOBx1Av6NYIkwwS5XBonMQii1vnDGyDtuei7sKF2wYEt8UaPzCvGtqnU-8QtBTCqDAPDaFfa4gT6TeIML3UkMPaZEvKzlgqp2fa3N3rbCvqiZzBpcxrHAzM1-tFNxyC8H5MDfpWiFb4hPY%3D)**

[**June 4, 1984:** The song "Born in the USA" by Bruce Springsteen is a powerful anthem that reflects on the experiences of American veterans returning from the Vietnam War. It depicts the struggles and disillusionment faced by these veterans as they grapple with the harsh reality of post-war life. The song carries a deeper message of social and political critique, shedding light on the hardships faced by working-class Americans.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a3d1962812284108b940c5ad2b805243&_e=y1rSRTfsFNZmnpywWgnIMqbKFE4NndD8h8vDG3OusVYSU-A13TzwF-sqSD9F-QkfWfw3vZrGxQnjcw8N0xiOCx4r9_2961J4SXQKm26MxBLfWf1nYGKn7w7GBADU-L_MP3H1BPdOfU8vZAE3pJtNNGxYMmuCjroGRlHhwmqGZy8Sgv4PY4zoL76FdGV6tdac9qWGBZJ4z0dr9fgB2Z_7ESliO2-zZCNOy7_Q6W96U0aLTgqyss9choB2xd-LphOayJUE8v8Y_1pCzc-7Ie4VWdvDnjyrCtAx0PklfBAzMwk%3D) **Source -[songfacts.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a3d1962812284108b940c5ad2b805243&_e=y1rSRTfsFNZmnpywWgnIMqbKFE4NndD8h8vDG3OusVYSU-A13TzwF-sqSD9F-QkfWfw3vZrGxQnjcw8N0xiOCx4r9_2961J4SXQKm26MxBLfWf1nYGKn7w7GBADU-L_MP3H1BPdOfU8vZAE3pJtNNKUEdUAU_V8QGuuzdGEQER8u5AGcXm5Ne3WKIvQLgcx54ch_ec1_iYU0Ywk3xbIYswNeGsvNSQMvwhkk8o7aFgBTKWv6qHEIvL-HVk92GGkBb_WrzmixLgO1gTu0iDXkDLtOkX7CBA1T8J4onz74Zp0%3D)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a3d1962812284108b940c5ad2b805243&_e=y1rSRTfsFNZmnpywWgnIMoSaCNa5NoH5ig3Cv45EN26Z1RwMeEM7TKZN0HkwEmJXc_6VigOh8dCfY2roAlmlTRlV_sLkKmyNc23VvllaatbXFlS1SxQKAcA_ZNF5RkYGnENm6jrnvay7JCEaGVGBxtd2zdBWTdoVfpiVsKOq3JQ986gPN4y21LMauB4gTd7dV3xSNFyQ0SiVJGrJh1tkK8HVeJiYexzjGnmechM0CAtp4QEEByAdNr5Z4BN9P7Tu)**

Friend,
I want YOU to help set our campaign’s agenda for the NEW MONTH of June.
After all, this movement belongs to YOU.
I want to be certain that I’m focusing on the biggest priorities of voters – _especially as we enter the heat of the primary._
If you’ve been watching the polls, you’ll notice that our lead has ONLY GROWN HIGHER ever since more challengers have entered the presidential race.
_**I have YOU to thank for that.**_

name: Team Nickel
subject: Pride Month 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn?refcode=230604-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn?refcode=230604-email]
Happy Pride Month, Peter!
Wiley knows that every American deserves equal protection under the law. No one should be discriminated against for who they love or their gender identity. From marriage equality to career opportunities, Wiley is proud to serve on the Congressional Equality Committee, joining his colleagues in standing up to protect the LGBTQ+ community.
But, as we celebrate Pride Month, it’s important that our grassroots coalition raises their voice to help continue making progress. That’s why we want to hear from you:
Do you support legislation that guarantees nondiscrimination protections for the LGBTQ+ community?
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn-pridepoll?refcode=230604-email-yes]
NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn-pridepoll?refcode=230604-email-no]
UNSURE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn-pridepoll?refcode=230604-email-unsure]
Now more than ever, extreme Republicans are doing all they can to roll back the rights of LGBTQ+ individuals, especially transgender youth. In North Carolina, Wiley has stood against harmful legislation and will continue to do all he can to create a safe world where everyone, no matter who they love or who they identify, can live an extraordinary life.
Thank you for standing with Wiley and with the LGBTQ+ community.
-Team Nickel
Wiley is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn?refcode=230604-email&recurring=true]

the GOP is trying to EXPEL him!
| We reached out to you last week because Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans are launching vicious attacks at Rep. Adam Schiff — **they’re even trying to EXPEL him from Congress!**

The best way we can fight back is if we show massive grassroots support for Schiff, so we were stunned to see your name missing!

[**We’re giving you one last chance to add your signature before our petition closes tonight. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8126%2E878179%2Ey1u4zs). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8126%2E878179%2Ey1u4zs).**

With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single majority. **But we can’t stop now.**
We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections in the next month, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. **By renewing your 2023 DLCC membership _today_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extremist agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

[Medal of Honor Monday: Army Sgt. Maj. Jon R. Cavaiani](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zitdbknv6hf2ai1l6191jgqdr4335u6kj68blmro_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f833cug6apt5mkoj8cdlkupjb85nmerr4td5mupr2d1kumi34tdkumj7ecblkmq35dd2muprb8jlkoq36t1kmgpr9dt246h22sh2s8i66o75cjgm2o76c9h2bs)
Army Sgt. Maj. Jon Robert Cavaiani fought an overwhelming North Vietnamese force until he couldn't fight anymore. His actions saved dozens of men who served under him, but they also earned him two years at a prisoner of war camp. When he finally returned home, the Special Forces legend was greeted with respect and, soon after, the Medal of Honor.
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv1ivgrsroiarv48ek2dsm47rrp6nt28208me6co_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjgm2o76c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1hmf835cuirac9k66qqfcplk2rr7dtiemirfcth6gqfb91iemqfb9jn65qqbd1immhbfctlk9qqcd1jegqb8ctkmuh2bs)

subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWlEpoPDND

Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold, thanks to a
decades-long campaign by "progressives" to attack the
Constitution and undermine liberty

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWlEpoPDND

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

Dangerous
left-wing ideologies are taking hold, thanks to a decades-long
campaign by "progressives" to attack the Constitution and
undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
CANNOT let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to give your opinion
of the state of education in America.

Give Your
Opinion On The State of American Education

It's
apparent that the current education system is not only failing
millions of young Americans, but it is INDOCTRINATING rather than
EDUCATING them.

These are
the young people that "educators" deliberately deceived. These
are the young people who haven't learned the true history of our
country.

To
preserve liberty and prosperity in America, do you believe it is
essential for Americans to have basic knowledge of American
history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?

Are
colleges and universities in your state doing enough to teach
students American history and civics?

If you
are concerned about the current state of our educational system,
please share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today.

Give Your Opinion On The State of American Education

For our children,

Bill Gray, '01

Vice President

National Donor Outreach

Hillsdale College

The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We CANNOT let that happen! That's why I am writing to you today and asking you to give your opinion of the state of education in America. Give Your Opinion On The State of American Education It's apparent that the current education system is not only failing millions of young Americans, but it is INDOCTRINATING rather than EDUCATING them. These are the young people that "educators" deliberately deceived. These are the young people who haven't learned the true history of our country. To preserve liberty and prosperity in America, do you believe it is essential for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution? Are colleges and universities in your state doing enough to teach students American history and civics? If you are concerned about the current state of our educational system, please share your opinions by completing the National Survey on the State of American Education today. Give Your Opinion On The State of American Education For our children, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-72254294695-echo3-824CD353B9D782400007AEF59F9392EE@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line. ----Powered by Paramount/Conservative Connect----

name: Team DeSantis
subject: We will NEVER back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=af2f3b0683edfb9fb7fdadd8b42cd4bc55b3a5d2ec6def5c3b352b3a3cf493e3dea346d90313bb7ea0f780395fb6d34b5835180e138b26a2b7a3a946898c53f90c4c7a7eb70030cafa6ffb5166e2acbc

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c7672a7f63dfa86ba28048cc4a77de16af2d743bcc06ce5cd3551c7f6a9a30d7d94132aa3accde8ea70a7350a8aa4ed8673dc3b082ba87f23b8490c5e20e1521

Peter,

Our team is used to attacks from legacy media and the woke Left. When Gov. Ron DeSantis tells you he won't back down, that's a PROMISE.

Did you see how they tried to shout him down in South Carolina?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c7672a7f63dfa86ba28048cc4a77de16af2d743bcc06ce5cd3551c7f6a9a30d7d94132aa3accde8ea70a7350a8aa4ed8673dc3b082ba87f23b8490c5e20e1521

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c7672a7f63dfa86ba28048cc4a77de16af2d743bcc06ce5cd3551c7f6a9a30d7d94132aa3accde8ea70a7350a8aa4ed8673dc3b082ba87f23b8490c5e20e1521
TAKE A STAND - FIGHT BACK TODAY!

Governor DeSantis is standing up for the protection of our children. Our team will ALWAYS fight against those who seek to rob them of their innocence.

On that point, there will be no compromise.

We will never surrender to woke ideology, Peter.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c7672a7f63dfa86ba28048cc4a77de16af2d743bcc06ce5cd3551c7f6a9a30d7d94132aa3accde8ea70a7350a8aa4ed8673dc3b082ba87f23b8490c5e20e1521
Join Governor Ron DeSantis and our team today—let's show them our strength and stand up for our kids.

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

⬇️Get your name on the wall at HQ⬇️

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c7672a7f63dfa86ba28048cc4a77de16af2d743bcc06ce5cd3551c7f6a9a30d7d94132aa3accde8ea70a7350a8aa4ed8673dc3b082ba87f23b8490c5e20e1521

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c7672a7f63dfa86bf0ffbcee9c64a05fe809bf02d6d26bfe5e1ff7cba6b757d41c76825dfc88d16f8e74de362a54240fcb153918ecd0a6fc14648510c9a757ca
Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c7672a7f63dfa86ba28048cc4a77de16af2d743bcc06ce5cd3551c7f6a9a30d7d94132aa3accde8ea70a7350a8aa4ed8673dc3b082ba87f23b8490c5e20e1521

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
-
Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
-
Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
-
Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
-
Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
-
Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
-
Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
-
Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
-
Protecting the unborn,
-
Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
-
Expanding education freedom,
-
Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
-
Lowering prescription drug costs,
-
Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
-
Creating a universal school choice program,
-
Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
-
Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
-
Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
-
Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
-
Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
-
...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
-
Record tax relief
-
ESG prohibitions
-
Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
-
The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
-
Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
-
Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
-
Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
-
Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
-
The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
-
Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions
-
Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida
No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9bd861df-1c3b-45a5-bc14-b78f5d3e0061/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

I’m a former federal prosecutor, openly gay Democrat, and I just launched my campaign for Congress in California's 41st District \-- a critical swing seat that could decide the House Majority. When I ran for this seat last year, none of the pundits thought we had a shot in this Republican-leaning district. But we shocked everyone by nearly unseating a 30-year incumbent. _Dems now hold a +3,000 registration advantage in this district, which is why National Democrats have listed CA-41 as one of the “top offensive targets” in 2024._ My opponent is Ken Calvert -- a Trump-endorsed extremist who is best-known for his staunch opposition to LGTBQ rights and for outing a gay political opponent. **[We have another shot at putting an end to his career, but I can’t do this without your support. Please split a donation of $ask or $5, $35, $100 to my campaign and Blue Amp Action right away to become a Founding Donor of my campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c211f21-1698-474e-a695-c7cabbb7c33d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks, Will.

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

I spent an hour and a half talking directly with the American people and sharing the truth about our country and my plan to save it. As soon as the town hall ended, right on cue, CNN’s liberal panel ignored what I said in order to share their planned talking points attacking me. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d042a96558b541301e203ad07e8f6f6757b812ed507e0604875d644ce5c149b3db52673668b3042bd0418df7e44aeab82beaba3b86eace59 Will you make a contribution of $20.24, $47, or more right now to help me cut through the media’s lies and get my message out to every American? Before I even took the stage, Democratic mouthpiece, Bakari Sellers, was armed with liberal talking points. First, he accused me of not having any real policy stances… …I’m guessing he didn’t read the policies I’ve put out on spending, reforming Washington, veterans care, securing the border, immigration, abortion, foreign aid, Ukraine, China, and education? Then, after the town hall was over, he called me a white governor! Peter, I’m the proud daughter of Indian immigrants who came to America legally. I was the first minority and first female governor of South Carolina! It’s clear: The liberal media isn’t interested in having policy discussions. If you don’t embrace their radical, identity-driven politics, then they dismiss everything you say. We need to move beyond the stale policies AND politics of the past. I’m running for president because we have a country to save. My parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m doing this as a military spouse because I want my husband and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice meant something – that we do love this country. I’m doing this for my daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to own a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s in college and writing papers he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. That’s not us. That’s not America. 78% of Americans have said they don’t think that their children will live as good of a life as them. We can’t have that. I’m not going to have that. We’ve got a country to save! That’s why we need a new generation of leadership. We’ve got to go fix this country and go back to the values that made us great. And when we do that – when we really focus back on faith, family, and country, and the idea that America is the best country in the world, that’s when our best days are to come. Since the liberal media won’t share this message, I need your help to make sure this message gets out. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d042a96558b541307a71d43fc55726fcfc1661353d4594c70dbb7e6063f0821af6ce5c84d5143d4c3cb94675f36e3c035edf025dace30bd2 That’s why I’m asking you for a generous donation of $20.24, $47, or more. [Medal of Honor Monday: Army Sgt. Maj. Jon R. Cavaiani](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z637dqgn2tiragviod1u1g3of7djp54b816ec83g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f833cug6apt5mkoj8cdlkupjb85nmerr4td5mupr2d1kumi34tdkumj7ecblkmq35dd2muprb8jlkoq36t1kmgpr9dt246h22sh2s8i66o75cjjmcor4cth2bs)
Army Sgt. Maj. Jon Robert Cavaiani fought an overwhelming North Vietnamese force until he couldn't fight anymore. His actions saved dozens of men who served under him, but they also earned him two years at a prisoner of war camp. When he finally returned home, the Special Forces legend was greeted with respect and, soon after, the Medal of Honor.
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo42a5s3lfpvgmh6h6rp35d476d8deaqpg5ji43g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f833cug6apt5mkoj8cdlkupjb85nmerr4td5mupr2d1kumi34tdkumj7ecblkmq35dd2muprb8jlkoq36t1kmgpr9dt246h22sh2s8i66o75cjjmcor4cth2bs)

# Monday, June 5, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** A spectacular [Strawberry Moon](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71urDAQQOGnsTvQePwDLlzchm5vmxIZe4BJDKzAWZS3j5I69SmOvrfH-IhceF_-x41CnY8xpsovGsE1YBvUI8ocZiIkLSko11vvrDFKriH2KhlSaJxLlvwELnrVdRp8lwEtSg4IqMGBVaC0Ma1KvbdktfEZqfdRGKDM9Tjb94P3utJcvo4XnW06NlnCWuvzEvqfwEHgcN93O03ppwkcdrovgcPnR0P7UuKem0Kc6Kp0Xiuf1DjbA9rOyDPk582l8OU6YWDZIpffQf3b-x0AAP__nS1U9Q) has risen over England, marking the traditional start of summer for all of us. Today we’re talking about new GOP rules that will limit who can join the presidential debates, a new ranking of cities by job satisfaction, and rare photos of what’s believed to be the world’s only giant albino panda. Have thoughts on what we can do better? ## GOP Limits Debate Participants
The Republican National Committee [has set new rules](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2OrSAUxfGnwQ4Dmw-1oLiN3bntlAZhq0xQDOAx5-0nTj3tbzUr_6_X9LIhhmP9b3c0dUmTdTW8cWKaMkVBTNB4syACigYN170atJKSN5vhne-skroXcy9BKs1Qdwydlshn1rMmGGAgmGaKMy6kbLnrB4VKyMED9oMlkqEPNeX2O4WjbrjET3pjbl3am2i2Ws9CxD8CI4Hxvu8241Uxl2d_JOXoCYxXITBmPK85BmePQgtW6nG2FWm-IhbqMtoajpVuV_YPxHSstGypFgoMJD1z2G3-UIzoakjHo4I-EYDA2GTjzzvEGIruiGTrbkP8PVn_bvYTAAD__1TobTY) limiting who'll be allowed to participate in the party's upcoming presidential debates--beginning on Aug. 23. These are the key qualifiers: Candidates must register [at least 1% support](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFypSAUgOGnwQ7ncEDUwmIbu7vtlg7C0Xs2CAbJdfL2maRO_Tf_fP8ey8Nx5LT_dQdNdcuL85VftICV0EnUCzZh2oiQdEOTskM32s4Y1TynMNqtJ9AKcLP9qq0lB6CUWb1TRkHDEwJqsNApUNqYVvlh7KjTZgxIw-iEAQpcc2n_Z071SVv8zC8qrc9HE6dnrecl9B-Bs8D5vu82rT7RfX13gfOZI1f2l8AZAY2kSL5yTgLnPZ-y0PsHF7rkGSnsJFfn32TKByciuXG5qjwLXRwoVXZRBlpdJVl8ckNvxqEpUzhvjpEv2wsD--E4_qzV36W-AgAA__9ZkGso) in national polls and have 40,000 unique donors. Also, they must pledge to support the eventual winning candidate. The rules may knock out several announced candidates who don't have widespread support. [The current wisdom](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vtDAQhH-N6UDL-oNz4eJt6O5tUyJjL3cbGYy4zaH8-4jUaaaa0Tx6Pu7TPXLh7fE_rhRkqVNMwm-awLVgW9QTNjksREi6odC7m_XOGtM3z5AXHMAAZT3DECEjGgsRnJ0Xny3lhgMCanBge-i1MV2fbt6S1cZnpJuP6lqz1KP7rLzJk5byXd90dKmuTQlPkf2l9D-Fo8LxPM9ur4WFU70KCseNzpfC8XpROIK7AhWOB-1fc-EUt3aLwnWLpU11XVmEqM00R6E2HSx0cGwBwHtvhuYIeT-5FH65QRl4rJHLL4r8beYnAAD__zj1YzU) says that Donald Trump benefits by having more debate participants to split the vote, and rival Gov. Ron DeSantis benefits if there are fewer.
## Chinese Military Challenges U.S. Again
A Chinese warship [came within 150 yards](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAQQL8Gd2MBBtsULq5xl2uvtDgYx7PCJmJIUP5-la23e9Jrnt6_23bzlOi6__UnLnXPmw-VXrjJEaQFPWy6i8uOqHHocFHjbN1ojVHdsVg5ud1FN8QYJqUUxn2ObrZqllM03nW0aKkHOUqrpBqM6VWYnUU7GBc1zs4LIzFSzaX_ynTVA_f0zi8sfchnl5aj1geL4Y_Qq9Bra60P__nCxh8v9PpBoddw0IWM0Hzhgx7wBIaTmCkhRORa8hsLVE_NX8C1eKoQUmaE4FOCJzOE43nd4cj5EnrtyhIfjVIiHidh5P30lH6S6u-HvgMAAP__6eVp9Q) of an American destroyer in the Taiwan Strait this weekend--a threatening tactic that echoed last week's incident of a Chinese jet buzzing an American pilot. American officials were quick to decry the Chinese challenge. "What we're seeing is unbelievable aggression by China," [Rep. Mike Turner](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwRsWHAabwUOlyluqbh0tjA_7KgIRkER5-6qdO__Lr-_rsl4cRUrHh7vi3EJenW_0wFUYLjQHtUK3zwERUHU4SzNpa_QwyO6c5eZCEAY2pzSEACLIaRxtGB2gEUZ3NIMAJYzQUkg1DL30k9Wo1WB3wMk6NgjcqeXSf2dK7cQQX_mBpff52sX5bO1WmXpjsDBY3OYTPmt_5N_MYPnMkRr5ymBp95Kw8Hvltbm089pKTgcPziO_pw0j4cNtEbk7joK1Uk7cn5Qcg6W2XF5MLbQz9W7tJBVY1ZV5vz0pRqpmZIM4ro7i31b7X-knAAD__ymBaWg), head of the House Intelligence Committee, told ABC News. The incident occurred as U.S. Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin and his Chinese counterpart participated in a defense summit in Singapore.
## What are The Top 10 Cities for Job Happiness?
The Top 10 list of cities where people are most satisfied to work doesn't include New York, but it does feature two cities in Utah and several small college towns across the country, according to jobs-recruitment site Glassdoor. Provo, Utah, tops the list. Also included are college towns such as Gainesville, Fla. (University of Florida) and College Station, TX (Texas A&M). The biggest cities on the list are San Francisco and Washington D.C. ➤ **The Justice Department** won't charge former VP Mike Pence with possession of classified documents after leaving office. DOJ investigators say they've concluded their investigation of Pence, just days ahead of his planned announcement that he's running for President. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO6yAUAL8GOiLeMQXFbdzltltaBI7DiTBYBmeVv19l621nipHm67bcAhasj_9hAz_WtoQ48AULt4wbJtUiafIrgARFwQs7GWeN1oJmn9RqXRSrsvdkJm5AJ3cX3KUU1DVaS9FLLhW33AgulNYXESdnwCjtkoTJBaI5JBztuDwb1pFhLe_2guMS20aLz2Psnah_RM5EziNDxlI-jsh5bwXjm8i5hoGthsI6xPPA8WGaK3GdNNuhRmCxhN5xRUgstXhuUEdnz7MPjMBqYzGH4wGdyJkePu3fWAp2eyWaP7aAv0E6_n7zEwAA__8RyGaG)) ➤ **A Tennessee** federal judge ruled the state's new law putting strict limits on drag shows was unconstitutional. The law--the first of its kind in the nation--banned drag shows on public property or where minors were present. The court said it violated the First Amendment. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtuwzAQwL7G3hToXWnQ0CVbunY09LhzVChSal9i9O-LdO5IcCH4eVkusbba1494g0A4lpipPmHhlnHDpFrkXAICSFAzBGGd8dZoLeZrKEmgEML5aKXjNiGoiLpEizmikXquQXKpuOVGcKG0PonsvAGjtC8SnI-T5lAqje30NWqnK2D7GU_YTnnc5hauRPd9Uu-TPE_yHO8djv2lXrBRzQ0meS5bXFmLB3v0PPpOlR5UR4-NEfQO-w7A2promyEKC0mnkgov1jurAFC5hF4ZrjLOWyj3o7ZWd_s2ab7eYm1_KfT_md8AAAD__57cZZE)) ➤ **Texas** became the largest state in the U.S. to ban gender reassignment surgery for minors. The law will take effect in September, but several groups have vowed to fight the ban in court. Texas is now the 18th state to pass similar legislation. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1u8yAUxvGrwZstOHwkDAzvwpZ37WgRODinwhARGrd3XyVzl2d6pJ_0_7isl0CF6vY_7OhGbmuIg564cjNzPYNcYUouIwLKCZ0wZ22NVkpMN2dzjCc0NgceFfCYAEUyFqWSIM1VTuSAg-SGa8GFVGoR8Ww1aqlsAjzbwBTHRKP15bNRHTfM5ac9sS-x7VNxtzHuDyb_MfAM_HEcy8Dv8Bidrl8Vl9Y3Bv5FMPDcvAYY-Pdn3rAm7HPImfpOdZtj6DhfQ2Xgp-7S_aBS6GFOTPFtD1Te5vg7wW8AAAD__7sQW5w)) ➤ **A radical** climate group who call themselves "_Tyre Extinguishers_ " is slashing SUV tires in 18 countries worldwide, including major cities in the U.S. "_You 'll be angry, but don't take it personally_," says the group's pamphlet. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1upDAURp_GdEb-xxQutqGbbbdEXnOBGxkb2WbIvH00SZv60yedc_495ofHiGn76w9wbc2zDw2fMDNDmaZCzqJb3AogQHbguLF6NFop3u1u0Bz4IEbrFVj_3xgYBiUtY4ZrEFp26AQTkhmmOeNSqZ4HO2rQUo2LADt6ohgs2HLpPzKmtsMaX_kJpQ_56KLbWzsrkX-ImIiY7vvu1_yZ4K7vnYjpzBEbhkrEVPyCwUcaIh6-Ad1Kvk5ao687po3W60kbFqi0-lelKd_0x5NyS0O-UisIlWIK8Vreh6t2xS3njTFiNQNRbDs8xm-w9nunrwAAAP__1odr7Q))

The Flyover is excited to bring you this valuable information [for FREE](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFu7CAQANDTQLfWMAPYFBS_cbe_TWlNzHhNghdko41y-0ipc4Envbf7cudc8vPxnw-JfasLrz2_ZAF_A3dDWlCnuImgkJZo_OSCd9YavccNnRgEdimRsAMKYNlTSkhoAnqdIwISeHAGDFk7mHUKThzZkFCmwMqCpNzrOXzU_Oy7bOW7vuQc1nroEvfe26Xon8JZ4Xw1Pj9LG9aqcG4K52DX8d0zjZs-Y2pfuZR8-VFZeBycyy_S_z79BAAA__-2LUra)! The Republican National Committee has set new rules limiting who’ll be allowed to participate in the party’s upcoming presidential debates—beginning on Aug. 23. | | | | | | Monday, June 5, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! A spectacular has risen over England, marking the traditional start of summer for all of us. Today we’re talking about new GOP rules that will limit who can join the presidential debates, a new ranking of cities by job satisfaction, and rare photos of what’s believed to be the world’s only giant albino panda. Have thoughts on what we can do better? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | GOP Limits Debate Participants The Republican National Committee limiting who'll be allowed to participate in the party's upcoming presidential debates--beginning on Aug. 23. These are the key qualifiers: Candidates must register in national polls and have 40,000 unique donors. Also, they must pledge to support the eventual winning candidate. The rules may knock out several announced candidates who don't have widespread support. says that Donald Trump benefits by having more debate participants to split the vote, and rival Gov. Ron DeSantis benefits if there are fewer. Chinese Military Challenges U.S. Again A Chinese warship of an American destroyer in the Taiwan Strait this weekend--a threatening tactic that echoed last week's incident of a Chinese jet buzzing an American pilot. American officials were quick to decry the Chinese challenge. "What we're seeing is unbelievable aggression by China," , head of the House Intelligence Committee, told ABC News. The incident occurred as U.S. Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin and his Chinese counterpart participated in a defense summit in Singapore. What are The Top 10 Cities for Job Happiness? The Top 10 list of cities where people are most satisfied to work doesn't include New York, but it does feature two cities in Utah and several small college towns across the country, according to jobs-recruitment site Glassdoor. Provo, Utah, tops the list. Also included are college towns such as Gainesville, Fla. (University of Florida) and College Station, TX (Texas A&M). The biggest cities on the list are San Francisco and Washington D.C. () ➤ The Justice Department won't charge former VP Mike Pence with possession of classified documents after leaving office. DOJ investigators say they've concluded their investigation of Pence, just days ahead of his planned announcement that he's running for President. () ➤ A Tennessee federal judge ruled the state's new law putting strict limits on drag shows was unconstitutional. The law--the first of its kind in the nation--banned drag shows on public property or where minors were present. The court said it violated the First Amendment. () ➤ Texas became the largest state in the U.S. to ban gender reassignment surgery for minors. The law will take effect in September, but several groups have vowed to fight the ban in court. Texas is now the 18th state to pass similar legislation. () ➤ A radical climate group who call themselves "Tyre Extinguishers " is slashing SUV tires in 18 countries worldwide, including major cities in the U.S. "You 'll be angry, but don't take it personally," says the group's pamphlet. () Flying together with: Knowledge is Power That is exactly why Founder and CEO Will Scott started . He wanted financial knowledge to be easily accessible to any and everyone, especially the next generation. The Flyover is excited to bring you this valuable information ! So many financial fundamentals are just not taught in the classroom - that's why Will created Dinner Table Discussions. It's a that provides parents, grandparents, friends, and neighbors with conversation-starters to talk about finances with their children or young adults. And Will is offering this valuable information to Flyover readers for FREE. to sign up and learn more. Dinner Table Discussions provides on how to have conversations about some of the most important topics that aren't taught in the classroom but are so important in today's world: How to manage debt. Crafting a budget.What a credit score is and why it 's important. for a one-click sign-up - It's FREE. No really, it's just one click and you're automatically signed up for access to these incredible conversation starters to ensure your family is getting the best fiscal advice out there. ➤ Viktor Hovland won $3.6 million in Sunday's Memorial Golf Tournament by winning in a playoff. He had tied Denny McCarthy at the 18th hole when McCarthy missed a putt that would have won the tournament. () ➤ Michael Jordan 's sweat-stained 1992 Olympic practice jersey will go up for auction this June and is expected to fetch a price between $400,000 and $600,000. Jordan was the star of that year's "Dream Team" gold medalists. () ➤ Novak Djokovic broke a tie with tennis arch-rival Rafael Nadal this weekend by reaching the French Open quarterfinals for a record 17th time. Djokovic has his sights set on passing Nadal for a more significant record: Grand Slams singles championships. () Market Report Previous Week | ▲ | Nasdaq Natl. "Little Mermaid" business fell by 58 percent in its second week. () ➤ Volkswagen is bringing its iconic VW bus back to the North American market after a hiatus of 20 years. The 2024 version will be an all-electric, battery-powered vehicle that can seat up to seven people. () ➤ Saudi Arabia plans to make big cuts to its oil production in July, on top of a broader OPEC+ deal to cut oil output. The country said it would cut production next month by 1 million barrels a day in an effort to keep oil prices from sliding lower. () ➤ The US Air Force categorically denied a widespread report that an AI-powered drone killed its operator during a simulated test. The military said it never conducted this kind of simulated exercise and that the information was based solely on a "thought experiment." () ➤ However , some AI-based science fiction is coming true: Engineered Arts has now put ChatGPT AI software into an oddly humanlike robot that can converse with people and react to insults. () ➤ Apple is expected to unveil its new virtual reality headset today, reportedly named “RealityPro.” Virtual reality as a business has remained stalled, but experts say Apple’s new device could finally transform the metaverse concept into a more mainstream industry. () ➤ Washington D.C. area residents were shaken by a sonic boom Sunday as two military jets chased a Cessna business jet whose pilot was unresponsive. The Cessna, heading for Long Island, eventually crashed in Virginia after an erratic flight path. Four people were inside the aircraft; no survivors were found at the crash site. () ➤ The train derailment in India that killed at least 275 people was most likely caused by a signal failure, investigators said. The devastating wreck is the deadliest in two decades for the country, injuring nearly 1,200 people overall. () ➤ Chuck Todd , the longtime host of "Meet the Press," announced on the show that he would be leaving by the end of the summer after a 10-year stint. Another inside-the-beltway journalist, Kristen Welker, NBC chief White House correspondent, will replace him. subject: Help protect the last 73 Southern Resident orcas before they are lost forever
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **3 Southern Resident orcas are dead and their surviving family is growing weaker by the day. Act before it’s too late: donate $27 or more immediately for orcas and the planet.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805765?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805766?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805767?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805768?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Starving.
Mourning.
_**One major oil spill away from extinction.**_
**Southern Resident orcas Cappuccino, Marina, and now young Ripple are all dead.** That leaves only 73 members of their family left in the wild. And they are growing weaker every day. But Big Oil tankers and shipping megaprojects pose a serious existential threat to the remaining whales. [**Friend, if we don’t act now, we could be the last generation to share the Earth with these endangered whales. Will you donate $27 today to protect the remaining orcas and our planet?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805769?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Last year, the devastating loss of Ripple left his family reeling in grief. Southern Resident orcas live in close-knit, sensitive family communities known as pods. Each loss is felt by the entire pod. With every death, their chances of survival plummet as their grief can push them into starvation. That’s why we can’t stand to lose even one more of these precious whales.
But Big Oil and the shipping industry will line their pockets at any cost -- even if it means wiping out Southern Resident orcas forever. The last Southern Resident orcas are just one major oil spill away from extinction. And we know that oil spills are not a matter of “if,” but rather “when.” _**Enough is enough:**_ how long will we let Big Oil get away with their deadly dealings?
**Help protect the last 73 Southern Resident orcas and the planet from Big Oil and shipping megaprojects before we lose them forever. Donate $27 now!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805765?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805766?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805767?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805768?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Grief isn’t the only thing threatening Southern Resident orcas, Friend. It’s actually a result of more sinister actors at play: Orcas rely on Chinook salmon as their main food source. But these fish have substantially declined in the last decade. In fact, many Chinook salmon runs are now threatened or endangered themselves.
Struggling to find food, orcas are being driven to starvation. They’re under extreme stress and even suffering miscarriages. **Big Oil and Big Shipping’s megaprojects would amplify these threats. Ultimately, they would devastate the remaining Southern Resident orca population.**
The proposed expansion of the Trans Mountain Pipeline would increase oil tanker traffic in Southern Resident critical habitat SEVEN-FOLD. This means going from one oil tanker a week through these waters to one per day! Worst of all, it will also be transporting millions of gallons of toxic tar sands oil per day -- _**the dirtiest kind**_ \-- through this already delicate orca habitat.
The Roberts Bank T2 shipping terminal project would significantly increase cargo ship traffic in prime orca habitat. It would drive Chinook salmon further away from orcas and drop their numbers even further. The noise pollution from the ships will also disrupt the killer whales’ sonar hunting methods, preventing them from finding the few salmon left in the region. And now, the worst has happened: this shipping terminal has recently been approved by the Canadian government. **But we can still fight back!**
If we let Big Oil and Big Shipping get away with their reckless plans in pursuit of profit, it could be too late for Southern Resident orcas. Between the chronic lack of salmon and the disruption of their hunting methods, **orcas will starve to death and be driven to extinction.** We have to show Big Oil and the shipping industry that we won’t allow them to put corporate profits over the lives of precious wildlife and the ecosystems that rely on them.
**We can’t let Big Oil push vulnerable orcas further toward extinction -- the time to fight back is NOW. Rush your $27 donation now and protect orcas and our planet.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805765?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805766?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805767?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805768?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Did you know that orcas play a part in the air you breathe? That’s right, Friend. Orcas release vital nutrients for phytoplankton, which in turn provide half of the oxygen we breathe. But their impact doesn’t stop there. They absorb hundreds of thousands of tons of carbon each year. This flow of nutrients promotes healthy ecosystems and a functioning planet, which is why we must protect these orcas at all costs.
But orcas are just one oil spill away from extinction. Proposed Big Oil megaprojects like the expanded Trans Mountain Pipeline could be fatal. Orcas can’t detect oil spills. The fumes alone can knock out and drown a full-grown whale. When the next oil spill occurs, they may swim through toxic tar sands oil, leading to **infection, suffocation, and death.**
Friend, we can’t let Big Oil and the shipping industry put vulnerable Southern Resident orcas at risk anymore. Your membership support today will go a long way toward protecting orcas and our planet, and helping stop these reckless megaprojects that have the potential to wipe out the remaining 73 orcas.
Orcas are at a tipping point -- and _**if we don’t act soon, we could lose them forever.**_ Friends of the Earth is doing everything we can to fight against greedy corporate interests and save these precious whales and our planet. But we can’t do it without your help. Please, Friend, join us in this fight and rush your $27 contribution today before the clock strikes midnight and we lose any more of these majestic creatures.
**Don’t let Big Oil and corporate greed exploit our oceans for profit. Donate $27 now to stand up for orcas and our planet before the damage is irreversible.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805765?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805766?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805767?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1805768?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D240695&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=0a6c6ddd19342a0bb6811d621ad507152876b18816811bb0713ec50b79cc4ae6caf076bdcd3302079276047c018ba6720db0fb6df46d6c073bea00008104419ed36b0a3aa612ba63957ff817aed2c677

Peter,

The first step of any conversation? Listening.

We’re contacting all of our top GOP grassroots activists for a strategy session about how we win the White House back from Joe Biden.

We’re asking you to fill out our Official Ron DeSantis for President Listening Survey
SURVEY ID:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4e47009486a13b5640ded69b90c8e1e84ad173ef5faf0800a8904ee31ad3f8e2fc71bd50db46ea220339bc7281009cf88b049141a0aa16912603f5ca576440d5
dpwillis67@gmail.com

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4e47009486a13b5640ded69b90c8e1e84ad173ef5faf0800a8904ee31ad3f8e2fc71bd50db46ea220339bc7281009cf88b049141a0aa16912603f5ca576440d5
COMPLETE SURVEY NOW

Thank you for your time. Let’s win this, together.

Team DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4e47009486a13b5640ded69b90c8e1e84ad173ef5faf0800a8904ee31ad3f8e2fc71bd50db46ea220339bc7281009cf88b049141a0aa16912603f5ca576440d5

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
-
Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
-
Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
-
Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
-
Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
-
Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
-
Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
-
Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
-
Protecting the unborn,
-
Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
-
Expanding education freedom,
-
Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
-
Lowering prescription drug costs,
-
Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
-
Creating a universal school choice program,
-
Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
-
Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
-
Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
-
Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
-
Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
-
...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
-
Record tax relief
-
ESG prohibitions
-
Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
-
The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
-

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Peter, The first step of any conversation? Listening. We’re contacting all of our top GOP grassroots activists for a strategy session about how we win the White House back from Joe Biden. We’re asking you to fill out our Official Ron DeSantis for President Listening Survey SURVEY ID: dpwillis67@gmail.com SURVEY STATUS: INCOMPLETE COMPLETE SURVEY NOW Thank you for your time. Let’s win this, together. Team DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: - Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, - Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, - Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, - Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, - Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, - Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, - Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, - Protecting the unborn, - Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, - Expanding education freedom, - Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, - Lowering prescription drug costs, - Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, - Creating a universal school choice program, - Delivering record-breaking tax relief, - Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, - Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, - Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, - Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, - ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: - Record tax relief - ESG prohibitions - Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP - The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. - Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency - Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI - Improvements to our state’s infrastructure - Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists - The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis - Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions - Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. * * *
| | | | | | | \- We’re happy to tell you **we’ve paid the Full Price** of American Tactical Supply’s new “invisible” Shoulder Holster for you.

So you can own one of the 382 available Shoulder Holsters for FREE!

[Just click here to claim your complimentary Shoulder Holster today.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df)

We’re doing this as a **“No More Gun Control”** awareness campaign -- and to give a __big ol’ middle finger__ to Biden’s surge of insane new gun laws.

This is our #1 favorite holster.

It fits nearly all handguns...

It’s unbelievably comfortable...

And it’s so good at concealing guns... it can make a large frame pistol **disappear in plain sight.**

Plus, the fact [you can get it for $0.00 today](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df) is a huge selling point. ;)

The only problem is that there are a limited number available to give away.

Once they’re gone, you can still get one... **but you’ll have to pay full price**.

Right now, there are enough Free Shoulder Holsters [for the next 382 people who request on here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df).

After that, we can’t make any promises.

**[So HURRY and grab your Free Shoulder Holster now](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df)** , before it’s too late.

**Thank You.**

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Take Action Against Ranked Choice Voting NOW!
body:
This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2mv99l9kvujq79d6ed3cfrq2aqnocgegh8s69n8_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjge0p70chh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

As the President of The Heritage Foundation, I must urgently ask for your help in fighting against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

It's time to take a stand! We need your voice and input to tackle this dangerous reform that could wreak havoc on our electoral process.

**Please, take just a few minutes to complete our RCV survey by clicking the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6psnjtpnla7n25p8s801f1s2icdslg4ubecap7o_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjge0p70chh2bs)**

By participating, you'll be joining the battle to protect our democracy and ensure the integrity of our elections. After completing the survey, you'll receive a copy of our exclusive RCV fact sheet that lays out the shocking truth behind this controversial system.

Together, we can make a difference and preserve the democratic process that defines our great nation.

**[Let's take action against Ranked Choice Voting today!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4rq2ql9p6pjcu9rbqvk11a4rgsnpc485ludpn80_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjge0p70chh2bs)**

Thank you for your passion for preserving our democracy.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqhs1jr5a7g21pcm0hn3u3ndd2se5ekmlat326vg_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjge4or2clh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

As the President of The Heritage Foundation, I must urgently ask for your help in fighting against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

It's time to take a stand! We need your voice and input to tackle this dangerous reform that could wreak havoc on our electoral process.

**Please, take just a few minutes to complete our RCV survey by clicking the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3ae3n7cvivrqqlh4r4aae8n2t9l68c65gsia1po_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjge4or2clh2bs)**

By participating, you'll be joining the battle to protect our democracy and ensure the integrity of our elections. After completing the survey, you'll receive a copy of our exclusive RCV fact sheet that lays out the shocking truth behind this controversial system.

Together, we can make a difference and preserve the democratic process that defines our great nation.

**[Let's take action against Ranked Choice Voting today!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6qtvvqkdkv4nc4o2euf3uak8ottfcm9v2mj7rj8_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjge4or2clh2bs)**

Thank you for your passion for preserving our democracy.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: This fast-approaching June 20th primary gives us a chance to ensure abortion remains legal in Virginia next year.
body:
abortion rights in Virginia
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T05e6ed30-2ba4-4946-a3fc-3545bafe6978/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **It’s getting close. June 20th is our chance to ensure abortion remains legal in Virginia next year.**_ _ _We only have a slim one vote pro-choice majority in the State Senate because_ _ __one of 2 Democrats who make up our majority, Joe Morrissey, is a "pro-life" Democrat who'll sign any awful anti-choice Republican garbage._ [**_But we have the perfect solution!__ __If you join us, in about two weeks we'll replace the anti-choicer with progressive champion & former State Delegate. Laschrecse Aird, who's challenging Morrissey in the June 20th primary._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta259cd59-417d-47c2-8868-d2fde3273b3e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Aird is exactly the kind of candidate we must get behind. She grew up impoverished to a teenage mother and father who worked multiple jobs to get by. This motivated Aird to run for the VA House of Delegates. _ _In 2021, she was named Legislator of the Year by the Virginia Education Association. Aird was also lauded by the Virginia Chamber of Commerce for job creation. Two very different groups--both seeing Aird's __accomplishment and integrity. Now that's someone who can bring people together._ _Not surprisingly, when comparing Aird to Morrissey, this was the result:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb118a331-85ff-4441-8b91-53141d5b5b95/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Aird has made abortion rights the centerpiece of her campaign, running for "Roe Not Joe." She'll be taking that fight all the way to June 20th, but early voting has begun, so we must **SUPPORT AIRD** **NOW** or risk an anti-choice majority! _ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action's own "Roe Not Joe," fundraiser, and support Lashrecse Aird with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb291c1eb-2e65-4415-9642-f43d7b08885d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you! Cliff

|

---

---
|
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8533cee-3f20-44c5-97f5-eb6c501a9fb7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
