name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTU2LWY2YmNhMzcwODVlODRjZDFiMWY2MTdjZGNhMjc2NzAzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL25hdGlvbmFsLXJhbmtlZC1jaG9pY2Utdm90aW5nLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJhbmtlZGNob2ljZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QV9BRV9GRk8zOTY2MyJ9/bhCl0vpkFmavVljVkSV85w)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTU2LWY2YmNhMzcwODVlODRjZDFiMWY2MTdjZGNhMjc2NzAzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL25hdGlvbmFsLXJhbmtlZC1jaG9pY2Utdm90aW5nLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJhbmtlZGNob2ljZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QV9BRV9GRk8zOTY2MyJ9/av8U_w3YqfivxYnKZT-L-g)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTU2LWY2YmNhMzcwODVlODRjZDFiMWY2MTdjZGNhMjc2NzAzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/Cu9b5PpssUWq_jPHUFAnPg) to unsubscribe.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Join the Fight to Take Back Michigan!
body:
Join the Michigan Republican Party as we fight to take back Michigan! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6f2574b946fd/join-the-fight-to-take-back-michigan?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Patriot, I hope this email finds you in good health and high spirits. As a valued member of our Michigan Republican Party, we are reaching out to you today to rally our dedicated supporters and stand together to take back Michigan! Our great state deserves strong leadership that prioritizes conservative values, individual freedoms, and economic prosperity. Over the past few years, we have witnessed a concerning erosion of these core principles threatening the very fabric of our society. Now, more than ever, we must unite to restore the values that make Michigan truly great. But we cannot do it alone. That's why we are humbly reaching out to ask for your support through a monthly $20 donation **[TODAY](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=17c21e921c&e=a2af77507c)**. By contributing this modest amount, you will directly contribute to our grassroots efforts and help us build a robust campaign that resonates with Michiganders from all walks of life. Here are just a few ways your donation will make a meaningful impact: **Voter Outreach:** Your support will enable us to launch comprehensive voter outreach campaigns, ensuring that our message reaches every corner of the state. We will utilize innovative strategies, including digital advertising, grassroots organizing, and community engagement, to connect with voters on the issues that matter most to them. **Candidate Support:** We are committed to recruiting and supporting exceptional Republican candidates who embody our shared values. With your help, we will provide the necessary resources, training, and guidance to empower these individuals to run successful campaigns, both at the local and state levels. **Defending Our Principles:** By standing together, we can fight back against the onslaught of harmful policies that threaten our liberties. Your contribution will help us challenge unconstitutional overreach, advocate for lower taxes, promote responsible spending, and protect our Second Amendment rights, among many other crucial conservative causes. **Election Integrity:** We believe in the importance of fair and secure elections. With your support, we will work tirelessly to safeguard the integrity of our electoral system by advocating for common-sense voter ID laws and ensuring that every vote is counted accurately and transparently. Your generosity is paramount to our success. Whether you can spare $20/month or choose to contribute a different amount, every dollar matters and will be put to good use in our fight to restore Michigan's conservative values. Donating is quick and easy! [**CLICK HERE**](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=c771c07c2b&e=a2af77507c) to make your secure contribution online. If you prefer to contribute by check, please make it payable to the Michigan Republican Party and mail it to 3450 Alpine Ave. NW Box 332, Grand Rapids, MI 49544. Additionally, please consider sharing this email with friends, family, and fellow conservatives who are equally passionate about taking back Michigan. Encourage them to stand with us and make a difference today! Thank you for your unwavering support. Together, we will rebuild Michigan, restore our core values, and secure a brighter future for our families and communities. In Liberty, Kristina Karamo Chairwoman Michigan Republican Party
---

name: PragerU
subject: Take our urgent survey
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Dear Fellow American, A movement is underway led by leftwing environmentalist activists to decimate America's fossil fuel industries and undermine America's energy independence under the guise of fighting climate change. These activists are shutting down America's gas pipelines, eliminating drilling permits, and dismantling our nuclear power plants. **As a result, Americans are being crushed by high energy prices and our energy infrastructure is deteriorating and becoming more vulnerable to blackouts and "brownouts." ** The leftwing attacks on our domestic energy industries, and their attempts to push the United States toward unreliable energy sources - such as wind and solar - are making our nation weaker and more dependent on our biggest adversaries, like Russia and China. **[This is why PragerU is conducting a survey.](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTU2LTVlN2NjNTczZGRiNzQyNzk5NDM0YmU3MThjYWZhZjFkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5zdXJ2ZXltb25rZXkuY29tL3IvV1lLTFI2Wj9OPVNQTzM5NjY4In0/6Y--nQGd0Ih-GmkgMq3k6Q)** Your answers to this survey will help PragerU understand where everyday Americans stand on these important issues and the most effective strategies to educate Americans.

name: Ruben Gallego

body:
Here is the truth:
#

Peter-
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for Senate. Please give me a chance to explain why these requests -- this month especially -- are so important.
Here is the truth:
This is an FEC deadline month. That means when it ends we're legally required to report not just how much money we've raised, but how many donations we've received.
That's why we asking you to contribute $3 or whatever you can afford:
$3 because everyone will be watching to see what we report when this deadline ends.
$3 because a bad report could trigger attacks we can't afford to repel from Sinema, her Republican friends, or the Kari Lake crowd.
$3 because a good report could trigger a number of important endorsements from Democrats waiting to see the support for our campaign -- endorsements we need to unite Democrats.
We need this to be our biggest month of the campaign. And we're going to need you if that's gonna happen. So please:
[**Can I count on you to use this link and contribute $3 to my re-election campaign today? It will add up to a great month if everyone does their part.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230605&t=1&akid=680%2E734936%2ENq8oWQ)
If $3 doesn't feel right today, or if you can do more, just choose an amount below.
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Gov. DeSantis is MY pick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
I am counting on you to help me get a winner in the White House

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc80qqbdr696ovjv9n46tftev832mie77pobaklo_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjgeaoj2c1h2bs)
---
Friend, ** I am so excited to endorse Ron DeSantis for President! **
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjr19vjeorh9g73b89csnplj0fa30dj5cn960il8_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjgeaoj2c1h2bs)
---
I first became active in politics because of the assault on women's sports and women's spaces. As a D1 swimmer for the University of Kentucky who was forced to compete against biological males, and even share locker rooms with men, I felt like our elected leaders had abandoned us -- until Governor Ron DeSantis.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1qm6m9liceo49mu22a5178cpd7uqlr0id0kb4b0_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjgeaoj2c1h2bs)
---
Governor DeSantis shined a spotlight on the cruelty girls and women were being subjected to, and even went as far as to reinstate victories of women who had lost titles and sacrificed their athletic careers because of these men competing in our leagues... and for that, he was ripped apart in the media. But Friend, Governor DeSantis did NOT back down.

I want someone like that in the White House -- someone who will fight for us. Governor Ron DeSantis' record is simply second to none. That's just who the Governor is. He's taken on the political establishment, woke corporations, and legacy media -- and he's won.

There's only one candidate in this race who has truly walked the walk rather than just offered soundbites on these issues -- and that's Governor Ron DeSantis. It's an easy choice.

In a moment when everything in our culture feels like it's upside down, that's the kind of strength we need in the White House to put us back on the right track.

In America today, sanity is in short supply, and common sense has become an uncommon virtue -- but Governor Ron DeSantis has proven with his leadership that he can put an end to these woke Olympics, and I can't wait.
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). name: American Defense News
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcjelm71qg09mufpcp913haadqgrsq4t4afhsev0_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjge6oj4cjh2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqvkuq6sfbk4j5g3ejb5uht3fftj029gmbcgb3u8_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjge6oj4cjh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqdvmj5v3oq0038lpj574ades8593bsjgtqre2bg_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjge6oj4cjh2bs)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: Conservative Kansas Values: Faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
Faith, Family, Freedom, Personal Responsibility | | |
---
| |
---
| Dear Friends,

Growing up in the Big First taught me the value of faith. Thanks to that heritage, I represent you in Congress as a follower of Jesus; my faith shapes my understanding of leadership, service, and government itself. If faith is going to blossom and flourish in America, however, we need to keep our country free. Congress was created to legislate, not the executive branch, and when President Biden issues executive orders, we see **infringement on peoples’ rights and big government overreach into the private lives, businesses, and property of American citizens.**

That’s why I introduced the More Accountability is Necessary Now (MANN) Acts – six pieces of legislation that _push back on the Biden Administration’s overreaching executive orders_ relating to:

**✓**** Agriculture**
**✓ ****Energy**
**✓ ****Natural Resources**
**✓ ****Right to life**
**✓ ****Second Amendment **
**✓ ****Immigration**

_America is about freedom_ , not holding people hostage to the will of a President. I refuse to be a caretaker in the slow demise of our great nation – I serve in Congress to fight and work to make America stronger. I have faith in Jesus, and I also have faith that our brightest days are yet to come in America.

**_Please join me in the fight to protect our freedoms and push back on big government overreach. _**

You can ([Click Here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=0c427a74a2&e=a9d1410029)) or visit my website at [www.traceymann.com](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=045a1e81a2&e=a9d1410029) to learn more or contribute online.

In the Fight,
Tracey Mann

P.S. I stand for Kansas, and I always will. I promise that I will do everything within my power to ensure that our kids have a bright future. Please donate today and help take our country back.

Fellow Patriot, My name is Jim Nelson, and I’m taking on the Left in western Pennsylvania.

PA-17 is one of the closest districts in the country, and it’s time for it to be represented by TRUE conservative values.

I’m going to need a team of loyal, dedicated conservatives by my side, and that’s why I’m humbly asking for your help today.

**[Please, will you join our team now and help us flip one of the most important districts in Pennsylvania?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b819c1f117794f03ab218bcd56212a25&_e=kEveRa3Sk_CQuzQZh_QJg2abEWHui5hTxWonMf9YgijWlhC-g7E2C4uqTRuJrCTN9Km_pk88q3hkHvHPmvh4_4X1cqNYj7EUL-ibIksXc0nAsxPraThlRTU4vToA_grr1n__Cvw0NYSJPGh8dzWTIygNGUhR_RAG2-78EDAIKsUSbdCsQErIX_aqAUhJb_wc1_iGjxEJ_zuoo15S2lUgUQCSTyIhbjMeROj8GMNpvXrqdMyseQam9aq1jD0s8mecwJG-26wE_zkJy4aNs6eyjMUoN6zwH2hclFBcy9dGqZAJ8zoC4phxs2R0D791YAPrl5M5xZIx-rFpXZtGu1Fb-5RPdeu-vCD1kHjeQm6XH15LjBnTazwQCBX-2qPzS2L-TcYWgHp-t4uGFRphzZOcEQ%3D%3D)**

[**STAND WITH JIM NELSON - JOIN THE TEAM**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b819c1f117794f03ab218bcd56212a25&_e=kEveRa3Sk_CQuzQZh_QJg2abEWHui5hTxWonMf9YgijWlhC-g7E2C4uqTRuJrCTN9Km_pk88q3hkHvHPmvh4_4X1cqNYj7EUL-ibIksXc0nAsxPraThlRTU4vToA_grr1n__Cvw0NYSJPGh8dzWTIygNGUhR_RAG2-78EDAIKsUSbdCsQErIX_aqAUhJb_wc1_iGjxEJ_zuoo15S2lUgUQCSTyIhbjMeROj8GMNpvXrqdMyseQam9aq1jD0s8mecXCtUfYybJlJk1Fr70DO1mdAaP3knk0P1aRTUHXf_nXBFGiJ3TKYGEWnVoZpoRp3G_qLWVUzlv5GrZpNtF8Q1I-UdjOiQm-k1RMZs6SBS1Ql9JlIsZMsHta3r8lenj5-O_PRTa-HyVqXHKtv6W5TJYQ%3D%3D)

I know this may be the first time you’ve heard from me, so let me tell you a little bit about myself.

From the time I was a small child, my parents instilled the value of community in me.

It’s what carried me through my youth and it inspired me to serve in the United States Air Force and Pennsylvania Air National Guard.

My time serving our country showed me the true value of freedom. It really isn’t free, and the sacrifices I saw my fellow servicemen make inspired me to continue a life of service after being honorably discharged.

I went on to graduate from the Allegheny County Police and Fire Academy and serve a 30-year tenure in law enforcement.
---

| | I’m not going to lie - my time on the force was incredibly challenging. As part of the fugitive task force, it was my job to help track down some of the most dangerous criminals that were on-the-run.

_But anything is worth it to keep the streets I love safe._
---
[**KEEP OUR STREETS SAFE**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b819c1f117794f03ab218bcd56212a25&_e=kEveRa3Sk_CQuzQZh_QJg2abEWHui5hTxWonMf9YgijWlhC-g7E2C4uqTRuJrCTN9Km_pk88q3hkHvHPmvh4_4X1cqNYj7EUL-ibIksXc0nAsxPraThlRTU4vToA_grr1n__Cvw0NYSJPGh8dzWTIygNGUhR_RAG2-78EDAIKsUSbdCsQErIX_aqAUhJb_wc1_iGjxEJ_zuoo15S2lUgUQCSTyIhbjMeROj8GMNpvXrqdMyseQam9aq1jD0s8mecDzhqGqOINnHuloOdw7H0-4sFsRKjBu99ZhpZUGc-N6rFRsC-JCqlGNheXXSJ-hyM-AKH31Xozq4JkohmhYqYfw4LQc4kex7sVuHji3x4ps5La2HmKCsJ2MKXpzsvs-VCrg-N2PcY1OVFgplWiG0J9Q%3D%3D)

Now that I’ve retired from the police force, I serve as a pastor at New Birth Ministries. I’ve seen my congregation grow, started community outreach programs, and have even been invited to preach at the U.S. Capitol.

My faith has guided me through every stage of my life, and now, I’m putting my faith in you, Friend. For too long, I’ve seen the values of the Left creep into our communities.

They tell me I need the government’s help because I’m black. They tell us that people of faith are the enemies, and that we should turn against each other because of our creed or color.

**After dedicating my life to the service of Americans of ALL walks of life, I know that that couldn’t be further from the truth.**

It’s time to bring safe schools, lower taxes, and prosperity back to our communities, but just like my time in the Air Force or my career in the police force, I can’t achieve this mission alone.

[**Please, join our team today to take on the radical Left and bring conservative values BACK to Pennsylvania!**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b819c1f117794f03ab218bcd56212a25&_e=kEveRa3Sk_CQuzQZh_QJg2abEWHui5hTxWonMf9YgijWlhC-g7E2C4uqTRuJrCTN9Km_pk88q3hkHvHPmvh4_4X1cqNYj7EUL-ibIksXc0nAsxPraThlRTU4vToA_grr1n__Cvw0NYSJPGh8dzWTIygNGUhR_RAG2-78EDAIKsUSbdCsQErIX_aqAUhJb_wc1_iGjxEJ_zuoo15S2lUgUQCSTyIhbjMeROj8GMNpvXrqdMyseQam9aq1jD0s8mecKmsb_CL_QBeJ4NXutuovSNPE0_NibIUgKXkl4dDWg0qWi-7ndDnwqSq8MpM8bNdtTt4zHAUUWsqWikQo9zgbnoFHw0fl-O2iTZaGBWwzi_9_S6YEafKqXoMzDpE-HxE-3PoynxN5J1u8_xeU2PY4oQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: I know this may be the first time you’ve heard from me, so let me tell you a little bit about myself.| | | Fellow Patriot, My name is Jim Nelson, and I’m taking on the Left in western Pennsylvania. PA-17 is one of the closest districts in the country, and it’s time for it to be represented by TRUE conservative values. I’m going to need a team of loyal, dedicated conservatives by my side, and that’s why I’m humbly asking for your help today. I know this may be the first time you’ve heard from me, so let me tell you a little bit about myself. From the time I was a small child, my parents instilled the value of community in me. It’s what carried me through my youth and it inspired me to serve in the United States Air Force and Pennsylvania Air National Guard. My time serving our country showed me the true value of freedom. It really isn’t free, and the sacrifices I saw my fellow servicemen make inspired me to continue a life of service after being honorably discharged. I went on to graduate from the Allegheny County Police and Fire Academy and serve a 30-year tenure in law enforcement. | | | | | I’m not going to lie - my time on the force was incredibly challenging. As part of the fugitive task force, it was my job to help track down some of the most dangerous criminals that were on-the-run. But anything is worth it to keep the streets I love safe. Now that I’ve retired from the police force, I serve as a pastor at New Birth Ministries. I’ve seen my congregation grow, started community outreach programs, and have even been invited to preach at the U.S. Capitol. My faith has guided me through every stage of my life, and now, I’m putting my faith in you, Friend. For too long, I’ve seen the values of the Left creep into our communities. They tell me I need the government’s help because I’m black. They tell us that people of faith are the enemies, and that we should turn against each other because of our creed or color. After dedicating my life to the service of Americans of ALL walks of life, I know that that couldn’t be further from the truth. It’s time to bring safe schools, lower taxes, and prosperity back to our communities, but just like my time in the Air Force or my career in the police force, I can’t achieve this mission alone. | | Thank you, Jim Nelson Candidate, U.S. House (PA-17) | | Paid for by Jim Nelson for Congress | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Jim Nelson for Congress

Dear Peter,

Every year, concerned people like us come together on **Gun Violence Awareness Day** to demand an end to the gun violence epidemic. This year, it felt like **we were reaching a turning point in the fight to stop this crisis, advance real solutions, and protect our communities from senseless violence. Here’s why: **
More Americans are being impacted by gun violence every day, and no one is immune. **In schools and banks, grocery stores and malls, Americans are forced every day to contend with the reality that the next mass shooting could happen in any place and in any state.** At the same time, a growing chorus of voices is speaking out to demand action and save lives.
But here’s the situation: **Republicans in power are still voting NO. **GOP controlled states are blocking gun laws and passing laws that instead expand access to firearms. So, to stop the gun violence epidemic, we must replace them and their excuses with Emerge women – moms, teachers, neighbors – who are ready to make real change and put our communities first.
**The movement to end this deadly epidemic is growing stronger by the day, but we still need to know that you’re with us, Peter. That’s why we need your response on our community poll before the deadline at midnight tonight. We’re still 153 responses short of our goal, so please tell us now: **
**Are you all in to STOP the gun violence epidemic and save lives? **

Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our organization depends on thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our communities and across our country by building power through investing in Democratic women. **[If you’d like to donate, click here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64346955/409792094/-86135032?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1220-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NzU0MDNiLWE3MDMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=b1Tm8NkL_rTBPPv2cccjYGioLLnkr6kIpQIdlRtiRO4=&emci=1bc9307c-9300-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=3975403b-a703-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**

| | Derek, In February, my friend of over 40 years, Tim Kaine, launched his Senate re-election bid, and I _still_ couldn’t be more excited. One of the best parts of my job has been working alongside Tim to deliver for Virginia. This photo is from the day he announced his re-election – we went out to celebrate and talk about our goals for the Commonwealth that we can accomplish together when he’s back in the Senate in 2024. name: American Action News
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z82diig7pb7si6v15o97tqecki5jvdjgdsu9u7p0_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjgeep32clh2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp2vr39belr9mhp7hm3ctg9ii4vm08da3202f438_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjgeep32clh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqdes8f2lb6gsirfkdk8ussvaqc4il99hj2gdmbo_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjgeep32clh2bs)

name: Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668884%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kgYHk6DSLtCvqt5GbsBsyg&sysid=1)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668895%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s69GqnxpdW2y2fRCP1oyfw&sysid=1)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1175%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kw%2fmMc%2bCoPsUD77s31AXQg&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1175%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=kw%2fmMc%2bCoPsUD77s31AXQg&sysid=1)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
I hope you are doing well.

| |
---
| | | Hi Patriot, I hope you are doing well.

Things have been busy in Washington, as I'm sure you've heard. I've been caught up in my work, but my campaign staff has been asking me to reach out to you.

Listen, I can't put this off any longer. **I have to do something I hate.** But before I tell you what that is, I have one request; _please read this email all the way through._

Here it is: **[I've got to ask you for a small contribution. If you're in a tough spot financially, I'll understand if you can't spare the money.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62776445:JmtnUmIRN:m:1:3299561967:D11F5CCD47B194C588FB4B4495C7E5E3:r "I've got to ask
you for a small donation. If you're in a tough spot financially, I'll understand if you can't spare the money.")**

I'm one of Democrats' **TOP** targets in 2024. They hate that I flipped a seat they'd held for _over two decades_ , and even more than that, **they _HATE_ that I'm a true and honest conservative.**

I hate asking folks like you for money like this, I'm sure you think there are better things you could spend it on. That money could get you some coffee or pizza or maybe enough gas in the tank to give you some peace of mind on your ride home.

**These are things I want too, but today, I 'm asking you to help me and my Republican colleagues hold the line in the House.**
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE TO DEFEND DERRICK](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62776445:JmtnUmIRN:m:1:3299561967:D11F5CCD47B194C588FB4B4495C7E5E3:r "CONTRIBUTE TO DEFEND DERRICK")
---
Thanks for reading this message. Even if you decide not to chip in, I really appreciate you giving me the time today.

-DVO
---

* * *
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62776444:JmtnUmIRN:m:1:3299561967:D11F5CCD47B194C588FB4B4495C7E5E3:r)
---

My story is simple. I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. At 18, I joined the Navy. After 26 years of service and 5 combat tours, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. Now, I'm serving as a first-term Congressman for Wisconsin's 3rd District.

I'm not a swamp-dwelling politician - I don't have support from mega-donors or Super PACs. I'm just like you - **a concerned American who loves this nation and will always do the right thing.**

**[The Democrats are going at me with everything they've got, and I'll need all the help I can get to protect this seat. If you have anything to spare so I can stay on pace with the Democrats, I'd be so appreciative of whatever you can chip in:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62776444:JmtnUmIRN:m:1:3299561967:D11F5CCD47B194C588FB4B4495C7E5E3:r "The Democrats
are going at me with everything they’ve got, and I’ll need all the help I can get to protect this seat. If you have anything to spare so I
can stay on pace with the Dems, I’d be so appreciative of whatever you can chip in:")**
| [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62776444:JmtnUmIRN:m:1:3299561967:D11F5CCD47B194C588FB4B4495C7E5E3:r "DONATE NOW")
---

Thank you and God Bless,

Derrick Van Orden

body:
just when we thought it couldn't get worse.
| | President Biden is under full MAGA ATTACK — **Marjorie Taylor Greene just filed IMPEACHMENT articles against him!**

[50,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Sign our EMERGENCY petition to show President Biden we stand with him »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230605_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=8151%2E878179%2EAQXLvt) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden?refcode=VPP_20230605_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=8151%2E878179%2EAQXLvt) | [**SIGN NOW: STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN AGAINST BASELESS REPUBLICAN ATTACKS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230605_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=8151%2E878179%2EAQXLvt)
---
Marjorie Taylor Greene is a traitor, far-right extremist, and total DISGRACE.

And now, she’s doing everything she can to TANK Biden’s approval rating... _right as the presidential race is heating up!_

**Don’t abandon President Biden when he needs us most.**

[We need 50,000 signatures by tomorrow to show Democrats EVERYWHERE stand with President Biden »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230605_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=8151%2E878179%2EAQXLvt)
[**SIGN NOW: STAND WITH PRESIDENT BIDEN AGAINST BASELESS REPUBLICAN ATTACKS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Stand_with_President_Biden/?source=VPP_20230605_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=8151%2E878179%2EAQXLvt)
---
This is too urgent to ignore,

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8151%2E878179%2EAQXLvt). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8151%2E878179%2EAQXLvt).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=8151%2E878179%2EAQXLvt) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=8151%2E878179%2EAQXLvt). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=8151%2E878179%2EAQXLvt)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=8151%2E878179%2EAQXLvt)

Fellow American, I intend to have a prime spot on the debate stage for the first Presidential debate in August.

I intend to elevate the debate process for the 2024 presidential primary.

I have officially qualified for the debate but we cannot afford to slow down. I also want to make sure I have a front and center spot in August. We need to continue to secure unique grassroots donations to discuss how to actually *FIX* our country.

**[Please take 90 seconds to watch my latest "DEBATE ME" Video ⬇️⬇️](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=351f194d5eaa4579b21e36b7e30f92b4&_e=YPiFyRs0VqEIo8l9P7FUL0EAcSuZz8wxwH-WinOFNSjQ_DyFtAWV2CBJxf9-JW-llK5O_D0H0P2b1uehe6IjdXYMo1MmeFmLB0pqRJEq68KR_IgyMH1EoMoDiAwUmG63JTE8TQn-ajKgpoJnu7AvohR8p9ZOUXA9xtwqqZwUiDBfSrKCDndNmMO8X95TjeYeeUU-GcyS_kvPkW9_bciGkjZ3jXr_lkhkhR6IffgbYgKrpm3PvUoOxnYR1SLItW-R7foz8pW08tWeswc2vOlTN6xmluLere1czeVXvvocEoYdvm_8tIh7_EeWuNvMDgMNegvARSLKrMGlLFuzOlbtB2BMW-Ui4LjcrcdqfEKf2yQTHQWm4rL7MxNAIS7DJss7-a5dMzdLXVZGtXhxwvv-cg%3D%3D)**

It's going to take radical new ideas to put America back on track - and that's ok. We won't deliver national unity by standing in the proverbial "middle," singing kumbaya and compromising. It's by embracing the radicalism of the ideals that birthed America in 1776.

**[Just one dollar (or more) will help us drive forward and get our ideas a prominent spot on the debate stage.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=351f194d5eaa4579b21e36b7e30f92b4&_e=YPiFyRs0VqEIo8l9P7FUL0EAcSuZz8wxwH-WinOFNSjQ_DyFtAWV2CBJxf9-JW-llK5O_D0H0P2b1uehe6IjdXYMo1MmeFmLB0pqRJEq68KR_IgyMH1EoMoDiAwUmG63JTE8TQn-ajKgpoJnu7AvohR8p9ZOUXA9xtwqqZwUiDBfSrKCDndNmMO8X95TjeYeeUU-GcyS_kvPkW9_bciGkjZ3jXr_lkhkhR6IffgbYgKrpm3PvUoOxnYR1SLItW-R0lSnWFsxuVY4jRkm2L-h5LVb2VscNA2zyG7kK0Y84eriNzaFH3c3mgcrNUkE2Of0-tgthRYD_L8JKU5Kf9hBkVSNqODQfcl1tYU2wAagyoV7QJekoBLW6QbRK5-4q5aPlv8kVrW9VzoI_ngn-FcMTw%3D%3D)**

Fellow American, it's a cornerstone of my campaign strategy to debate ANYONE, ANYWHERE, ANYTIME. **If you are afraid to take the debate to MSNBC or CNN,_how are you going to take on Xi Jinping?_**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I am ready to elevate the debate process for the 2024 presidential primary. | | Fellow American, I intend to have a prime spot on the debate stage for the first Presidential debate in August. I intend to elevate the debate process for the 2024 presidential primary. I have officially qualified for the debate but we cannot afford to slow down. I also want to make sure I have a front and center spot in August. We need to continue to secure unique grassroots donations to discuss how to actually FIX our country. It's going to take radical new ideas to put America back on track - and that's ok. We won't deliver national unity by standing in the proverbial "middle," singing kumbaya and compromising. It's by embracing the radicalism of the ideals that birthed America in 1776. Fellow American, it's a cornerstone of my campaign strategy to debate ANYONE, ANYWHERE, ANYTIME. If you are afraid to take the debate to MSNBC or CNN,how are you going to take on Xi Jinping? It's my goal that as many folks as possible see this video and we continue to grow our unique grassroots donor army. name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: Will you take our June Priorities Survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
We know it’s hard to believe, but we are nearly halfway through 2023.
We last reached out with a priorities survey in January, and a lot has changed since then in our movement to end gun violence. We’ve experienced some notable wins in states like Michigan and Minnesota. These are both states with governors who had the courage to sign background checks and extreme risk protection orders into law.
But we’ve also experienced some devastating lows in states like Florida, where Governor Ron DeSantis signed permitless carry into law.
Our work to end gun violence is far from over, and we depend on folks like you sharing their priorities to let us know where we should be focusing our efforts.
[**As we enter the second half of this year, will you share your top gun safety priorities with us by taking our June Gun Safety Priorities Survey?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/jun23-priorities-sv/?source=em230605-1-subs&refcode2=5909.3935704.XduVBL&akid=5909%2E3935704%2EXduVBL)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/jun23-priorities-sv/?source=em230605-1-subs&refcode2=5909.3935704.XduVBL&akid=5909%2E3935704%2EXduVBL)**
Our work is only possible through supporters like you—the people who care about commonsense gun safety legislation. That’s why your opinions matter so much to us.
So please, use this link to take our June Gun Safety Priorities Survey today:
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/June-2023-Priorities**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/jun23-priorities-sv/?source=em230605-1-subs&refcode2=5909.3935704.XduVBL&akid=5909%2E3935704%2EXduVBL)
Thank you so much for taking the time to complete our survey. We really value your input.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=5909%2E3935704%2EXduVBL) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: MAGA Republicans banning everything but guns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stop Gun Violence PAC
body:
There is a clear solution to end our gun violence epidemic, but instead of banning assault weapons, Republicans are choosing to ban:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64351851/409810391/2040588333?refcode=BLU-SGV-20230605-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWIwNjZhOTctYWYwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jpNRwkmykarpf3gxBU0XC4ItuOWyZwDgoFEzqZupIhM=)
---
| Peter,

MAGA Republicans are unrelenting in pushing their “guns everywhere” agenda.

There is a clear solution to our gun violence epidemic, but instead of banning assault weapons, **Republicans are choosing to:**

✔️ **BAN** books
✔️ **BAN** drag shows
✔️ **ATTACK** the LGBTQ+ community
---
| [FIGHT BACK ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64351852/409810392/2040588333?refcode=BLU-SGV-20230605-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWIwNjZhOTctYWYwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jpNRwkmykarpf3gxBU0XC4ItuOWyZwDgoFEzqZupIhM=)
---
If MAGA Republicans were serious about saving lives, we would see a concerted effort to pass an assault weapons ban.

body:
Chip in to the VoteVets Patriot Fund to hold the Senate
#
Derek,
We’ll be blunt: National security AND abortion access are under siege right now. If you’ve got a minute, let us explain.
Alabama Senator Tommy Tuberville is holding up nearly 200 Military promotions. These are generals and flag officers — critical, senior leaders. All over a Pentagon policy that covers travel costs for service members who have to leave states like Alabama to have an abortion.
Most people thought Tuberville would let this go, but he hasn’t. And every day he continues is a day that Republicans grow bolder. We all know their goal is to ban abortion entirely.
But now they’re threatening our national defense by delaying these promotions. And worse, their efforts to deny our women Servicemembers critical health care undermines Military readiness. That puts us all at risk.
If the GOP gets a majority in the Senate, there’s no telling just how extreme they’ll be in attacking our Military and our abortion rights. Remember: Our Democratic majority comes down to just ONE SEAT.
And Derek, we’re on defense in every competitive race in the country next year. There is no margin for error.
We launched the VOTEVETS 2024 PATRIOT FUND to kick-start our efforts in competitive Senate races around the country when Tuberville first blocked these promotions. And we’re ready to fight like hell.

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: See the evidence for yourself
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70664%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WXF5k4TEjrvtnyDLprV6jQ&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70675%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bObmU0dWnN07LtjtNrbGKA&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70664%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WXF5k4TEjrvtnyDLprV6jQ&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70676%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E0E%2f7dbMfp%2fCoNILIGemkA&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70664%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WXF5k4TEjrvtnyDLprV6jQ&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70677%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kIS8kg1BawIhGLd0HjLCDg&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70678%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tofdm6wL6dVgH0Jb63YowQ&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70679%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=88tTGNLV7kgiAzS4Dg%2fvsQ&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Great American Update

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Talking won’t cut it. Here are the actions we took last month.
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013vrucdYNvjVM9CC-A-AR9nF5hjUDjiAr2KEmaI6cMoeCQ5giLcah-oH8FG7Z4ZCWN4JuEBwKJY-G89VZjUbavLZ87AZh-jbBWD3POZiA-bOU0CpmDjnHEp9wGnB5jAa900UWzthpt6msfD3r03HfZXUOOmOe-XEsEA6sD1gUI97zDCN-cTa5rlRjcYzxfZ_kmMB-XsNH5QEVDme0SyxSsQ==&c=RxFrwTyHXpLxKMVy7RkhlIi3-aKE6hGeZnDCzo89dpslB8MG02j3MQ==&ch=C-PZSIjoKGGo1p2alkz1aGnFsrWd9Ka-Xicmu4USenNK5o2yf73mQQ==)
---
| Friend
Growing up on a cattle ranch teaches you a lot about grit.
Losing that ranch to liberal policies and having to bounce back from homelessness? That teaches you even more.
One of the things you learn is that complaining about your problems gets you nowhere in the end. It's what you DO to fix those problems and get yourself out of challenging situations that really matter.
So with our nation facing challenges and uncertainty right now with failed Democrat leaders in charge like Joe Biden, I'm not just TALKING about the problems - I'm taking ACTION.
Check out just some of those actions I took last month in Congress to push back on the radical, far-left, Big Government politicians that are hurting the country we love!
🇨🇳 Continued my fight to hold the Chinese Communist Party and the CCP-owned Big Tech company TikTok accountable when Democrats won't!
🚨 Fought alongside my House Republican colleagues for border security in the wake of Title 42 expiring and homeless veterans being kicked to the curb to make room for illegal immigrants!
📣 Exposed overreach and government weaponization against its citizens, including shedding light on the Democrats trying to VILIFY FBI whistleblowers!
✅ And MORE!
---

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Tell Congress: Pass Medicare for All!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Illness and injury are part of life. So why, in one of the wealthiest countries in the world, are many people still having to choose between foregoing medical care or going bankrupt?

Healthcare is a human right, not a privilege. That’s why I’m fighting like hell for Medicare for All. It is the only way we can be sure that every American has access to quality healthcare.

Tell Congress: Pass Medicare for All! [https://passmedicareforallnow.org/?source=partner-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fnnu-medicare-for-all-petition-swap]

My House colleagues Reps. Pramila Jayapal and Debbie Dingell, as well as Senator Bernie Sanders, have just reintroduced Medicare for All in Congress. At a time when so many Americans are struggling to make ends meet, we must take full advantage of this opportunity to help working families and small businesses save thousands of dollars a year.

Access to health care should never be determined by employment, wealth, or status. Tell Congress to support the Medicare for All Act of 2023 and ensure that every person is guaranteed quality health care. [https://passmedicareforallnow.org/?source=partner-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fnnu-medicare-for-all-petition-swap]

In solidarity,
Ro

name: Hearing Aid Advice
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade yet...
body:
| [ ](https://www.hearing-aid-advice.com/d/best_hearing_aids_aff02/?act=ACT0000053402ACT&utm_source=tma&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=us_en_al_haa_affiliate_tma_haa-ax-double_starboard_ftd_t2_0_ACT0000053402ACT&utm_publisher_id=Starboard&sub_id=FreeThinkerDaily)
---
| 2 Germans are crushing the market with these powerful hearing aids
---
[ ](https://www.hearing-aid-advice.com/d/best_hearing_aids_aff02/?act=ACT0000053402ACT&utm_source=tma&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=us_en_al_haa_affiliate_tma_haa-ax-double_starboard_ftd_t2_0_ACT0000053402ACT&utm_publisher_id=Starboard&sub_id=FreeThinkerDaily)
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://www.hearing-aid-advice.com/d/best_hearing_aids_aff02/?act=ACT0000053402ACT&utm_source=tma&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=us_en_al_haa_affiliate_tma_haa-ax-double_starboard_ftd_t2_0_ACT0000053402ACT&utm_publisher_id=Starboard&sub_id=FreeThinkerDaily)
[ ](https://www.hearing-aid-advice.com/d/best_hearing_aids_aff02/?act=ACT0000053402ACT&utm_source=tma&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=us_en_al_haa_affiliate_tma_haa-ax-double_starboard_ftd_t2_0_ACT0000053402ACT&utm_publisher_id=Starboard&sub_id=FreeThinkerDaily)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://www.hearing-aid-advice.com/d/best_hearing_aids_aff02/?act=ACT0000053402ACT&utm_source=tma&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=us_en_al_haa_affiliate_tma_haa-ax-double_starboard_ftd_t2_0_ACT0000053402ACT&utm_publisher_id=Starboard&sub_id=FreeThinkerDaily)

---

---
I first became active in politics because of the assault on women’s sports and women’s spaces. As a D1 swimmer for the University of Kentucky who was forced to compete against biological males, and even share locker rooms with men, I felt like our elected leaders had abandoned us — until Governor Ron DeSantis.
---
| [](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/KmC1CJcQQeeGWn2_LH3l0A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRmYIZwP0UgMTY2YWM5ZGI2MWUxOGYyNzI0OTQ3Y2ViMGE4MmY4NjdEt2h0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZGVzYW50aXMvZ3JlYXQtYW1lcmljYW4tY29tZWJhY2stYXY_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1oc19zZiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtX3AmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMtMDYtMDNfcmlsZXlnYWluZXNlbmRvcnNlbWVudGFkdmljX2hhX2F1ZDAwMTdfZW0wMDM5X2xwMDAzNV9yaWdfMTgwODFfblcFc3BjZXVCCmR0cAF-ZPDZUa9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAFkm)
---
Governor DeSantis shined a spotlight on the cruelty girls and women were being subjected to, and even went as far as to reinstate victories of women who had lost titles and sacrificed their athletic careers because of these men competing in our leagues... and for that, he was ripped apart in the media. But Governor DeSantis did NOT back down.

I want someone like that in the White House — someone who will fight for us. Governor Ron DeSantis’ record is simply second to none. That’s just who the Governor is. He’s taken on the political establishment, woke corporations, and legacy media — and he’s won.

There’s only one candidate in this race who has truly walked the walk rather than just offered soundbites on these issues — and that’s Governor Ron DeSantis. It’s an easy choice.

In a moment when everything in our culture feels like it’s upside down, that’s the kind of strength we need in the White House to put us back on the right track.

In America today, sanity is in short supply, and common sense has become an uncommon virtue — but Governor Ron DeSantis has proven with his leadership that he can put an end to these woke Olympics, and I can’t wait.
---

name: Our Revolution
subject: If we lose just one Senate race in VA, the state could be lost to fascism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

Republican fascism is the greatest threat to
our safety, and Our Revolution is doing everything possible to stop it
before it leads to unimaginable pain.

That means standing up to weaponized hatred at both a federal and state
level, and on June 20th, we have a chance to reverse the Glenn Youngkin
led fascist backsliding in Virginia.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8681?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230605_FR_FightFascismFund_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_FightFascismFund&t=1009&akid=4344%2E5885482%2EzEontm ]Democrats only control the State Senate by 1 seat and are just 5 seats
away from taking back the House of Delegates. Can we count on you to rush
a donation to help us defeat fascism in Virginia?

subject: Exposing the Great Reset
body:
This is one of my biggest fights yet

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcs01q8m955ul6k0dhcaqhh36np0k3chuc643c98_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjie2pb4cjh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9hajvrbl5m8dh8m7vl4b9de7liban7l645pcr08_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjie2pb4cjh2bs)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just five dollars!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0n03e3d7l3htkqe60m2s4ogqpr4jucfrnboip00_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjie2pb4cjh2bs)

---
I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsuhfpdonngdbcrftnbanr717st5qr2ih9cod3r0_rp22sh2s8i66o75cjie2pb4cjh2bs)

Dear Friends,

We need your help on Election Day. [Sign now to work a 2 or 3 hour shift](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com) at your home voting location.

We all know that there is the possibility of election integrity issues on Election Day, but there will be no room for shenanigans if our team has coverage everywhere.

And I'll be out walking every day this week and I need volunteers to join me. Sign up today for an afternoon shift, [chris@chaseforva.com](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com).

Come visit our office this week to help with mail projects, phone calls, or door-to-door.

Sign up now, we need your help.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

**FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ** Dear Fellow American, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. **The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.** Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. **The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. **[I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. ](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTU2LTQ2NWEwOTNjNjAwMjRkOTA5OTlkMDE0YjExYTRkNDViIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9TExPMzk2NzEifQ/uvAcB62vVwP_9DxZJHs06Q)**
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTU2LTQ2NWEwOTNjNjAwMjRkOTA5OTlkMDE0YjExYTRkNDViIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9TExPMzk2NzEifQ/DR2cUbsw8L3YvkGI9AtYYw)
---
Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

**Alan Dershowitz** Columnist, The New York Sun

name: James Carville
subject: The GOP's war on LGBTQ+ rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
**Friend, it's officially Pride Month! It pains me to say that even in 2023, the Republican Party is waging an all-out war against the fundamental rights of LGBTQ+ folks. **
Just look at Florida, where Ron DeSantis passed that horrible "Don't Say Gay" bill, censoring what teachers speak about with their students.
Or look at Texas, which is striving to keep transgender kids from receiving the health care they need.
Or at Tennessee, which passed a law BANNING drag performances in public spaces!
Friend, this is just the tip of the iceberg – **Republicans are dead set on taking AWAY rights from the LGBTQ+ community, putting them in danger and preventing them from living freely.**
Honestly, I've had it up to HERE with their hateful agenda. We need them OUT in 2024, but to do that, we Democrats need to get our act together. **[I've put together a survey to find out what top Democrats like you think need to happen, friend, but I'm still missing your response – please, will you just take a minute so I can hear from ya?>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64355993/409828150/129510396?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2680-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiMjc1NGNhLWJhMDMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k_yicf66nveRz3aHjs3kYWJHjtLj0y-yZI2Y9SByux8=&emci=0c660093-8701-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=cb2754ca-ba03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=23124236)**
I'm standing by – thanks.

—Carville
| | | | |
---
| | | | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf99e26bb-715e-4c6b-b67c-be22a424d52a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Your America
subject: IRS loophole allows ANYONE to collect up to $28,544 before June 13
body:
Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole...

| **“Amazon Loophole” could hand you $28,544 in “royalty” payouts** [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25753%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z3vi8so1vGXB2tVgPLmanA&sysid=1) Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole... Regular Americans can **collect up to $28,544 (or more)** in payouts from what Brad Thomas calls the “Amazon secret royalty program...” And the best part is, there are:
* NO age or income requirements... (It’s available to anyone 18+ or older)
* NO employment requirements... (You can be working part-time, full-time, or even be retired)
* And you NEVER have to shop or sell a single product on Amazon... (It only takes 5 minutes to set up!)

See how to collect the next payout before the strict cutoff deadline. **[Watch short video now.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25754%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GtlLppNWWPk9QZqORqrn1w&sysid=1)**

name: Future Forum PAC
subject: Defeating homophobia
disclaimer_text: Paid For By The Future Forum Political Action Committee And Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee
body:
Last cycle, we defeated homophobia at the ballot box.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-header-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-header-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-graphic-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-graphic-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]Peter: Last cycle, we defeated homophobia at the ballot box.
In California , we elected Robert Garcia – the first out LGBTQ+ immigrant ever to serve the state in Congress. His opponent had a sordid history of anti-LGBTQ+ rhetoric.
In Illinois , Eric Sorensen faced an extremely conservative opponent in a toss up race. Despite this, we helped him win an open seat for Democrats, making him the first openly gay man to represent Illinois in Congress.
And in New Hampshire, Kansas, and Minnesota , we re-elected Future Forum Incumbents Chris Pappas, Sharice Davids, and Angie Craig – helping each of them defeat their anti-choice and anti-LGBTQ opponents.
Last cycle, Future Forum PAC defeated some of the GOP’s most extreme and hateful candidates while electing more openly LGBTQ+ Democrats to Congress than ever before. In honor of Pride Month, will you donate $5 or more to help us build on our progress and re-elect these LGBTQ+ Future Forum Democrats in 2024? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?express_lane=true&refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5] $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?express_lane=true&refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10]
$15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?express_lane=true&refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?express_lane=true&refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
$50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?express_lane=true&refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=50] More [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?express_lane=true&refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=other]
Already this year, there have been nearly 500 anti-LGBTQ+ bills introduced in state legislatures across the country, criminalizing everything from gender-affirming care for trans kids to drag shows in public places.
This is a code-red moment for LGBTQ+ rights nationwide. We must put a firewall between these restrictive bills and our most fundamental freedoms – which starts with electing and reelecting Future Forum Democrats fighting to stop the ongoing wave of anti-LGBTQ+ hate.
Please help us kick off Pride Month with a $5 contribution to support the Future Forum LGBTQ+ Trailblazers fighting to defend our freedoms in Washington. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/FFPACUS-ALL-Email-June2023-FR-June?refcode=E21646-20230605-Pride-SB-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]
Thank you,
Futute Forum PAC
https://www.facebook.com/FutureForumPAC/ [https://www.facebook.com/FutureForumPAC/] https://twitter.com/futureforumpac [https://twitter.com/futureforumpac]
Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young democratic members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. Will you help protect our progress in Congress by making a contribution today? As we move closer to the important August 8 primary vote I hope you are taking this election seriously. During my eight years in the Mississippi legislature I've come to know many of those seeking office. While I've made the decision to return to normal life I am glad to know there are patriots among us willing to continue the fight from within the belly of the beast.
It takes an extremely well grounded and confident person to withstand the pressures a newly elected legislator will face. Which is why it is so important that we choose strong, principled men and women to represent us in government.
Here is my list of candidates from around the state that need your support both financially and on election day.
1. [Lauren Smith](https://substack.com/redirect/4ff1c782-30b2-4e65-967d-43bdf3ba1ce0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -Senate District 6
[Donate to Lauren](https://substack.com/redirect/54554524-67c8-413b-afd3-ebd4509548b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
2. [Walter Hopper](https://substack.com/redirect/102eea6d-516d-44ec-9cc9-b181af22710d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -Senate District 19
[Donate to Walter](https://substack.com/redirect/0a460bdc-8716-4466-85ee-aee210fde9c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
3. [Alan Sibley](https://substack.com/redirect/2da5867b-19b8-4570-86b6-d41ad4087f61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -Senate District 15
[Donate to Alan](https://substack.com/redirect/4c7684be-0796-4899-8b50-8e7db14f9f17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
4. [Ricky Caldwell](https://substack.com/redirect/8d570c1c-089a-45fa-bcce-2224bf108b92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -Senate District 9
[Donate to Ricky](https://substack.com/redirect/713f1638-6f61-4400-9480-2ce65cef1d9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
5. [John T. Williams](https://substack.com/redirect/29bb9be1-c57d-43a1-bbee-f4048ca491e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -House District 28
[Donate to John](https://substack.com/redirect/656b92b2-70b2-4e7c-9291-d258a36a552a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
6. [Jamey Goodkind](https://substack.com/redirect/978b1367-e6a4-44e1-900c-061ea7eb971b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-House District 7

name: Attorney General Kris Mayes
subject: proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060523_KrisMayes_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060523_KrisMayes_act]
Hi there — it's Attorney General Kris Mayes.
Last year, I became the first Democrat elected Attorney General in Arizona in more than a decade. Our platform was simple: we put the concerns of Arizonans front and center.
Since I took office, I've fought to protect our water supply, voting rights, and access to safe and legal abortion services.
Arizona needs leaders who will work tirelessly to address these issues. That's why today I'm proud to endorse Kirsten Engel.
Kirsten is running in an incredibly tough district. I speak from experience when I say that strong grassroots support can make ALL the difference in a race like this. Will you chip in to support her race now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060523_KrisMayes_act]

That's why today I'm proud to endorse Kirsten Engel. Kirsten is running in an incredibly tough district. **I’m here to tell you that couldn’t be farther from the truth.**

_As the great-great-grandson of a slave who became a United States Congressman in a white majority district, I am living proof that Biden’s claims are false._

That’s why I went onto _The Benny Show_ to discuss these disgusting attacks on conservatives from this administration and the lies Biden spouts as he tries to win re-election.

Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited.
