clean_body: When all else fails they always pull out the race card... | Friend, The Biden Administration is in trouble for 2024 and they’ve gone to their usual playbook – playing the race card: (Source: The Washington Post) They are digging their heels in with “our country is systemically racist” and “you can’t do anything if you’re a person of color.” I’m here to tell you that couldn’t be farther from the truth. As the great-great-grandson of a slave who became a United States Congressman in a white majority district, I am living proof that Biden’s claims are false. That’s why I went onto The Benny Show to discuss these disgusting attacks on conservatives from this administration and the lies Biden spouts as he tries to win re-election. Biden is choosing to ignore the real threats to our country, such as our failing economy or his open-border policies that put our national security at risk. Instead, he is name-calling and accusing conservative Americans like you and me of being terrorists in his desperate attempt to regain the votes they’ve lost with their failed agenda. As an Apache helicopter pilot who was deployed to Iraq, I know what terrorists look like. And I can assure you that people that just care about our country, don’t want the FBI spying on them, and don’t want the government infringing on our constitutional rights are NOT terrorists. We will be the ones who stop the Left’s destruction of this country and Save America. This administration has been a failure since Biden’s first day in office. And now, 2.5 years later, polling shows how unsuccessful of a leader Biden has been. Only 33% of Americans say they approve of his handling of the economy, and only 31% approve of Biden’s performance on issues such as gun policy and immigration, not to mention his overall approval rating is a measly 40%. With a trail of failed policies and low approval ratings behind him, it’s no wonder he’s resorting to the Left’s go-to accusations while trying to gain votes and support. Joe Biden ALWAYS turns to race rather than accept responsibility for his failings. But we are speaking up and fighting back against his failed agenda and his lying accusations and attacks against the American people. We will take this country back and expose Biden and the Left for who they are, people who will destroy the very fabric of America. With my army of America First patriots alongside me, we won’t let that happen. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Congressman (TX-38) U.S. Army Captain Paid for by Hunt for Congress. body:

Once again, Peter, Team DeSantis is focused on real American priorities. Distraction tactics will never derail us.

We're running a transparent campaign here. You can rest assured we'll continue sending you media updates about our campaign—no matter how low they choose to stoop.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=80983b614532609904a402332408da6ff329b2f3382bd39e4d7534eff533032cc976cfff63d9a9c7f6f0e6b3c539cc45976236c1b023cdfa89eb716adba494f4
GET YOUR QUARTER-ZIP HERE!

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

P.S. Want a piece of the "Where Woke Goes to Die" merch?
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=80983b614532609924ebf95d24dc2f0cb0744d1bb199d1bcb1bbaab1bce7951bae58144374f43f243862661602116bfaf86381a14190fdb9e7f56f46adf8cf40
We can help with that.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=80983b61453260994e7212d7410ef53bc471878236b6463d9ca13bf0dd3d6743dadcf49f7a5bbe6eefa128863c17d26bbe571e46cb698552ac0f89ed3676c1b7
Sign up here!

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=80983b614532609904a402332408da6ff329b2f3382bd39e4d7534eff533032cc976cfff63d9a9c7f6f0e6b3c539cc45976236c1b023cdfa89eb716adba494f4

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
-
Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
-
Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
-
Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
-
Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
-
Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
-
Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
-
Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
-
Protecting the unborn,
-
Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
-
Expanding education freedom,
-
Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
-
Lowering prescription drug costs,
-
Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
-
Creating a universal school choice program,
-
Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
-
Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
-
Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
-
Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
-
Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
-
...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
-
Record tax relief
-
ESG prohibitions
-
Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
-
The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
-
Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
-
Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
-
Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
-
Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
-
The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
-
Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions
-
Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida
No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Peter, While First Lady Casey DeSantis hits the campaign trail with Governor DeSantis, spreading the message of our Great American Comeback and inspiring crowds to fight for a future where freedom prevails... she's getting attacked for her fashion choices by the corporate, legacy media. Once again, Peter, Team DeSantis is focused on real American priorities. Distraction tactics will never derail us. We're running a transparent campaign here. You can rest assured we'll continue sending you media updates about our campaign—no matter how low they choose to stoop. GET YOUR QUARTER-ZIP HERE! In Freedom, Team DeSantis P.S. Want a piece of the "Where Woke Goes to Die" merch? We can help with that. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: - Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, - Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, - Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, - Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, - Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, - Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, - Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, - Protecting the unborn, - Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, - Expanding education freedom, - Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, - Lowering prescription drug costs, - Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, - Creating a universal school choice program, - Delivering record-breaking tax relief, - Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, - Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, - Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, - Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, - ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn’t stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.” Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: - Record tax relief - ESG prohibitions - Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP - The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. - Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency - Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI - Improvements to our state’s infrastructure - Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists - The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis - Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions - Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

subject: You've been selected → June Issues Survey

body:
Hearing directly from our supporters is critical to Ilhan's work fighting for our shared progressive values every day in Congress.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=230%2E791427%2EPprTSL)
You may have noticed that from time to time, Ilhan likes us to check in with our supporters directly to ask a simple question: **_What are the issues you care about most?**_
It's been a couple of months since we last reached out to ask, and we're hoping for a LOT of responses to today's survey. Can we count on your response?
[**Use this link to take our official Team Ilhan June Issues Survey. It should only take a minute or two of your time, but any input you have is so valuable to our campaign.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em230605-issue-survey/?source=em230605-1-t2&refcode2=230.791427.PprTSL&akid=230%2E791427%2EPprTSL)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em230605-issue-survey/?source=em230605-1-t2&refcode2=230.791427.PprTSL&akid=230%2E791427%2EPprTSL)**
Believe it or not, the responses to these surveys change all the time, and it's your answers that allow us to get a better read on where our movement's priorities lie at any given moment.
The more responses we receive, the better Ilhan is able to continue fighting for our shared progressive values in Congress.
That's because whether it's Medicare for All, combating the climate crisis, ending endless wars or something else entirely — it's the issues and our supporters that make our progressive movement so special.
**So please, let us know what you think by taking today's survey. It shouldn't take more than a minute or two of your time.**
[**https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/June-Issues-Survey](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em230605-issue-survey/?source=em230605-1-t2&refcode2=230.791427.PprTSL&akid=230%2E791427%2EPprTSL)**
We'll be reviewing the results later on this week, so thank you in advance for your response.
\- Team Ilhan
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em230605-issue-survey/?source=em230605-1-t2&refcode2=230.791427.PprTSL&akid=230%2E791427%2EPprTSL)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=230%2E791427%2EPprTSL)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=230%2E791427%2EPprTSL)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=230%2E791427%2EPprTSL)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=230_791427_PprTSL&akid=230%2E791427%2EPprTSL)**.

Washington D.C., 20033

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will you pledge to be a servant leader for our great nation?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
| | | [](http://trk.readactnews._KJN2PWoRVhGdSQ)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

As you and I know – our freedoms are under attack.

They are under attack from our fellow citizens who see this country and her people as irredeemable.

They are under attack from leaders in government, media, and education who serve only one interest: their own interest.[](http://trk.readactnews.)
These people hold the most dangerous, most extreme, most anti-American beliefs. They have taken more-and-more power away from the people... they are asserting more-and-more control over us.

They tax us, they regulate us, they silence us, they punish us, they remove opportunities from us, they weaken us, and they indoctrinate our children.

It is up to us to rise above as servant leaders committed to upholding the principles that inspired America.

We must set an example as faithful leaders and unite our fellow Americans in an effort to preserve our freedom.

We must be willing to sacrifice, to fight for our freedoms, to not just envision – but to ensure – a strong, prosperous, great America for our grandchildren.

Because if not us, then who will do it? Who will lead?

Today, I’m hoping that you’ll pledge your commitment as a servant leader for our great nation.

If you’re up to the challenge to help preserve our founding principles and lead our country in the direction of freedom, please sign the pledge via this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/servant-leader-card-pledge/](http://trk.readactnews.)

It’s your sweat, your sacrifice, and your service to others, and to God that inspire me day after day. This effort will return our country to its beacon of hope and freedom.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chariman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

name: Bob Casey
subject: The map is back and it’s better (and bigger) than ever
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=120%2E552475%2EP3MGPy)
Peter, you know I enjoy a good map.
It all started in November 2020. As we fought to make sure every vote was counted in the presidential election between Joe Biden and Donald Trump, I spent a week in front of my map of Pennsylvania breaking down what was happening. I posted dozens of videos sharing information about the election process and walking through the results county by county.
And yes, I even cracked open a Victory Brewing HopDevil IPA once it was a wrap for Joe Biden.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230605-1?refcode=em20230605-1&refcode2=120_552475_P3MGPy&akid=120%2E552475%2EP3MGPy)
Two years later, I pulled out the map again. On Election Day in 2022, I broke down Pennsylvania’s vote tallies until my friends Senator John Fetterman and Governor Josh Shapiro officially won their historic victories.
That brings us to today. We’re approaching 2024, and it’s our own Senate race that’s shaping up to be one of the country’s most expensive and competitive battlegrounds.
**So the map is back — and it’s better (and bigger) than ever.**
**Our goal is to cover our new map of Pennsylvania from top to bottom with the names of supporters like you** — because grassroots donors will make all the difference in our fight to defend Pennsylvania’s seat and hold our Senate majority.
**[Will you be one of the first supporters to stake your spot on the map? Donate any amount right now, and my team will add your name.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230605-1?refcode=em20230605-1&refcode2=120_552475_P3MGPy&akid=120%2E552475%2EP3MGPy)**
**[Get On The Map ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230605-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230605-1&refcode2=120_552475_P3MGPy&akid=120%2E552475%2EP3MGPy)**
We’re going to hang this map up in our campaign office and add names until we run out of room.
**Then, when we defend this seat next November, I will be able to look at this map and know you were a part of this team right from the start.**
The fact is that we’ve got a long road ahead to victory next November, Peter, and I can’t travel that road alone. National Republicans are going to spend millions on attack ads, and we need to build up grassroots resources to fight back.
**[Will you chip in to get your name on the map today? Donate any amount now so we can start filling this map with names from Erie County to Bucks County.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230605-1?refcode=em20230605-1&refcode2=120_552475_P3MGPy&akid=120%2E552475%2EP3MGPy)**
Let’s make this happen.
Thanks,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=120%2E552475%2EP3MGPy)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=120%2E552475%2EP3MGPy)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Granite Solutions Press
subject: RELEASE: Governor Chris Sununu Not Running for GOP Nomination
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
June 5, 2023
---
| | **CONTACT:** Rep. Joe Sweeneyinfo@GraniteSolutions.org
---
| **Governor Chris Sununu Not Running for President in 2024**
---
**Salem, NH -** Granite Solutions Chairman and State Representative Joe Sweeney (R-Salem) released the following statement after Governor Chris Sununu announced he would not seek the Republican Nomination for President in 2024:

"Governor Chris Sununu shows Republicans how to win in purple states that are becoming harder to win due to petty games & craven personality fights - GOP candidates would be wise to learn from his style & approach if they want to appeal to a broader electorate and win."

###
---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FChrisSununu%2Fstatus%2F1665753510275608578/1/010001888c70007a-2e41ce97-5bb4-4aad-8aa8-a3bcc26d8047-000000/7dnwZDOxxlgHskJGlW11kz35prY=324)

subject: FWD: Invite for Fellow Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Join me and former Congressman Cresent Hardy on June 5th >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7132b203b0bf/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-9585894?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=6ac0e7de2f&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Peter,

Today is the day! I am beyond excited to meet with my fellow patriots to discuss my vision for a brighter, more conservative tomorrow.

While reading over the RSVP list this morning, I saw your name was missing! I want to make sure you have the chance to come to meet with both myself and Former Congressman Hardy._** Please, RSVP at the link below: **_
---
| [RSVP HERE >>](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=b8826e7035&e=273c9a71fb "RSVP HERE >>")
---
| | **\---BEGIN FWD MSG---**

Peter,
---
| I am writing to personally invite you to join me at the Mesquite Meet and Greet on June 5th. This gathering will be a celebration of the patriotic spirit that defines our community and our great state of Nevada.

The Mesquite Meet and Greet will take place at Falcon Ridge Golf Course, located in Mesquite, NV.
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=a649a40729&e=273c9a71fb)
---
|
During the event, I am honored to have Former Congressman Cresent Hardy introduce me. I will share my vision for Nevada's future and the principles that guide me in my campaign. I am also eager to hear your thoughts and ideas as we work together to shape the path forward for our great state and country.

Feel free to bring along your family, friends, and neighbors because, as the saying goes, "united we stand, divided we fall." Together, we'll strengthen the fabric of our community and ignite a spirit of unity that will propel us forward.

---
| [RSVP HERE >>](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=663ea7ce63&e=273c9a71fb "RSVP HERE >>")
---
| Thank you for joining me on my journey for Congress. I look forward to meeting you in person.

For Nevada,

David Flippo, Lt. Col. (USAF Ret.)
Candidate for U.S. Congress, NV-4
[**ElectDavidFlippo.com**](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=a2796f8ede&e=273c9a71fb)

name: Governor Scott Walker
subject: Eleventh Anniversary of the Recall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Eleven years ago today, we became the first Governor in American history to survive a recall election.
| [](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=9aeb9505b139433583ec27751c0971c6&_e=GHHXOxOcaL9rImacTQzAGPGSmm8XnnJlAGIhgfBNUX0XkyNMHLFi-36cr2jTY7ADWQJGqhNzMphO3e7dO7p2NO112U0uGpirpNbYYUK2pfzJQQzHi_PTIy4B9tewcWBwtVRGwBYpYFFmqMOpAm9oSJJp2DK35UBeUK7hSQs9KW0mOOMaNOwnaGVXDH2aT11XxqI78bajDPE9P0ABrSa0EkxaZSwdK0ZYx7ErHbOWVdq0ET4CHJwR56ZmiOWlQe-5eB4WHZBi8LM0Uw6voiOvn424d-NUR07ONKQ7g2fKX7e9KuN-SiMVAEMU71dqWZYu8dOL4USqkoNa5Qqo6Q56ngIIZci-UO1Ay72qq6IhXxc%3D)
---
Friend,
---
First and foremost, thank you. Thank you for staying in the fight and for your ongoing recognition that our state and nation are always worth fighting for and we will not back down!
---
June 5th serves as a reminder of why the battle is so important and the courage required to prevail. Eleven years ago today, we became the first Governor in American history to survive a recall election. Despite all the tactics attempted by the enraged Left, bold conservative leadership prevailed with the help of a massive grassroots army. Wisconsin is better because of it.
---
Together, we empowered local governments with the tools necessary to balance their budgets without the crippling layoffs seen in other states, while lowering taxes, and erasing a $3.6 billion budget deficit. With the courage of supporters like you, we took on the big government special interests and union bosses, put power back into the hands of the hard-working people, and saved taxpayers over $15 billion.
---
[**Today, your support is needed more than ever. Our values, freedoms, and way of life are on the line. The culture war is no longer just fought in Hollywood or on the coasts, it’s now in our own backyards. We must overcome radical indoctrination in our schools, unconstitutional mandates, and out-of-control government overreach.**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=9aeb9505b139433583ec27751c0971c6&_e=GHHXOxOcaL9rImacTQzAGPGSmm8XnnJlAGIhgfBNUX0XkyNMHLFi-36cr2jTY7ADWQJGqhNzMphO3e7dO7p2NO112U0uGpirpNbYYUK2pfzJQQzHi_PTIy4B9tewcWBwtVRGwBYpYFFmqMOpAm9oSJJp2DK35UBeUK7hSQs9KW0mOOMaNOwnaGVXDH2aT11XxqI78bajDPE9P0ABrSa0EjJkVAXze0ybp5V70mPU1xanHi1aUGvqf7I-Duo67HO6GeYTrF2AqTmYrgqvUCZ3g4mb1PEq8WwaxY-qB_wIzwOaO-99uHTbCIy0OMOuQdC3ekewHvo5oEkWipWiShEAPiMhz4xXMt0TqN--XwaGXjo%3D)
---

[MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=9aeb9505b139433583ec27751c0971c6&_e=GHHXOxOcaL9rImacTQzAGPGSmm8XnnJlAGIhgfBNUX0XkyNMHLFi-36cr2jTY7ADWQJGqhNzMphO3e7dO7p2NO112U0uGpirpNbYYUK2pfzJQQzHi_PTIy4B9tewcWBwtVRGwBYpYFFmqMOpAm9oSJJp2DK35UBeUK7hSQs9KW0mOOMaNOwnaGVXDH2aT11XxqI78bajDPE9P0ABrSa0EiOb_Y8rrJGCb4gNL9t99KDb8m_uhI7NfpHJB6wWyCFekxlNM6F0G6LOzMqrqReUrxSZ3wWaZn-yXDzXNpYHWMxm0jIT3omGhGMQYbVwFag7kkqx3uxTM8VR6gbTT4WItUv29jOwhEAOYHKOGsrCxrQ%3D)
---

Recruiting, supporting, and electing principled conservatives to every level of government is more important now than ever, but it can’t be done without your support. Eleven years ago, victory was achieved through the courage of our convictions, and boldness in our fight. These traits must be restored, and it starts with you.
---
Just as we were victorious in the fight 11 years ago, we must stand together today. Tonette and I live in Pewaukee and we are proud to continue the fight for freedom with you.
---
[**Please donate now to save Wisconsin, our culture, and our future.**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=9aeb9505b139433583ec27751c0971c6&_e=GHHXOxOcaL9rImacTQzAGPGSmm8XnnJlAGIhgfBNUX0XkyNMHLFi-36cr2jTY7ADWQJGqhNzMphO3e7dO7p2NO112U0uGpirpNbYYUK2pfzJQQzHi_PTIy4B9tewcWBwtVRGwBYpYFFmqMOpAm9oSJJp2DK35UBeUK7hSQs9KW0mOOMaNOwnaGVXDH2aT11XxqI78bajDPE9P0ABrSa0EhS6yAn-v6eGK-rgDGjqKqJsoz9El7x-wXKtfJ01ebtyOZyxHdZYHo-gisoeUW3QxKNydKhJJ-XKyn17FXk7znNay2al_QizkRGIgYWnV0StH-s4DbP2YP5x3DJNrysfOycMhvzAG4BT2UNDGJq0Bqo%3D)
---
Thank you!
---
[](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=9aeb9505b139433583ec27751c0971c6&_e=GHHXOxOcaL9rImacTQzAGPGSmm8XnnJlAGIhgfBNUX0XkyNMHLFi-36cr2jTY7ADWQJGqhNzMphO3e7dO7p2NO112U0uGpirpNbYYUK2pfzJQQzHi_PTIy4B9tewcWBwtVRGwBYpYFFmqMOpAm9oSJJp2DK35UBeUK7hSQs9KW0mOOMaNOwnaGVXDH2aT11XxqI78bajDPE9P0ABrSa0EkoUNU_C3pBQIMgYI1fA4-lfF5kDBkaXr7UGeIIfpUCOi0NblqXn_GJ9XC9yXEwk-k-zyu5IrU322GbTUZyE37fdlllKBW9K-nrwCHido45li9Lfclio8h42hz2mWDHNX6TAPHbRe9Md9az43cscVAk%3D)
---
God bless,
Scott Walker

name: Jon Tester
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Folks,
I just got a call from my fundraising team, and to put it simply, I need your help. We’re behind on our 1,000 donor planting season goal and need a serious boost in donations today to catch up.
This is the last thing I wanted to hear since Sharla and I are busy finishing up prepping equipment and getting everything ready to start planting. So unless you're willing to get your hands dirty and spend 16 hours on a tractor with us, I need your help chipping in whatever you can.
Any amount you can contribute early in the campaign goes a long way in helping us grow our movement and reach these critical fundraising goals. Can I count on you to split a donation today between my campaign and Seth Moulton? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Reaching our goal of 1,000 grassroots donors is vital. It shows National Republicans and their shady dark money groups that we have momentum and a strong team of everyday people supporting our movement.
I'm incredibly grateful for your support and am fired up to win so I can keep fighting for all Montanans in the U.S. Senate.
Alright, I'll get back to prepping for planting before Sharla starts wondering where I am; thanks again!
Jon

clean_body: [] Folks, I just got a call from my fundraising team, and to put it simply, I need your help. We’re behind on our 1,000 donor planting season goal and need a serious boost in donations today to catch up. This is the last thing I wanted to hear since Sharla and I are busy finishing up prepping equipment and getting everything ready to start planting. So unless you're willing to get your hands dirty and spend 16 hours on a tractor with us, I need your help chipping in whatever you can. Any amount you can contribute early in the campaign goes a long way in helping us grow our movement and reach these critical fundraising goals. Can I count on you to split a donation today between my campaign and Seth Moulton? [] Donate [] Reaching our goal of 1,000 grassroots donors is vital. It shows National Republicans and their shady dark money groups that we have momentum and a strong team of everyday people supporting our movement. I'm incredibly grateful for your support and am fired up to win so I can keep fighting for all Montanans in the U.S. Senate. Alright, I'll get back to prepping for planting before Sharla starts wondering where I am; thanks again! Jon Donate [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Friend,

Nicole Malliotakis here.
_**In the two years that President Biden and the Democrats had complete control of our federal government, they went on an unsustainable spending spree creating the highest inflation in forty years and adding trillions to our national debt.**_

| [ **STOP OVERSPENDING** ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=4346735da3074251ad5a54b8c9f1e813&_e=3n7fd-HsP88cO1pN7IqMiwZZziVXPXvXWuJxpbxIylp7f-blDVKsqD7BdYLqCGqttgEnp2k4iEw7mnDhmbvLpsNvh3Dre6uOv_Rel1c1erEM3pTZ8dir_8zTlOnDtxM878ErJzLBAlFib7RFxxfyG5_Xx1-bKH4Keouktuu4YMVQFKGT05PVLjtqf4edDPbOj9LF_9EDgQmiCPgUOB9s5JCgki_Z4ygl2g82oPLH7J2LWYpUFl4M49InJpjA9a6pc6FAbp46IxYgrgYO7AmAIr-2Z6HGKCA8TpxKDRYnAk4IZ15mpcrggg-9FmWAcvdEyXIAdQfDWGxgxKiZawJlXeab6IgxgsGH2CzEkXCyoAQK2iOAergWatO48FAUs-Bvsl0gK3o_rmpDHIYvsG6V16MoL75xMsMPaFHGvUIb-cORirLzhlRPnRtj9kHzDwXM1VJw4xNPNN5DAlwaIKgJHtqu31aYL-sId3ZEFJOzL4UBccuOHEK5XvumFxXoPj7_)
---

****Instead of increasing the debt limit to pay for their mess in December, Democrats left Republicans to pick up the pieces.**** The Limit, Save, Grow Act outlines our priorities to limit government spending, reduce our debt and implement pro-growth fiscal policies.

[ **LIMIT, SAVE, GROW**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=4346735da3074251ad5a54b8c9f1e813&_e=3n7fd-HsP88cO1pN7IqMiwZZziVXPXvXWuJxpbxIylp7f-blDVKsqD7BdYLqCGqttgEnp2k4iEw7mnDhmbvLpsNvh3Dre6uOv_Rel1c1erEM3pTZ8dir_8zTlOnDtxM878ErJzLBAlFib7RFxxfyG5_Xx1-bKH4Keouktuu4YMVQFKGT05PVLjtqf4edDPbOj9LF_9EDgQmiCPgUOB9s5JCgki_Z4ygl2g82oPLH7J2LWYpUFl4M49InJpjA9a6pc6FAbp46IxYgrgYO7AmAIr-2Z6HGKCA8TpxKDRYnAk4IZ15mpcrggg-9FmWAcvdEyXIAdQfDWGxgxKiZawJlXeab6IgxgsGH2CzEkXCyoAS6s9A7Nziee1sG_4vhlZh3AJdqxErhOM1NbEgJ4TMEjkADqzMFVLkcHroKkEZ8n6Fin1CguhvWUmQw1evS-NPqSjFVQSt4Db7w7t_WLBTbunGUgfqypg3r5FF8Yr4GYfjhf0KXQ-4XjdQaKBBKk0GL)
---

We need more leadership that understands the dangers of unsustainable spending and puts the American people and economy FIRST. **The best way to do this is to elect common-sense conservatives to office in 2024 and turn our economy around from what Biden has done.**

**[Click here if you agree.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=4346735da3074251ad5a54b8c9f1e813&_e=3n7fd-HsP88cO1pN7IqMiwZZziVXPXvXWuJxpbxIylp7f-blDVKsqD7BdYLqCGqttgEnp2k4iEw7mnDhmbvLpsNvh3Dre6uOv_Rel1c1erEM3pTZ8dir_8zTlOnDtxM878ErJzLBAlFib7RFxxfyG5_Xx1-bKH4Keouktuu4YMVQFKGT05PVLjtqf4edDPbOj9LF_9EDgQmiCPgUOB9s5JCgki_Z4ygl2g82oPLH7J2LWYpUFl4M49InJpjA9a6pc6FAbp46IxYgrgYO7AmAIr-2Z6HGKCA8TpxKDRYnAk4IZ15mpcrggg-9FmWAcvdEyXIAdQfDWGxgxKiZawJlXVAHdC2KWvARr2X0n_P7XV34gIgraQvjlMdZzf-Z9Wxb3fsg48yHNxRtB7_ByPnNaifmT_UXDoMEYKCihRRqAeZhyoWPDpO8w5QgLLMygEZ2u7LEdwlXEEX9UEWOUFRUt6214eqTjdEc2irpsrXshI-ehUMzjtAk2q3XtO_kC_nB)**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). name: Conservatives Give
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2baac94c28bb44fa8fab6014902ba836&_e=2nkdiaNdJaF1z_nuI2PtPdUH1UacC5Iej7Trw1EBrhPYf3h-5nuY62pVfy0xEDMTWdnq4tl6zpsy9YHMnQ3t16DJufsHFU0teXfZquqLfP2FU_qj2O2lMLIdsHVZbscmchNOlCzpmi4uHYo5G4G0TGyhrWCobBkfoveqXzDoLbCbELBxBzwgR9MDxRz_RpJf7eSjIqq76yzinEHepeUXQlX6z7vQyjZj0_sK0KCEPRdAf4i7v0vb272fj7aAZpn1S7aOaCcj71kAFC2G0Ku-XbbPrz6BbrEAbu14rLvZCyF0-EMWWc03HKpvjCkBoLAJvPuWMarpC36fXQmRNaSqgAv1CvQq2QOE3iRQGmoZQHbcVy_xTWF1VWMfehpGQ52IdMeVB-7eyKbWkC3GSxXXePFL9YnZMVjqp0kITecYm_Q%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2baac94c28bb44fa8fab6014902ba836&_e=2nkdiaNdJaF1z_nuI2PtPdUH1UacC5Iej7Trw1EBrhPYf3h-5nuY62pVfy0xEDMTWdnq4tl6zpsy9YHMnQ3t16DJufsHFU0teXfZquqLfP2FU_qj2O2lMLIdsHVZbscmchNOlCzpmi4uHYo5G4G0TGyhrWCobBkfoveqXzDoLbCbELBxBzwgR9MDxRz_RpJf7eSjIqq76yzinEHepeUXQlX6z7vQyjZj0_sK0KCEPRdAf4i7v0vb272fj7aAZpn1qTDZlAEUgYsMHura5y__bn_6r9B5ywx7__fkg8_Y1Uoe0FnS6iTDiqDsHdvtmfvjnBy8usCMNROJQ8fpvqHlsJSvG_DhIXvXPxBu5zNF1siyJzZSlNj2qeDKvg2h1GTfBCl3bgiXoPs828XFv8pvm_NgzWvVeT2bu96EyLY-2S0%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2baac94c28bb44fa8fab6014902ba836&_e=2nkdiaNdJaF1z_nuI2PtPdUH1UacC5Iej7Trw1EBrhPYf3h-5nuY62pVfy0xEDMTWdnq4tl6zpsy9YHMnQ3t16DJufsHFU0teXfZquqLfP2FU_qj2O2lMLIdsHVZbscmchNOlCzpmi4uHYo5G4G0TGyhrWCobBkfoveqXzDoLbCbELBxBzwgR9MDxRz_RpJf7eSjIqq76yzinEHepeUXQlX6z7vQyjZj0_sK0KCEPRdAf4i7v0vb272fj7aAZpn1i0xb9B1ahKUmbxx1dynXLYwtfNQuYXkF9EOpoN46LbzUhCneZkBtKvnOSadH1fhir28hbGSUs0FWgPd1P8Op5CDh1Avig3eSfSAy_8STuPnzEn_CntczAaz0o04BTZrKOXLXMVBY-tXJRwgrJnZO6Yy2-l2xK7ND-0qyZLEJGaE%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=2baac94c28bb44fa8fab6014902ba836&_t=l6KXKz7MNZ08zqFaZRTeuANhmtbBPzTIDV9ZsN2jXBtzMiD1HrKiiSAmj2KzorB8otYgTQd7Vwng12LQ3ClZC0REziJ0wE6rVT1lmYZnqf0LHHm6fK6ZpyWHkbs8DSMMLE5Ewon5itJWaHa6H9dtULy7vOw1JcLz1qn6rSqzQ6U%3D)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Raquel is my pick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060523_MarkKelly&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060523_MarkKelly&amount=20]
Friend,
Senator Mark Kelly here. Today, I am reaching out to you to express my wholehearted endorsement of Raquel Terán as she seeks election for Arizona's 3rd Congressional district. Raquel has proven time and again that she’s got the experience, passion, and unwavering commitment to make a positive impact on our communities. That’s why I’m on Team Terán.
If you’re ready to join me on Team Terán, can you chip in $20 or whatever you can afford to give Raquel and our campaign the resources we need to send Raquel to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060523_MarkKelly&amount=20]
One of the most important lessons I’ve learned in my life is the value of teamwork. And I know Arizonans need Raquel on our team in Washington. Her tireless advocacy for working families has been a driving force behind her accomplishments. And together, we can fight for policies that uplift our communities, create opportunities, and protect the most vulnerable among us.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060523_MarkKelly&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060523_MarkKelly&amount=20]
Raquel knows how to win – she was an integral part of our winning campaign last year! And the secret to winning campaigns is you. Without your support, your encouragement, and, yes, your contributions, none of this would be possible.
So, friend, will you join me on Team Terán and chip in $20 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_060523_MarkKelly&amount=20]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
EXPRESS DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_060523_MarkKelly_10]

EXPRESS DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_060523_MarkKelly_other]
Together, we can shape a future where every Arizonan has the opportunity to thrive, where our environment is protected, and where everyone is treated with dignity and respect.
Thank you,
Mark Kelly

name: Rand Paul
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=447e3fde93fe443a990f1c3b1554e46f&_e=_zAY4vbbtR65sjQ9VW5_nDazQocWvVmYVm5e-mlIsXA67u9n2txRuV_0yG_mjdZiEmk1ByCY3JESIDhJbctxSlZ4K3lVl7Ye8ieGph_yUON7G46WzEIp2cHFb6b0KsVggdPX_mqYJ-iiftEYHgoltql2zBrEYrnBQUPa2w88MNXRsH558Uv6SDNVl_gmDfYkoGasn2ivDw_ra6d287OUh0G88Y9-ijFoR2mBJ43dKkxn6JsbhkLkDyvdBJn9-Qi2lr7Vb0iIyJcvMLa7d23eZb4Rpt2SnuIqdWxJGH2eneWrFSDHaUmTsbEFUGJfqfww)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I 've learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom."

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "_why haven 't I heard these ideas before_?"

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[_**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=447e3fde93fe443a990f1c3b1554e46f&_e=_zAY4vbbtR65sjQ9VW5_nDazQocWvVmYVm5e-mlIsXA67u9n2txRuV_0yG_mjdZiEmk1ByCY3JESIDhJbctxSlZ4K3lVl7Ye8ieGph_yUON7G46WzEIp2cHFb6b0KsVggdPX_mqYJ-iiftEYHgoltql2zBrEYrnBQUPa2w88MNXVLNxztfkn2lMdOz4BRzQNDP9P3nuy_2PcnFCw_-486joRR814UHp7PpMlP5Ws41slIiGo3zhxH2CEIPEgkw6x91LY7P0FOGsB2QO2c-66Dyk7FL0iQIGVHp4zyhw_BIl0us2gK0L15Y4ZNReB_ldg)

[_**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=447e3fde93fe443a990f1c3b1554e46f&_e=_zAY4vbbtR65sjQ9VW5_nDazQocWvVmYVm5e-mlIsXA67u9n2txRuV_0yG_mjdZiEmk1ByCY3JESIDhJbctxSlZ4K3lVl7Ye8ieGph_yUON7G46WzEIp2cHFb6b0KsVggdPX_mqYJ-iiftEYHgoltql2zBrEYrnBQUPa2w88MNXG1GATzKyYY08K_7p651rJjFs_SC3ZV4N3dCLNgQi3jeilUnhf4BzabbIH1AVJEsWSGNIZFHNCBO2gKOF7xYq7-bbSCGE56tRJ6GtZK71y4wo9tLu0qyaPeF9x37VP-StCeCpTj0WHQaf5Ppi9VCiG)

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=447e3fde93fe443a990f1c3b1554e46f&_e=_zAY4vbbtR65sjQ9VW5_nDazQocWvVmYVm5e-mlIsXA67u9n2txRuV_0yG_mjdZiEmk1ByCY3JESIDhJbctxSlZ4K3lVl7Ye8ieGph_yUON7G46WzEIp2cHFb6b0KsVggdPX_mqYJ-iiftEYHgoltql2zBrEYrnBQUPa2w88MNXbmPi-QbQJwgJAgHRnuSq9eJS6u4SpGJQ96wMNbK63O5Fz3Ye5woDQ32YQNYytKUB5yUcdxyJCtyvwuFyg-V-WhQvZ6coxgGnDx9NfHYlr5dwp7fj_V3RKzxca1CaRdAxybMiy8lR8TY-TiAUIkgYI)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

clean_body: The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. Friend, I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. Do you want to know something important I 've learned? Politicians will not save us. The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. Politics is downstream from culture. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution. Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE): FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility. In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom." It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government. As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "why haven 't I heard these ideas before?" You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country. Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom. It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism. The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country. FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems. Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today. Here is our goal: I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below: Friend, I'm sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas. I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE's newest supporters. Thank you for everything, Senator Rand Paul Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Brian Burch
subject: Urgent: LA Dodgers reverse decision, attack Christians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catholic Vote
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWV5h-PDLN

I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team
for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWV5h-PDLN

I need
your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for
blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group.

The group
calls itself the "Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence."

And their
motto is "go forth and sin some more."

The
"sisters" are a bunch of men who dress up in sexually explicit
and rainbow-colored "nun" clothing with one purpose:

To mock
Christians.

Then they
perform stunts designed to be as shocking and offensive as
possible.

A
"condom savior mass"
An
annual "Jesus in drag" competition
Pole
dancing on a cross
And
much more.

They even
tricked an archbishop into giving them communion, then defiled
the Eucharist.

And the
Dodgers are choosing to honor this anti-Christian hate group with
their "Community Hero Award" during so-called "Pride month."

FIGHT
BACK

It's
vile.

It's
disgusting.

It's a
blatant attack by a major American corporation on our Lord.

And
faithful Christians like you and I must not tolerate this kind of
hatred.

That's
why CatholicVote is raising $1 million to run ads on every
Dodgers-linked radio station and TV channel to send a clear
message:

Any
business that promotes anti-Catholic bigotry WILL suffer the
consequences.

FLOOD
THE AIRWAYS!

If you've
been following the news closely, you may have read about
CatholicVote's campaign to ask the Dodgers to remove this
anti-Catholic group of fake "sisters" from their celebration.

Thanks to
our public pressure campaign, thousands of CatholicVote
supporters FLOODED Dodger stadium with phone calls.

Within
minutes, we filled up their voicemail inboxes.

The
Dodgers almost immediately disinvited the "sisters."

A HUGE
thank-you to everyone who made those calls!

I'm
incredibly proud of our CatholicVote family for taking action
right away.

But
unfortunately Patriot, the story doesn't end there.

As soon
as the Dodgers disinvited the "sisters," the leftwing LGBT
movement went crazy.

Other gay
and transgender groups began to pressure and threaten the Dodgers
for daring to cross the LGBT agenda.

Then, the
Dodgers re-invited the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence back and
decided to honor them with the baseball team's "Community Hero
Award."

They also
offered their "sincerest apologies to the Sisters of Perpetual
Indulgence, members of the LGBTQ+ community and their friends and
families."

And they
made the decision without even consulting any faithful Christians
- people like you and me. The Christians who the "Sisters of
Perpetual Indulgence" target with their hatred in the first
place.

It's
shocking, but not surprising.

Patriot,
this is the state of American culture today.

If anyone
dares to call a "transgender" person by their biological name or
pronoun, they risk being fired by woke corporations.

But those
same woke businesses heap honor on bigots who insult Christians,
hate our biblical values, and mock our Lord and Savior.

DEFEND
CHRIST!

As
Senator Marco Rubio said last night after the news broke, "Today
our great country is controlled by socio-political ruling elites
who don't just tolerate anti-Christian bigotry, they encourage &
celebrate it."

He's spot
on, Patriot.

One thing
is absolutely clear today:

Hate has
a home at Dodger stadium.

And it's
our job to stand up for the majesty of our Lord and our Church.

For God
and for country,

Brian
Burch

President, CatholicVote

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
P.S. Like
I mentioned earlier, we've set a goal to raise $1 million to run
ads exposing the anti-Christian bigotry of the LA Dodgers and the
"Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence."

Please
click here to donate anything you can spare today.

We didn't
have this in our budget, and we need to raise the money in the
next few days. So no matter what you can afford to chip in -
please don't hesitate. The most important thing is time.

Thank you
in advance, and please keep our work in your prayers.

clean_body: I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group. I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group. The group calls itself the "Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence." And their motto is "go forth and sin some more." The "sisters" are a bunch of men who dress up in sexually explicit and rainbow-colored "nun" clothing with one purpose: To mock Christians. Then they perform stunts designed to be as shocking and offensive as possible. A "condom savior mass" An annual "Jesus in drag" competition Pole dancing on a cross And much more. They even tricked an archbishop into giving them communion, then defiled the Eucharist. And the Dodgers are choosing to honor this anti-Christian hate group with their "Community Hero Award" during so-called "Pride month." FIGHT BACK It's vile. It's disgusting. It's a blatant attack by a major American corporation on our Lord. And faithful Christians like you and I must not tolerate this kind of hatred. That's why CatholicVote is raising $1 million to run ads on every Dodgers-linked radio station and TV channel to send a clear message: Any business that promotes anti-Catholic bigotry WILL suffer the consequences. FLOOD THE AIRWAYS! If you've been following the news closely, you may have read about CatholicVote's campaign to ask the Dodgers to remove this anti-Catholic group of fake "sisters" from their celebration. Thanks to our public pressure campaign, thousands of CatholicVote supporters FLOODED Dodger stadium with phone calls. Within minutes, we filled up their voicemail inboxes. The Dodgers almost immediately disinvited the "sisters." A HUGE thank-you to everyone who made those calls! I'm incredibly proud of our CatholicVote family for taking action right away. But unfortunately Patriot, the story doesn't end there. As soon as the Dodgers disinvited the "sisters," the leftwing LGBT movement went crazy. Other gay and transgender groups began to pressure and threaten the Dodgers for daring to cross the LGBT agenda. Then, the Dodgers re-invited the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence back and decided to honor them with the baseball team's "Community Hero Award." They also offered their "sincerest apologies to the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence, members of the LGBTQ+ community and their friends and families." And they made the decision without even consulting any faithful Christians - people like you and me. The Christians who the "Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence" target with their hatred in the first place. It's shocking, but not surprising. Patriot, this is the state of American culture today. If anyone dares to call a "transgender" person by their biological name or pronoun, they risk being fired by woke corporations. But those same woke businesses heap honor on bigots who insult Christians, hate our biblical values, and mock our Lord and Savior. DEFEND CHRIST! As Senator Marco Rubio said last night after the news broke, "Today our great country is controlled by socio-political ruling elites who don't just tolerate anti-Christian bigotry, they encourage & celebrate it." He's spot on, Patriot. One thing is absolutely clear today: Hate has a home at Dodger stadium. And it's our job to stand up for the majesty of our Lord and our Church. For God and for country, Brian Burch President, CatholicVote P.S. Like I mentioned earlier, we've set a goal to raise $1 million to run ads exposing the anti-Christian bigotry of the LA Dodgers and the "Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence." Please click here to donate anything you can spare today. We didn't have this in our budget, and we need to raise the money in the next few days. So no matter what you can afford to chip in - please don't hesitate. The most important thing is time. Thank you in advance, and please keep our work in your prayers. Paid for by Catholic Vote. name: signature needed (Left Action)
subject: Tell the Department of Justice: “Charge Trump BEFORE the election, not after!”
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell the Department of Justice: “Charge Trump BEFORE the election not after!”](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1f4454d6-3e54-490d-9d29-1e7265a2d2a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T225422cb-5a83-4fa6-98a7-a478bc1c17d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T898df74a-4c37-474b-93dc-699cba0fbbc4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72388845-974f-48e9-aad8-39792ee4741d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Signatures help show support, build pressure, and spread the word. Sign the petition, and help us make change!)_ With [evidence mounting](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2415ef40-b28c-4d4b-9581-9945e7d1a816/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that Special Counsel Jack Smith is close to wrapping up the documents portion his investigation, an indictment could come at any time. But Trump supporters are demanding that any criminal charges and trial be delayed until after the 2024 election. **NO WAY. We've waited long enough for Trump to pay for his crimes.[ And Americans certainly deserve to know the extent of these crimes before they go to the polls.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tadd7ccad-0b1e-422a-a03d-6e91a342465f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** There is no way we should give Trump a free pass for the next year and a half, simply because he is trying to inflict himself upon America once again. He's got the right to run for office — not to run from the law. [**Tell the Department of Justice: "Charge Trump BEFORE the election, not after!"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td82572df-bd66-46ad-bdb3-95ca70364f11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65bac69c-9e0d-4e38-8a16-e5923d3aece5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
