name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Get your free copy
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25760%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q8ohjjSSDfTDi0XpdjVSew&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25761%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=grTVMUnnlXLSMYUyghiOpg&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25760%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q8ohjjSSDfTDi0XpdjVSew&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25762%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M9eSdOKLgg22udfAC1KN%2fQ&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25760%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q8ohjjSSDfTDi0XpdjVSew&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25763%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pqqclzvBlzBJ9NLlEmSMAg&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25764%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G%2bw8AU0hHOAq3UFlF7ujVQ&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25775%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0o0PpmA1J%2fJhPmo4E8gDqg&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Your America News
---

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Take Action Against Ranked Choice Voting NOW!
body:
The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7588c7dc51e3427e85ff7f5b25f8d61e&_e=BeJ115SdZZ9sJlf4hX040S6yvWYySsB3eg8Ignb0-zCpFAfgI18PEStnjCWyQ4e5Fy1uzBZ0IKDNhDuETUBHuXdlGnYJWOD2K062koZRd9hfjmTx07eRYwcqLdm3qMSNaRdFdJWMiEtix9ggj4R1ldYPP9R8gUsl7r9d-6CvXbNG5X3PKpLgboyCEGTbfMFwRnhiqCkeHtUjm0NT47CicttYKzAYleUWS7oReinZEkGfYd9qsF34SF-PEKC5VsdrstwS377OYZNWJvACINAA40CvvH0YSLy5pZd8Duh36HDPh2VHkmaownJSxZQmpdx_Brn08KCwF9MlWAaYs992BpD0UhlqaTaFa-KYKyRVX9Qsonj0pdrl9-FsiSJU5R1F)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7588c7dc51e3427e85ff7f5b25f8d61e&_e=BeJ115SdZZ9sJlf4hX040S6yvWYySsB3eg8Ignb0-zCpFAfgI18PEStnjCWyQ4e5Fy1uzBZ0IKDNhDuETUBHuXdlGnYJWOD2K062koZRd9hfjmTx07eRYwcqLdm3qMSNaRdFdJWMiEtix9ggj4R1ldYPP9R8gUsl7r9d-6CvXbNG5X3PKpLgboyCEGTbfMFwRnhiqCkeHtUjm0NT47CicttYKzAYleUWS7oReinZEkGCcLKrPug978Hcc6f_sRo9jfDUPppHFIABdWO3ixHK5rdZPgCzOnPq0f-xLyxAZiMXvKKgJ5iMJiyldIMQkZ7dMzx6pqbrUppelt_HEs9lrJFGNZdEE4jeeX8V7gkhwnlgjBanT_g6P2Oovu3_MY3l)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

Defend the Constitution

clean_body: The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input. Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below? By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system. Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America. Best regards, Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation | | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=037753519fd24d2c8013a16a97b6b621&_e=DEiubpQLmo7EDMOMQDxOrCWxmJqJHjEwNVqBDwT4e9uRiZPXP9Y0cLx_ihZeXYDF1zdM6cFWcLUSze4TVN5IrJ5egfiEiM2NtpKPN_LKiOSqzz7ABYo0bMrpd84EMJs8NqQQ8dNARJK2shXm_GcgkoozP_dUTh8hJjQIZwPO030nmR_Sl9-HvTILARdp6Y55FWNnBctlv4dmn1Ozlr3NBg6jSL3gVBwKqgw8WkjFkDh_iiGm-G46_bfOTWBiLORM) Dr. Prins says:
> "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result."
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=037753519fd24d2c8013a16a97b6b621&_e=DEiubpQLmo7EDMOMQDxOrCWxmJqJHjEwNVqBDwT4e9uRiZPXP9Y0cLx_ihZeXYDF1zdM6cFWcLUSze4TVN5IrJ5egfiEiM2NtpKPN_LKiORWTjEaIsuQGCzmnT9b1hIz0uK7VPhUZeH7grsQ6ll8wgPfEH38-13fWyQnWHpl4-WNHyIKuqBxt6F3p_0y_bat7VTfYjxbeDqNVXDSd-X52ggu6QyZeSvXfyFmVXSIJNA_CY61ekFYHk0mAdehnfx3) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=037753519fd24d2c8013a16a97b6b621&_e=DEiubpQLmo7EDMOMQDxOrCWxmJqJHjEwNVqBDwT4e9uRiZPXP9Y0cLx_ihZeXYDF1zdM6cFWcLUSze4TVN5IrJ5egfiEiM2NtpKPN_LKiOQy-90eyLMHUQnr0sIF13PlruAIcvUNx7WPvXWjP0GNxNsL_1Bfbo5UJsTS-OQonvPDuc5ndqWk005qwRz-b9WSpFPfc0NlH5nRhQw_YoB68yjNcmVGg1hp7dTPfLk9Tt5wQYI_S3z4UCDe8NWgFyvF)

name: The Dean Kids
subject: Shh… we want to surprise Mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
It’s Pat, Harry, and Alex, and today we wanted to reach out on behalf of our mom, Madeleine Dean. Tomorrow is our mom’s birthday, and we wanted to ask you, one of her strongest supporters, to sign the card for her special day! Hi Peter! It’s Pat, Harry, and Alex, and today we wanted to reach out on behalf of our mom, Madeleine Dean.

**_Tomorrow is our mom’s birthday,_** and we wanted to ask you, one of her strongest supporters, to sign the card for her special day! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64360745/409846025/-1402317787?refcode=06052023_md_birthday_en_1&refcode2=4a78d1a9-c603-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTc4ZDFhOS1jNjAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Vta7d_Drv7tZTLoBu4x5_j_n5g0fQX9oKsOCZ9b92M=&emci=cad21ba7-9501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4a78d1a9-c603-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569) | | [ **SIGN THE CARD** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64360748/409846029/-1402317787?refcode=06052023_md_birthday_en_1&refcode2=4a78d1a9-c603-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTc4ZDFhOS1jNjAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Vta7d_Drv7tZTLoBu4x5_j_n5g0fQX9oKsOCZ9b92M=&emci=cad21ba7-9501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4a78d1a9-c603-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)
---
Growing up, Mom made sure our birthdays were filled with joy and laughter. She’s always been quick-witted, caring, and dedicated to her family, her friends, and her neighbors – and we’re grateful that she instilled in us that same sense of service to community.

**We learned from the best: birthdays are for cake, laughter, and well wishes.[Share yours with our mom, Mad, before her birthday tomorrow.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64360753/409846031/-1402317787?refcode=06052023_md_birthday_en_1&refcode2=4a78d1a9-c603-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTc4ZDFhOS1jNjAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Vta7d_Drv7tZTLoBu4x5_j_n5g0fQX9oKsOCZ9b92M=&emci=cad21ba7-9501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4a78d1a9-c603-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)**

Thank you for being in Mom’s corner, Peter.

\- Pat, Harry, and Alex

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_

Peter,

Our climate is changing and our time to act is quickly running out. We can address this crisis quickly by investing in a clean energy future.

Rhode Island proudly leads the nation in offshore wind development. Our Blue Economy is showing the rest of the country and the world how we can cut energy costs, reduce emissions, and create thousands of good-paying, union jobs all at the same time.

We must continue our investments in clean energy programs — because there is no alternative. This is about creating jobs with strong wages while ensuring that we leave a healthy planet behind for future generations.

In Congress, Republicans are trying hard to roll back many of the pro-climate and clean energy programs enacted in last year’s _Inflation Reduction Act_. If they succeed, jobs will be lost and much of our progress will be erased.

It’s crucial that we stop them, protect all of the pro-climate legislation we’ve passed so far, and continue building towards a clean energy future for every American.

name: Team Schrier
subject: Celebrating Pride Month 🏳️‍🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
No matter who you love or how you identify, everyone deserves the same rights and protections. Happy Pride, Peter!

53 years ago this month, the first Pride march was held, commemorating the anniversary of the Stonewall uprising.

Since then, June has been recognized as a month to honor and celebrate the contributions and achievements of our LGBTQ+ communities. While our nation has come a long way since 1969, it's clear we still have a long way to go.

**So far this year, right-wing legislators across the country have introduced 491 discriminatory anti-LGBTQ bills.** We need to end the discrimination and unnecessary suffering for those in the LGBTQ+ communities.

We're not equal until everyone is equal. Because no matter who you love or how you identify, everyone deserves the same rights and protections.

That's why Kim has fought to pass the Equality Act, which would explicitly outlaw any discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity nationwide.

**[So this Pride Month, Peter, join Kim by taking the pledge to fight for equality. Together, we can pass legislation like the Equality Act to end anti-LGBTQ+ discrimination>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64360772/409846054/-2089155616?ms=em23_230605_Pride_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em23_230605_Pride_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em23_230605_Pride_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230605_Pride_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=QQc77O9Vxux7aW6/8D+W7SC2BuPCiyhTjCvJd+OSB8ym+A16eGGoYjF6R1OLDuvJI2IdgYTL8CpvO5dIfgOiKTct427OVTEffUtT8L5/ulDr2vczxtbgko315mtyapdwEocRkZrWjTkMfR/V0AMGUy1ZjrZLgXtMqdTYCPWiSdU=&refcode2=4b78d1a9-c603-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjc4ZDFhOS1jNjAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dm4nOr70EgD4MsBSP09BpdhXcXIN4bukx741m_5GGm0=&emci=4592f70e-7901-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4b78d1a9-c603-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)**

clean_body: No matter who you love or how you identify, everyone deserves the same rights and protections. Happy Pride, Peter! 53 years ago this month, the first Pride march was held, commemorating the anniversary of the Stonewall uprising. Since then, June has been recognized as a month to honor and celebrate the contributions and achievements of our LGBTQ+ communities. While our nation has come a long way since 1969, it's clear we still have a long way to go. So far this year, right-wing legislators across the country have introduced 491 discriminatory anti-LGBTQ bills. We need to end the discrimination and unnecessary suffering for those in the LGBTQ+ communities. We're not equal until everyone is equal. Because no matter who you love or how you identify, everyone deserves the same rights and protections. That's why Kim has fought to pass the Equality Act, which would explicitly outlaw any discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation or gender identity nationwide. | Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. name: Tennessee Three Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: You, and two of the Tennessee Three >>
body:
Special elections are critical for chipping away at Republican power and flipping chambers nationwide – and you're a key part of how we win. | | |
---
| | **Here's why we're so focused on the upcoming special elections in Tennessee _right now:_** Earlier this year, Representatives Justin Jones and Justin Pearson of the Tennessee Three stood firmly against Republican inaction in the face of gun violence in the state – and in response, Republicans _expelled them from the House._ **Now, Reps. Pearson and Jones are running for their old seats, and they need our help to ensure Republicans don't stop them from rejoining the statehouse.** Not just that –
* Losing these races would show Republicans they can simply expel anyone who dares to speak out against them – a dangerous precedent some Republicans are already embracing!
* In states like New Hampshire, we've seen how Democrats in Republican-controlled states are stopping the worst of the GOP’s agenda, like abortion bans, anti-LGBTQ+ legislation, and more.
* We've won 18 special elections this year alone – and we can win these, too! But these victories only happened because people like _you_ chipped in $7, $25, or more at a time.**That's why it's so critical we have you on this team now.**

[Pitch in today to win upcoming special elections and elect state Democrats nationwide. clean_body: Special elections are critical for chipping away at Republican power and flipping chambers nationwide – and you're a key part of how we win. | | | | | Here's why we're so focused on the upcoming special elections in Tennessee right now: Earlier this year, Representatives Justin Jones and Justin Pearson of the Tennessee Three stood firmly against Republican inaction in the face of gun violence in the state – and in response, Republicans expelled them from the House. Now, Reps. Pearson and Jones are running for their old seats, and they need our help to ensure Republicans don't stop them from rejoining the statehouse. Not just that – Losing these races would show Republicans they can simply expel anyone who dares to speak out against them – a dangerous precedent some Republicans are already embracing! In states like New Hampshire, we've seen how Democrats in Republican-controlled states are stopping the worst of the GOP’s agenda, like abortion bans, anti-LGBTQ+ legislation, and more. We've won 18 special elections this year alone – and we can win these, too! But these victories only happened because people like you chipped in $7, $25, or more at a time.That's why it's so critical we have you on this team now. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We'll only do this together – so thank you so much for all you do. name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Two Strong Conservatives for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: We are excited to announce our support for two exceptional congressional candidates — Marlin Stutzman and Yvette Herrell. They are proven conservatives who will join the House Freedom Caucus and fight for our principles and values. **[Please help them defeat the liberals in both parties by contributing to their grassroots campaigns.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdip8esud15rgp54laqt60bdv5ct68pch99mcau0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g68pb2cth2bs)** **Marlin Stutzman** (IN-03)
Marlin Stutzman was first elected to Congress in 2010 and was one of the founding members of the House Freedom Caucus. He left the House in 2016 to run for the U.S. Senate but was defeated in the Republican primary. Sadly, Senator Mitch McConnell (R-KY) spent millions to defeat the outspoken conservative.
---
---
Fmr. U.S. Rep. Marlin Stutzman (R-IN) / _Photo by Gage Skidmore_
---
Stutzman is now running for the open House seat he previously held. This is a solidly Republican district that must be won by a strong conservative who is willing to stand up for our values.

Stutzman will fight the reckless spending that has buried our nation in debt. He will fight to secure our nation’s border. And he will fight the woke liberals who deny God and encourage our kids to reject the bodies God gave them.

We’re ramping up our support for Stutzman because we know that the GOP establishment will try to fill the seat with another spineless Republican. **Yvette Herrell**(NM-02)
One of our proudest accomplishments was helping Yvette Herrell win the election to Congress back in 2020. Despite being from a swing district, she was an outspoken conservative voice and never shied away from the big fights.
---
---
Fmr. U.S. Rep. Yvette Herrell (R-NM)
---
Democrats spent big to defeat Herrell in 2022, but thankfully she’s not giving up and has decided to run again.

This is our chance to take another seat away from the Democrats and fill it with a conservative who will stand up to the liberals in both parties.

**Proven Leaders**
We know that Marlin Stutzman and Yvette Herrell can win these races, join the Freedom Caucus, and fight for our values. Why? Because they have done it before.

[**Please contribute to their campaigns through HFF.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zon3uuv0i8e25pvs1d7strgdsk47oifglsr8vhqg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g68pb2cth2bs) We will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contributions directly to their campaigns. It's the best way to support them!

Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**SUPPORT THE HOUSE FREEDOM CAUCUS**
---
---
The House Freedom Fund is the only political group in America that is exclusively dedicated to defending and expanding the House Freedom Caucus. Please support our conservative mission by making a one-time or monthly donation today!
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zudip3doig0oihmbm3jn5go9gooh1bm4b0m1jt98_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g68pb2cth2bs)
---
|
---
_**"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." – Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)**_
---
|
---
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.
---

---

body:
Here’s the full story:

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668892%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cmbrCLVtfLG0z8rp5Zk%2fFA&sysid=1)

Hello Friend,

Members of the U.S. Congress are accusing me of buying and paying for FBI whistleblowers.

**Here’s the full story: **

Congressman Dan Goldman, aka Silverspoon, aka Schiff Jr., is lying when he says I bought and paid for FBI whistleblowers.

This is FALSE, and he knows it. Only Adam Schiff could have taught him lying is the best way to make a living. We will not stand idly by.

Here is a post that about sums it up:
Breaking: Congressman Dan Goldman (D) claims the FBI whistleblowers were bought and paid for by Kash Patel. The reality is the witnesses had their lives destroyed and Patel set up a fund for them to they could feed their families after the FBI suspended them without pay and left them unable to afford groceries...

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668892%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cmbrCLVtfLG0z8rp5Zk%2fFA&sysid=1)

_These brave patriots decided to put their lives and careers on the line for their country by exposing the truth about corruption within the FBI_.

I did not coach them, instruct them to do this, or buy them in any way. They provided critical information to Congress, exposing massive corruption at the FBI. Then, our foundation heard about their bravery and entered the fray.

The Kash Foundation, my America-First non-profit organization, helped provide financial assistance through a donation so these patriots wouldn’t lose everything after the great sacrifice they made for their country.

[You can help the Kash Foundation support even MORE patriots, such as the FBI whistleblowers, by making a donation today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668893%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OBgpaE2AZmOGqqXN48jplA&sysid=1)

clean_body: Here’s the full story: Hello Friend, Members of the U.S. Congress are accusing me of buying and paying for FBI whistleblowers. Here’s the full story: Congressman Dan Goldman, aka Silverspoon, aka Schiff Jr., is lying when he says I bought and paid for FBI whistleblowers. This is FALSE, and he knows it. Only Adam Schiff could have taught him lying is the best way to make a living. We will not stand idly by. Here is a post that about sums it up: Breaking: Congressman Dan Goldman (D) claims the FBI whistleblowers were bought and paid for by Kash Patel. The reality is the witnesses had their lives destroyed and Patel set up a fund for them to they could feed their families after the FBI suspended them without pay and left them unable to afford groceries... These brave patriots decided to put their lives and careers on the line for their country by exposing the truth about corruption within the FBI. I did not coach them, instruct them to do this, or buy them in any way. They provided critical information to Congress, exposing massive corruption at the FBI. Then, our foundation heard about their bravery and entered the fray. The Kash Foundation, my America-First non-profit organization, helped provide financial assistance through a donation so these patriots wouldn’t lose everything after the great sacrifice they made for their country. I am declaring a FUNDRAISING EMERGENCY. Members of the U.S. Government are effectively accusing me of being a felon and destroying the lives of patriots. My goal is to raise $100,000 to immediately double down on the Kash Foundation’s efforts to support whistleblowers and continue exposing the Deep State. Please use one of these links to donate ANY Amount: You and I cannot let these government gangsters destroy more lives and silence our voices. I am proud of The Kash Foundation and all of the America-First supporters who have stepped up to donate and support whistleblowers and others in need- victims of government overreach. I consider these FBI whistleblowers to be superheroes. Please help me FIGHT big government bullies that destroy our system of justice. Thank you for everything, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Do yard signs win elections?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5e271e2e2b43532507c845a18ba6b68d015e50c1addd2b20ac94f1f5db0783898bc9790d6f6b1077a9450d93a32ba5b718dd97b3c93f2abe3f89ef3d8ba6bd4cd07942a2f36264f78c23e1766c47d0b6

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e3053953dc2bbc21fb57d80b933edcdb8cbf14dc6b7bce486b8277b417387987addce5311814676d799dc75f8a9e0c8b86fe563606976e60fe2ba1f3d250e2d0

Peter,

Yard signs don't win elections... but we still like them! New Ron DeSantis for President yard signs have arrived and we'd love to send one to you.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e3053953dc2bbc21fb57d80b933edcdb8cbf14dc6b7bce486b8277b417387987addce5311814676d799dc75f8a9e0c8b86fe563606976e60fe2ba1f3d250e2d0

As our support continues to grow, we want to make sure you're not left behind. These yard signs will be popping up in neighborhoods across the nation, Peter.

We don't want you to miss out on our movement.

That's why our team is sending a yard sign out with
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e3053953dc2bbc21fb57d80b933edcdb8cbf14dc6b7bce486b8277b417387987addce5311814676d799dc75f8a9e0c8b86fe563606976e60fe2ba1f3d250e2d0
every donation of $47.00 or more for those not officially on Team DeSantis yet.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e3053953dc2bbc21fb57d80b933edcdb8cbf14dc6b7bce486b8277b417387987addce5311814676d799dc75f8a9e0c8b86fe563606976e60fe2ba1f3d250e2d0
DONATE TODAY >> GET YOUR YARD SIGN

We hope to see you on the trail,

Team DeSantis

P.S. Friendly reminder that during the month of June, our team is hand-writing the names of the first 100,000 DeSantis for President donors on the walls of the campaign HQ. Consider donating today to see your name go down in history with us!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e3053953dc2bbc2190d5dda107a71f46eaa1a1ae69c216ee693523240ec65a31d276f931156496e5acb41782028996c56b102788db5b38f8a2555f49562a2991
DONATE ANY AMOUNT TO JOIN TEAM DESANTIS

Meet Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e3053953dc2bbc21fb57d80b933edcdb8cbf14dc6b7bce486b8277b417387987addce5311814676d799dc75f8a9e0c8b86fe563606976e60fe2ba1f3d250e2d0

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
-
Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
-
Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,
-
Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,
-
Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,
-
Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,
-
Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
-
Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
-
Protecting the unborn,
-
Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,
-
Expanding education freedom,
-
Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,
-
Lowering prescription drug costs,
-
Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,
-
Creating a universal school choice program,
-
Delivering record-breaking tax relief,
-
Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
-
Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
-
Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,
-
Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,
-
...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
-
Record tax relief
-
ESG prohibitions
-
Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP
-
The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.
-
Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency
-
Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI
-
Improvements to our state’s infrastructure
-
Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists
-
The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis
-
Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions
-
Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida
No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Watching this former student over the years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I still remember the first time I met her.
Derek, Elizabeth Warren here.
As a law professor, I had the privilege of getting to know so many brilliant, hardworking students over the years.
And now I have the honor of supporting one of them for U.S. Senate.
Her name is Katie Porter.
Maybe you’ve seen how she wields a whiteboard. Maybe you’ve heard the tough questions she asks Wall Street CEOs. And maybe you’re ready to help send this courageous champion to the Senate, so she can keep fighting for families in California and across the country.
**[Can you split a donation of $5 or any amount between Katie Porter’s campaign and our re-election today? Katie’s in a competitive primary, and neither of us take any money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Wall Street Banks — grassroots supporters like you help keep us in the fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230605-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI05_1_WAR_20230605_V1_F&refcode2=24059_3422442_KBh4NU&akid=24059%2E3422442%2EKBh4NU)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230605-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI05_1_WAR_20230605_V1_F&refcode2=24059_3422442_KBh4NU&akid=24059%2E3422442%2EKBh4NU)**
I still remember the day when I met Katie. My consumer law class was early in the morning, meaning a lot of students had their heads down, trying to avoid being called on. But not Katie. She was determined and ready to go. When the first answer she gave wasn’t her strongest, she came to my office hours and said, “Please keep calling on me. I am going to learn to do this.”
Getting to know her, I saw her bone-deep commitment to making a difference in people’s lives.
Years later, then-Attorney General of California Kamala Harris secured a settlement of $18 billion from our country’s biggest banks for their predatory lending practices. She called me asking if I knew anyone who could serve as an “independent monitor” and make sure the big banks paid up. I recommended Katie for this massive undertaking, and boy did she deliver. She served as a watchdog over Wall Street banks, held their feet to the fire, and ensured California families received the billions they were owed.
When Katie decided to run for Congress in 2018, I was very happy to support her. I knew that we needed more people like her in Washington — who understood the real experiences that working families faced, who had the courage to stand up to big corporations and special interests, and who would fight to make our government work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.
A Democrat hadn’t represented her district for decades, but she knew exactly how to personally connect with voters, build a strong movement, and win. She flipped that seat, and she’s been winning for working people ever since.
Simply put, Katie delivers. She’s smart and she isn’t afraid. She stands up to Wall Street and Big Pharma, she holds fossil fuel companies accountable, and she fights to protect our rights. She is exactly who Californians need as their next senator, and I’m very happy to support her.
[**We need her (and her whiteboard) in the Senate. She’s running a people-powered campaign just like ours, and I’d be so grateful if you could split a donation between our campaigns today to support our fight for working families in the Senate. Every dollar makes a difference as Katie builds her grassroots team.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230605-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI05_1_WAR_20230605_V1_F&refcode2=24059_3422442_KBh4NU&akid=24059%2E3422442%2EKBh4NU)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230605-1?refcode=EMAI05_1_WAR_20230605_V1_F&t=1&refcode2=24059_3422442_KBh4NU&akid=24059%2E3422442%2EKBh4NU)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=2&akid=24059%2E3422442%2EKBh4NU)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=24059%2E3422442%2EKBh4NU)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx0kk9vnDAQxT-NubEyYzD0wCFZSqtWiqo0UtWTNfjP4soG1jYl--0ryDaHSvXxN-_Z78mDfnHW3FpSPxKA0apIAAh7IADXn5sP6y__9VPO-S2_8idf7UM4E4B0W_S78n7JSXu0bqd1l6kWORqtMt0WvKk-NE1RQza2yFWlgBYoVSM5q6Q0kqPkhTaNKanKbAsUGOW0KhoKFT2VlA-gBqprKGnBG1LS46ETFhuGMM_-JGefuXZMaYlHop5Av23badQY7HTJ0aoc1W8r9S4l0CsC_aBjEneFQKuiQGMo7G7Wo0yEdQ_nF7qfipW0eDi_EOBr8iLOa5CasC55vCOvlV09YR0aY53FpO8DiX5Be5kI69Yo9CTQiRFRvOtE8riTHF9zNa-D0yImDMOMQYktiASCiv8EWdbB2TjqIKwirPv-10eAx3V4gz8wPM976bc485T0tHebpMu_hM_Vs4Jvj68EuJjcYfgHHjvBuuLpo-nwestCq5bNOmcjr0lJL8dXyNn_CQAA__9FbbuJ)
[ ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx0ksGO2ywUhZ8G7xzhSwyZhRf54_G_qDSLNlLVFboYiGnBdgDXzdtX9qSzqFSW3z0HzhEXw-ydfTRE_EcABqcTASDsTADu39YQl-_h0_8l54_yzt9CvQ3hQgDyYzYfyuclBxPQ-Y2KttANcrRGF6ap-Kl-OZ0qAcXQ1BSFshSZBWEVYG81vFihhWKa9gwK1wAFRjmtqxOFmh6OlCvQihoBR1rxEznS_aEDVivGOE3h0E-h8M2Q85z2RB2Bbl3Xw2AwuvFWotMl6p-uN5uUQKcJdMqkLJ8KiU4nidZS2Nyswz4T1p4vV7qdmh1pdb5cCfAlB5mmJfaGsDYHfKJgtFsCYS1a67zDbJ6DHsOM7jYS1i5JmlGilwOi_NDJHHAjJf4q9bQob2TKGNWEUcs1ygySyn8EmRflXRpMlE4T1n754yPA06Le4VeMn6et9Hucacxm3LqNvS_Fq762kev7DwJcjn43_AX3nWBt9fZqW7w_itjoeXXeu8QFOdLb_hX9FH4HAAD___-hu74)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**

JUNE 2023**

Patriot,

I thought I'd see a HUGE response to my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey, but it hasn't happened.

This input is desperately needed to shape the party's strategy for this MUST-WIN election. Joe Biden and the liberal media hate that we are so closely involved with our grassroots base. This survey is the type of thing that gives him nightmares.

You don't have to write anything fancy, just tell me what matters to you.

So, I'm inviting you one LAST time today.

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: We Need Your Input on Ranked Choice Voting
body:
The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=db1377c214ef4f6dac12460001f71ec7&_e=NAZq5YaUBFIeIWiIq0GCf6yDx0sCWaKaJrX6lyLZAR7tyh3POANS2Q0uOjzJIm52nd4RZ7BFk6d5iGS773sALVfUnnrWzRtOiDpSaGok5w0jIIjVbvoS82OUudCuXJWTIyodh9lWpjloudX8sIxiMHdwzFsaJJLBmqAvH2e32FO7KiZWClnws4MT5hxB_gxXDDH16PJKvnXOvAc1t6Zb7e6bv5WXKmHoypQ1-0Mbd6GN-ugy0W6c8MQ16L1C-E4ZGTq_9BRpE5A805Dmi-dd8ZIRR4VCZ4QU2y85STFBzXgkDoUCwfuc8xlHwMggL7ebu2KoKfn98JXLhghU4yE472qkQewcuH75pPkk4rc76y9ydfzubtWOE4GVodg1KK9C)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=db1377c214ef4f6dac12460001f71ec7&_e=NAZq5YaUBFIeIWiIq0GCf6yDx0sCWaKaJrX6lyLZAR7tyh3POANS2Q0uOjzJIm52nd4RZ7BFk6d5iGS773sALVfUnnrWzRtOiDpSaGok5w0jIIjVbvoS82OUudCuXJWTIyodh9lWpjloudX8sIxiMHdwzFsaJJLBmqAvH2e32FO7KiZWClnws4MT5hxB_gxXDDH16PJKvnXOvAc1t6Zb7e6bv5WXKmHoypQ1-0Mbd6EMoeoc_jpkqUzJ0xKWyS-bCV3ooF5-cd5QS9gStZBD1a6BXBCm_R-AJiqFUUfaQ5lABzBPHC1u5iWFgR8vVOTj30oaJOY5byJRDtI9l6W-12tWp6jrp2K6n6ejTqW_bHszYOXnBEIopbCDce3wXITE)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: I'm Dr. Brian Williams, and I'm running for Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
I’m an Air Force Veteran, a trauma surgeon, a gun safety advocate, and a candidate for Congress in Texas’ 32nd District.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64362823/409853222/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230605WilsonOnboard_BW_9_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJmMDIxZDUtY2IwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=InCLpoBpGy-6g0UQzfeFbGAWcMEos3bpiog_YU5jhJs=)
Peter,

My name is Dr. Brian Williams. I’m an Air Force Veteran, trauma surgeon, gun safety advocate, and most recently, a candidate for Congress in Texas’ 32nd District.

Dallas is my home, and the only home my daughter has ever known. Working in the city’s operating rooms, I treated the never-ending flow of victims of gun violence.

I also witnessed the heartbreaking reality that our laws have made healthcare inaccessible to far too many people. Trying to ebb the constant stream of sick, injured, and dying people into my trauma center led me to realize that I needed to go beyond merely treating the wounds brought to me – _I needed to address the root causes of the problem itself._ That is why I’m running for Congress!

[Our country is in crisis, and I was taught to always answer the call to serve when my community and country needed me. I’m ready to use my experience to bring change beyond my white coat to our communities, but I can’t do it alone. Will you become a Founding Member of my campaign by contributing $15, $32, or whatever you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64362824/409853223/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230605WilsonOnboard_BW_9_l1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJmMDIxZDUtY2IwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=InCLpoBpGy-6g0UQzfeFbGAWcMEos3bpiog_YU5jhJs=)
| [DONATE TO MY CAMPAIGN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64362825/409853224/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230605WilsonOnboard_BW_9_b1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJmMDIxZDUtY2IwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=InCLpoBpGy-6g0UQzfeFbGAWcMEos3bpiog_YU5jhJs=)
---

When I was a young boy, I’d watch my father put on his Air Force uniform every day. His example led me to my own military service and as a cadet at the United States Air Force Academy, the values of duty and justice were further instilled in me. After completing my surgical residency at Harvard Medical School, I chose to work at safety-net hospitals so I could care for the people who need it most – people who are either overlooked or underserved by our healthcare system.

My trauma center was a barometer of the health of our nation, and the decisions of lawmakers determined who came through those doors. I grieved for gun violence victims alongside their families, every single one of them failed by our lawmakers unwilling to prioritize gun safety. I cared for sick community members unable to afford the basic preventative care that could have kept them out of my operating room. And I’ve cared for women with obstetric emergencies in a state where their reproductive freedoms are under attack.

I’ve seen the issues our country is facing through my patients’ eyes, and I’m ready to be a voice for them as the very first trauma surgeon to ever serve in Congress – but I need a strong team supporting my campaign every step of the way to get there. [Will you join me in answering this call to service by contributing $15, $32, or whatever you’re able to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64362826/409853225/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230605WilsonOnboard_BW_9_l2&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJmMDIxZDUtY2IwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=InCLpoBpGy-6g0UQzfeFbGAWcMEos3bpiog_YU5jhJs=)

Thank you for your support. Together, we can change policy and save lives.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64362827/409853226/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230605WilsonOnboard_BW_9_biopic&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJmMDIxZDUtY2IwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=InCLpoBpGy-6g0UQzfeFbGAWcMEos3bpiog_YU5jhJs=)

– Dr. Brian Williams
Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives.

You can support Dr. Williams’ campaign for Texas’ 32nd Congressional District by making a one-time contribution here:
---
[DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64362828/409853227/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230605WilsonOnboard_BW_9_biobox&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJmMDIxZDUtY2IwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=InCLpoBpGy-6g0UQzfeFbGAWcMEos3bpiog_YU5jhJs=)

name: Wes Moore
subject: The beauty of this moment
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64363055/409854245/-1246499856?refcode=fl_em_na_20230605eomty_wm_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDZmY2E1MS1jYzAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RIsh93nQXpFZWgTfnLe9Tl4lUmO-Zyl-Y3RSsQ7xrjY=)
---
Team, To say this community is a blessing would be an understatement. Every end-of-month fundraising goal, every mile traveling Maryland, every door knocked, every bill passed in our first legislative session – it all adds up... To moving Maryland forward. To building a state where no one is left behind. To being a place where people are proud to live and want to live. Of course our work is not done. Truly, it will never fully be done – it will simply be work we hand off to the next generation to continue. But when your goal is nothing short of bending the moral arc of the universe, it becomes all the more important to celebrate the benchmarks along the way. To pause and to look back at the path behind you before summoning the courage to take that next step on the path ahead of you. So I send this note to thank you for another amazing month. For another goal hit. And to reflect on the beauty of this moment before we turn and face the one ahead. Elevate, Wes P.S. [If you're already ready to face the next moment, you can always take that next step by pitching in. But really, it's ok to also just stop and savor where we are right now, too.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64363058/409854248/-1246499856?refcode=fl_em_na_20230605eomty_wm_180da_xx_ps&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDZmY2E1MS1jYzAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RIsh93nQXpFZWgTfnLe9Tl4lUmO-Zyl-Y3RSsQ7xrjY=)
---
| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind.

clean_body: | = Team, To say this community is a blessing would be an understatement. Every end-of-month fundraising goal, every mile traveling Maryland, every door knocked, every bill passed in our first legislative session – it all adds up... To moving Maryland forward. To building a state where no one is left behind. To being a place where people are proud to live and want to live. Of course our work is not done. Truly, it will never fully be done – it will simply be work we hand off to the next generation to continue. But when your goal is nothing short of bending the moral arc of the universe, it becomes all the more important to celebrate the benchmarks along the way. To pause and to look back at the path behind you before summoning the courage to take that next step on the path ahead of you. So I send this note to thank you for another amazing month. For another goal hit. And to reflect on the beauty of this moment before we turn and face the one ahead. Elevate, Wes P.S. = | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. body:
The most substantial bipartisan act of government in the Texas Legislature occurred last weekend: the historic impeachment of Texas AG Ken Paxton | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/jaworski-press-release-1-13848642?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=fa3c6c941f&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | ,

The most substantial and meaningful bipartisan act of government in the 88th Texas Legislature occurred last weekend: the historic impeachment of Texas Attorney General Warren Kenneth “Ken” Paxton, Jr.

[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=a626d76026&e=5d8d80652b)

America’s toxic political environment burns while partisans rejoice in their opponents’ defeat, but Paxton’s remarkable fall should instead elicit somber reflection on the state of our politics. The impeachment trial of Warren Kenneth Paxton, Jr. is arguably the most important political event of the year, certainly in Texas, and quite possibly the United States. The Paxton verdict will be a weathervane for the 2024 elections in Texas. Voters argue just about every issue, but no one supports corruption. Mr. Paxton will soon have an opportunity to explain his conduct, and Texas’ 31 senators—one of which is, in fact, Mr. Paxton’s wife—will sit as jurors, weighing every word. The Paxton verdict will reveal the deeper meaning of our political moment. And it will determine whether members of both parties can unite over one simple value: our most powerful government officials cannot be above the law. [**Read my entire editorial at the Daily Beast.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=ad731ad029&e=5d8d80652b)

Joe Jaworski

clean_body: If you were ever going to read an email, read this one. | Peter, You've got to trust me when I say if you were ever going to donate off a fundraising email, it should be this one. The Senate Majority is up for grabs in 2024, and right now I 'm so anxious about our chances to take it back. My team and I are trying to recruit top notch conservatives to flip the Senate and retake control of Congress. To do that, we need resources so our candidate's know they won't get buried by a wave of leftist cash. I didn't want to be the one to tell you, BUT:We 're about to miss our biggest deadline yet. When my team told me the news, I was shocked. I couldn't believe we'd fallen so far behind and that all the Socialist Left was ready to pounce because I didn't have the resources to defend myself and my team from their attacks... Without your help. That's why we have these final few days to turn things around, and I hope you'll do everything in your power to help me turn things around. THIS IS THE BIGGEST AND MOST URGENT DEADLINE OF THE YEAR SO FAR. TAKE ADVANTAGE OF THIS IMPACT WHILE IT LASTS! I hope people take this email seriously and ACT. We can 't miss these deadlines. We really can't. JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. body:
Here's what I've been working on for you and your family over the last couple of weeks:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64363191/409854760/-345890914?refcode=EM_FR_230605NoteFromNikki_NB_9&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWMzNzljOS1jYzAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6tCy4WpNDRkqINT1pEGRdbny9DQ8V0-ho34aSHkG7M8=)
Hey – it’s Nikki.

I wanted to give you a quick update on what I’ve been working on for you and your family in Congress over the last couple of weeks:

→ Securing infrastructure investments to modernize our rail system in Illinois and ensure accessible, affordable transportation no matter your zip code

→ Creating reform and accountability for the misuse of funds intended to support our veterans

→ Sponsoring bipartisan legislation to support biofuels, bolstering our energy production and increasing opportunities for farmers

→ Supporting a bipartisan debt ceiling deal that prioritizes our seniors and families over political extremes

I’m proud to represent you each and every day in Congress, and to work with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to create meaningful change for our communities. I’m also working to protect this seat from a Republican opponent in 2024 so I can keep delivering results for working families in central and southern Illinois – but that’s not work I can take on alone.

body:
Dan wants to hear your thoughts! |
#
---
Hi Peter, We’re reaching out to Dan’s top supporters today to ask if you can help him and House Democrats stay united and focused on the concerns of folks like you by taking his **[Official June Priorities Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64363281/409855134/-767300573?contactdata=uSjLeNJxXvbkVqadwhhtbbGisN2ovb7VqOJurX+nkWSY/48n27hCHNFTCm9dd0Kbuzz+6i5GODlP8FeoU8ggDbvoBq6LY3SgO5mJIYUj8OXw2SO5V8uVr2l/QZ6yv55/4vA6gf1/HeDl+BGSj76R7wPNuT6k4aUXyZFxfg3Hyjg=&refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNThkZWNlZS1jYzAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GW5uA2335q_a_oVU6YbiyMmScely3aQ-_-EgIHy5BrE=&emci=48db820d-c803-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=058decee-cc03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823)**. This campaign has always been about lifting up every voice across the country. And hearing the diverse ideas, concerns, and perspectives of dedicated Americans like you is a critical part of Dan’s work to make Washington work for everyone. **[Peter, Dan is committed to defending our democracy and fighting for a progressive agenda despite MAGA Republicans’ extraordinary efforts to take us backwards. What are you most concerned about? name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Take Action Against Ranked Choice Voting NOW!
body:
This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr7aio25dh1f4pn57g334k4foedit1h6olvh5hlo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g6cpj2c1h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

As the President of The Heritage Foundation, I must urgently ask for your help in fighting against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

It's time to take a stand! We need your voice and input to tackle this dangerous reform that could wreak havoc on our electoral process.

**Please, take just a few minutes to complete our RCV survey by clicking the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztesl3tsbit6cua31ofvt4om1hjfk6i5qnieg088_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g6cpj2c1h2bs)**

By participating, you'll be joining the battle to protect our democracy and ensure the integrity of our elections. After completing the survey, you'll receive a copy of our exclusive RCV fact sheet that lays out the shocking truth behind this controversial system.

Together, we can make a difference and preserve the democratic process that defines our great nation.

**[Let's take action against Ranked Choice Voting today!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi5arp8r9lb11bccj8rpv7vbmm80l9cfhs887kjo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g6cpj2c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your passion for preserving our democracy.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: Sign the Petition: Tell GOP State Legislatures to Stop Attacking on Voting Rights
body:

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2c8b40c-37cc-4dd2-ac1d-6d7b39b32299/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **[Sign the Petition: Tell GOP State Legislatures to Stop Attacking on Voting Rights](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d6ac0c9-11af-413a-91f8-c6b030bc26b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Many states have enacted strict voting laws since the 2020 election attempting to strip away access to the ballot box and make it more difficult for voters to cast a ballot. Americans deserve fair elections and to have a say on the important issues that affect our lives. Yet so far this year Republican-controlled legislatures have signed 18 bills in 10 states into law that aim to add new restrictions on elections and make it harder for young voters and voters of color to vote. **[Sign the petition to tell Republican state legislatures to stop attacking voting rights.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c847bc1-c3a0-4b2c-8ec4-579e469c8ed9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Cliff

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40170a69-acd4-4ad0-a501-26eaecd7fba0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: This was so much fun!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
I hope you'll join us today

| |
---
| | | **THE 1ST ANNUAL SPEAKER'S SURVEY
JUNE 2023**
---

Patriot,

I thought I'd see a HUGE response to my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey, but it hasn't happened.

clean_body: West Virginia is our BEST opportunity to pick up a Democrat-held Senate seat in 2024 and the Left knows it. | | | Fellow American, Joe Biden's DOJ is coming after Jim Justice. West Virginia is our BEST opportunity to pick up a Democrat-held Senate seat in 2024 and the Left knows it. That's why they are weaponizing the DOJ to attack one of the country's most popular Republican governors. We need to rally behind Jim Justice if we are going to flip this seat. Don't let Washington liberals attack the good name of Jim Justice. Thanks, Steve Daines From: Governor Jim Justice Date: June 1, 2023 Subject: A BRAZEN attack on me and my family "Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and the Democrats have seen the polls that show Jim Justice winning this race, and they're panicking. So now the Biden Justice Department has decided to play politics. We will see a lot more of this as the Democrats work to help Alex Mooney because they know they can easily beat him." - Roman Stauffer, Campaign Manager, Jim Justice for U.S. Senate Fellow Conservative: This week, a poll was released showing me as the clear favorite in the 2024 U.S. Senate race in West Virginia. Head-to-head, I beat Democrat Joe Manchin – no questions asked. However, the same poll found my Republican primary opponent and Sen. Joe Manchin TIED in a 1:1 matchup. You read that right. Should I become the nominee, Republicans win. If my Republican primary opponent becomes the nominee, Democrats have a better than 50% shot at keeping this Senate seat. First, the Democrat Senatorial Campaign Committee sued my office, seeking access to my records. Biden’s Department of Justice is now SUING my family-owned businesses to tarnish my standing in West Virginia. None of this is a coincidence. If Democrats in D.C. are allowed to get away with this stunt, the chances of Republicans flipping this critical Senate seat evaporate. The poll released this week proves that. Democrats know that I am the only Republican who can beat Joe Manchin, so they’re going to extreme lengths to ruin my good name and prop up my opponent at the same time. Less than 24 hours after the poll's release showing that I’m the only Republican in West Virginia who can beat Joe Manchin, I’m being sued by the crooked Biden Justice Department. WILD STUFF. This lawsuit is politically motivated and intended to promote my primary opponent at the expense of my reputation because Democrats think they can beat him in a 1:1 matchup. to help us fight this frivolous, politically motivated attack? Republicans around the country see this attack for what it is: a weaponization of the DOJ to target the President's political opponents. Donald Trump Jr. was one of the first to comment on the pending lawsuit, writing, "Did anyone really think that Biden’s weaponization of the DOJ to target his political opponents was going to stop with Trump? ” And Ted Cruz followed suit soon thereafter, writing, "Utterly brazen. When I said the Biden DOJ is the most political and partisan DOJ in history, I wasn’t kidding ... ” We can’t let Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Senate Democrats get away with this. I need your help. Sincerely, Gov. Jim Justice Republican for U.S. Senate Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Follow Senator Steve Daines ** | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Steve Daines for Montana

name: Kash Patel
subject: Subpoena list for Congress to expose the Deep State
body:
It’s the only way to save our Republic and defend the rule of law in our country.

_Friend, Congress must subpoena these people and documents if they are to expose the weaponization of government. It 's the only way to save our Republic and defend the rule of law in our country. Please read carefully._

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5ksoubro42gjfgtbb3qf9ca1vj3mf16ae0qrgn8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g62or7cph2bs)

Hello Friend,

The deep state has entrenched itself in every major federal institution. I call them government gangsters because they use their power as leverage against Americans to unlawfully influence elections.

If Congress is serious about tackling the weaponization of government, then here is the subpoena list I recommend.

_You may ask yourself, "What credibility does this guy have?!"_

Good question.

I served on the Russiagate committee in Congress. When Devin Nunes asked me to lead the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad, had to be published.

My investigation discovered it was a fraud, and the FBI's investigation was unlawful. They did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump and thought they would never get caught.

And only after leaving government service 2 years ago, I discovered the FBI was spying on me while I served as Senior Counsel on the committee for Devin Nunes. Yes, they subpoenaed my records to get dirt on Devin Nunes because our investigation was exposing FBI/DOJ corruption.

**After my service with President Trump, I founded the Kash Foundation.** The Kash Foundation's goal is to provide financial assistance to veterans, America-first patriots, and whistle-blowers and fund education programs. As you may know, the Russiagate tactic of the radical left is to baselessly prosecute patriots.

**I am urgently asking for your help. I am looking to raise $100,000 online this month to secure critical funding for Kash Foundation.**
[Can you please donate $250, $50, $35, or even $10 today? Click here to donate >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zciht72mnnk1hm6qkihbvi9uf4n7k26i92fv2jso_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g62or7cph2bs)

[Donate >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z89qahbns396oj5sduv46p2gtb5ae0e0uhb6im0g_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g62or7cph2bs)

Congressional Subpoena List
1. **Twitter:** Every contract with FBI/DOJ on election projects (the FBI established an 80-agent task force that met with Twitter weekly before the 2022 election).

2. **FBI and Chris Wray:** He has willingly violated a congressional subpoena and must be brought up on contempt of Congress charges.

3. **James Baker:** Former FBI number 1 lawyer who signed off on the unlawful Trump FISA, once caught and fired. Number 2 lawyer at Twitter.

4. **ALL 51 Intel officials who signed bogus Hunter Biden** laptop letter

5. **Blinken:** He has now lied about his involvement in said letter and must be held to account. Lying to Congress is a federal crime.

6. **Garland:** IRS whistleblower has submitted a valid claim that the Hunter Biden investigation is being politically obstructed. Garland testified under oath that has not happened. Someone's lying.

This is exactly who Congress needs to go after. And guess what? This is only a start!

If you are as concerned about deep state interference, if it is a top priority for you, then please I urge you to support the Kash Foundation.

[I'm counting on you to sustain the Kash Foundation's fight against the deep state. Please consider donating $250, $50, or even just $10 to help defeat the deep state and expose the government gangsters running the show. Click here >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9fs6k5j4lnurqcgvrekc07f91ecu2m7oc2vmg00_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g62or7cph2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmakafdan9ui5luca2m1psbhurnirpp7mb77ig60_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g62or7cph2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi9n07qgpcrrglr5h2q6hm0rrbi22h0mf707dmlo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g62or7cph2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkds19d377284262ga3k74nbt5cf701n458qifc8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g62or7cph2bs)

A critical way to uncover the government gangsters is if brave whistleblowers come forward with the TRUTH.
