name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Lots of News to Share - tonight, 6/5 7p et on Locals and Onward
body:
Please join if you can! Recording will also be available! | | | | | |
---
| | **Lots of News to Share - please join if you can, tonight, 6/5 @ 7p et**
---
Hi Friend!
After a long, epic adventure, I’m finally back in the U.S.A. - and we have a LOT to catch up on.
Things like:
* Happenings in the courts - victory in Konnech and ‘Secure Elections USA’ lawsuits
* Happenings in the news :
* master researcher Kanekoa takes to Twitter to explain our Konnech story. [Gateway Pundit sets the tone](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=6a77e895cf&e=ad8cba7e98)[ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=60327de87f&e=ad8cba7e98)for what will be made public later this week.
* [Kari Lake’s legal team reacts to new video ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c7ee90e2bf&e=ad8cba7e98)from Maricopa, AZ showing printers being reset on the eve of the 2022 Election, which would go on to fail countywide.
* The USPS Inspector General releases a heavily redacted report about the 2020 claim of missing ballots in PA. Joe Fried at American Thinker provides [a good summary and link to the report.](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=bcf915ec89&e=ad8cba7e98)
* [More states withdraw from ERIC ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b72b2050d6&e=ad8cba7e98)
* Some of TTV’s 2024 plans are discussed in an Epoch Times feature, which ET journalist Beth Brelje aptly titled [“Liberty is Messy”](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=82a8ba59d6&e=ad8cba7e98)
* Happenings inside True the Vote - lots good things coming, but the Machine is definitely working overtime to stop us.
* And lastly, lessons learned on my 500 mile sabbatical.

Tonight I’ll be talking about all of the above and more, starting at 7p et.
You can join in from these links:
[**Catherine Engelbrecht Community on LOCALS**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ea229b0b63&e=ad8cba7e98)
[**ONWARD.SOCIAL** ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=57e4ab46ec&e=ad8cba7e98)
Click either one at 7p et and you should see me :). If you can’t join us live, no worries, the podcast will be taped and posted on both platforms.
We have much work to do. So glad to be shoulder to shoulder with so many great Americans who care enough to stand up and keep standing. We’re all in this together. And working together we really can true the vote.
Ever onward-
PS - We are excited about the future, but we need support to make it a reality. [**If you can donate, or better yet, become a recurring donor, please do.** ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ee7b0ca869&e=ad8cba7e98) The battles are bigger than ever.
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=8c0acbf0cb&e=ad8cba7e98)
| | | | |
---
_Copyright © 2023 True the Vote, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in for updates via the True the Vote website.

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=e8ea88858c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=e8ea88858c).
|

name: Replace Sinema
subject: 🚨 Sinema voted to overturn PresidentBiden’s plan
body:
Sinema voted to block student debt relief after taking thousands from the student loan industry | | | Peter – Today, Kyrsten Sinema joined every Senate Republican to overturn President Biden’s plan for relieving student debt. We’re disappointed but not surprised. By contrast, Congressman Ruben Gallego, who we endorsed to replace Sinema, voted to help students and save the plan. Of course, a little digging will tell you that Sinema has accepted tens of thousands of dollars from the student loan industry, including student loan servicers like Navient. On top of that she’s taken more than $100,000 from for-profit schools, the kind of places that rip off veterans and leave students with crushing debt and poor job prospects. **Sinema is a sellout, plain and simple._[Help us let Arizona know so we can replace her in 2024 – make a contribution now >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w-AlXJYyvQKM8Cd9MU7Xxd0xs1S-mOvpx9hMbih8XaVLlPqWWqQft9IloU0YO1JQXFpNfQJMALB6J3npbg5hzsaygZFHI3C76c4yiZ6w856oSsKjIndG2kOMjL-EiETA1eaJSf1PcKwiZiIUxZO_dktQxUwJuqnZkcM0_jL_rtqtz5iKAh_XOrW93MbgjOu2_5-EqlFFw2wte9k64eigO1iHvc_dUfDXvp00MrJ1Zso5c4Fk7oN5LYZdLXJuay2hQZqL6jZVzJEbnLw3qAWCNOWo4O1A6eDLosyST5YAmpGndpWFwib7sDOOJESjzrdZkeKHiFmunpVdd3oqL4bIZu/3ws/jHofN2G7R--8d7XBuNPTWg/h0/Xlc2q73_6QzwGYK-3OEOVLTP9Y5wikyLb_tUbjxT9fY)_ ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w-AlXJYyvQKM8Cd9MU7XxdsvuunTs9ObEvWfnVVc1VOtwqa9k9NtTRJisoOFMskqaNWs7eQZvp9VEwBanonBqVVh1WMNu3sa-HUr6eQCrgMY_eWd1kljwYpZ3V-wIZn1DXttEujdJUH0s7Bcnq9G03Hxz1OKiPAwp0s6RtNuJx86MDTZEESBCChyQgmx62lqVVRzKYwFT1IZzjx6B8Uhk_xacZOxkJQtzFNw0FKjI7Hspq84RT-qxmiH7vbh09DKGLqj3mXr2hYTaF6TPA3uoTZLegJawhWSOTpNled5wzQOyfjhwg7sVPYyoe1tEnZS1MAvsWSKafrQTWQuKVC5kLMhcYTNlk2vniZG7mkECy25iezYV8q-X7dBwfvEUrcYn5IWmV4JXez12OEUjYlFas/3ws/jHofN2G7R--8d7XBuNPTWg/h1/pRvyl3ZoGvUm4bWMzUA6-DdKI4XNL1LKi3tTywxdHpM)

clean_body: Sinema voted to block student debt relief after taking thousands from the student loan industry | | | Peter – Today, Kyrsten Sinema joined every Senate Republican to overturn President Biden’s plan for relieving student debt. We’re disappointed but not surprised. By contrast, Congressman Ruben Gallego, who we endorsed to replace Sinema, voted to help students and save the plan. Of course, a little digging will tell you that Sinema has accepted tens of thousands of dollars from the student loan industry, including student loan servicers like Navient. On top of that she’s taken more than $100,000 from for-profit schools, the kind of places that rip off veterans and leave students with crushing debt and poor job prospects. Sinema is a sellout, plain and simple. **First,** Texas lawmakers tried to close a library that wouldn't withdraw books from the shelves.

| | | |
# While You Were Sleeping
June 6, 2023
---
| Hey Sleep Foundation readers. Welcome to our first issue of **While You Were Sleeping**! You may have noticed, we’re changing the way we’re doing our newsletters around here. We want to not only focus on getting you the resources you need to help improve your sleep, but also build a community focused around getting better sleep. Each week, this email will be curated by a team member of our Sleep Foundation team. This week we'll highlight:
* If it’s safe to take melatonin every night
* White noise and how it can be helpful to help you fall asleep
* A recent study on how evening social media use affects sleep

Let us know what you think of this new newsletter by replying to this email and what topics you’d be interested in seeing soon!

## Sleep Tip of the Week
Decide on a bedtime and wake-up time that are most conducive to your schedule and stick to them every day, including on weekends. Following a consistent sleep schedule helps train your brain to naturally feel tired at bedtime.
## Featured Sleep Topics
### Can You Take Melatonin Every Night?
Many of us use melatonin to help us fall asleep faster, but is it safe to take this supplement every day? [Learn more about the side effects and concerns about long-term melatonin use](https://trk.klclick.com/ls/click?upn=TkVdrPNxuhJ01OVeLW3Zmb7oVphrhlinOUEn7YLa7D5FElnkgCJUbgQP8fjHCWykVBgJ60i3AOMPgnTvQBDocyJu6vXhcMWKlKB9XWyjM06BmZ0JOGBgxXZy1V8KGm1pEqms5V0BqtayXpVh0n4hvEF1IH8rcKQPYnj2B6-2BVDuiSG3pWJCb34jXRspQqucJa-2Bq6Fz1FGa4U75LtGOgiMWfB2d5uIdgQD6SVIzdNLCd-2BlrwjLiyYKs9p2Yadyx-2BARLwFeRhQLkB535JLYm-2Fug9VMIqXHa1mN7UZvrDAvRq-2Bc2DzvbTpKDqaw5drwR2IIHUClJnfYqJjIwkhInLQQyLcwRUahVmETTbthe2vGea9-2FJN6FrMGeZDx3tCsenJicvSpYG5ALNZvGVjs03c9tEo81f7UasQs-2F5ne7Y3nyhGifMHZrepQjVNKLtaPUNM60YUFTHp5gm3kACHxYcz4ejXg-3D-3DQ04g_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhPNoyNNs9JMNQ4Sbb-2BxTu6YCTD71UYJAe3hAoDjD-2F2LS-2FHZXiHwEVTPiIMYIhOqXAvX7-2BeluFUGSP6LXyeX3vZTW4C9YrsIsfWbLdraThk8WSeckmELWCWixYLo1rbIM-2FMWjXwXpkS8LpWHZPac8YsVjmP8svSJZy4J1CM1ms-2FInwbjgb-2BepL1A6suWlfoWWRHicjMjGl3Nzq3DffLxUbNwa9EpJc2HpGeX-2FO8Vl-2FA52IbhPu-2F-2BHRmD1ISgTiUi3-2B1JjIJm9IEO9wxnQg49GxXlboByD6hADyDB7K0-2Foin7gZPI3fKDWkKpZ9IX3sx9v0AWM288QgQCHXe-2FvyAMcN5WKG-2BIvVINwcbsXlyVgCKjRnR0OlXERYSoemPQLVEEhQ-3D), and what to do if you still struggle with sleep without melatonin.
### White Noise And Sleep

clean_body: Our new and improved weekly sleep newsletter | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | While You Were Sleeping June 6, 2023 | Hey Sleep Foundation readers. Welcome to our first issue of While You Were Sleeping! You may have noticed, we’re changing the way we’re doing our newsletters around here. We want to not only focus on getting you the resources you need to help improve your sleep, but also build a community focused around getting better sleep. Each week, this email will be curated by a team member of our Sleep Foundation team. This week we'll highlight: If it’s safe to take melatonin every night White noise and how it can be helpful to help you fall asleep * A recent study on how evening social media use affects sleep Let us know what you think of this new newsletter by replying to this email and what topics you’d be interested in seeing soon! Sleep Tip of the Week Decide on a bedtime and wake-up time that are most conducive to your schedule and stick to them every day, including on weekends. Following a consistent sleep schedule helps train your brain to naturally feel tired at bedtime. Featured Sleep Topics Can You Take Melatonin Every Night? Many of us use melatonin to help us fall asleep faster, but is it safe to take this supplement every day? , and what to do if you still struggle with sleep without melatonin. White Noise And Sleep Some people find that the neutral sound of , but does this work for everyone? We reviewed recent research and studies on white noise and offer suggestions on what to look for in a white noise machine. ICYMI: Yogabed Giveaway a queen-sized Yogabed Cool Gel Memory Foam mattress! The more actions you complete, the more chances you have to win. Submit your entries before 6/30. | Sleep Quiz Which of the following describes the habit of grinding or clenching your teeth while sleeping? A. Sleep Apnea B. Dysania C. Bruxism D. Rhythmic Movement Disorder Scroll to the bottom of this email for the answer! | Sleep in the News Causal Association Found Between Evening Social Media Use and Delayed Sleep A team of psychiatrists from Duke University and Yale University has found what they describe as a . Learn what they discovered after analyzing the sleeping patterns for 44,000 Reddit users. | | | | | | Newsletter Curator: Katie Tu, Email Content Manager This week I wanted to focus on tips to help you fall asleep. Check out my on Sleep Foundation's YouTube to add to your nightly routine. | | | | Quiz Answer The correct answer is C. , which can be caused by high stress levels, medications, irregular sleep patterns, and more. | | | | | | | Sleep Foundation, A OneCare Media Company 1414 NE 42nd St 400 Seattle, WA 98105 | Disclaimer: SleepFoundation.org is not affiliated with the National Sleep Foundation, an independent nonprofit based in Washington, DC. The content on SleepFoundation.org is for informational purposes only. SleepFoundation.org does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment options.

name: Greg Landsman
subject: My most important vote yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
Last week, I cast the most important vote I’ve taken as a member of Congress. Alongside a bipartisan group of my colleagues on Wednesday, I voted to avoid a catastrophic default while ensuring the folks at home didn’t lose the benefits they deserve.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64367532/409863258/1921099384?refcode=em_eng_2023.06.05_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWU0ODQ3NS1kNTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ctbHNkFeK8JcA22ZggbRozUa1t8GUzBI1ro4EjMwz_g=)
---
Friend - Last week, I cast the most important vote I’ve taken as a member of Congress.

**Alongside a bipartisan group of my colleagues on Wednesday, I voted to avoid a catastrophic default** while ensuring the folks at home didn’t lose the benefits they deserve.

First, I want to make one thing clear: While I was proud to vote for this bill, we cannot normalize this process.

The livelihoods of millions of hardworking Americans should never be used as bargaining chips in Washington. And a radical faction of an extreme political party should not have the power to hold our economy hostage.

The final bipartisan bill, however, protected Social Security payments, safeguarded veterans’ benefits, and ensured that no child would lose access to SNAP benefits.

**I ran for Congress to be a bipartisan, pragmatic leader committed to getting things done for our children and families.** And every day, I strive to be the transparent, accountable, and reliable leader that Southwest Ohioans elected me to be.

That’s who I am. And that’s why I voted yes on the Bipartisan Budget Agreement.

Appreciate you listening,

Greg

_P.S. Congress needs to expand the number of pragmatic, bipartisan leaders determined to deliver for the American people.**[If you agree, will you chip in a few dollars to my re-election campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64367533/409863259/1921099384?refcode=em_eng_2023.06.05_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWU0ODQ3NS1kNTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ctbHNkFeK8JcA22ZggbRozUa1t8GUzBI1ro4EjMwz_g=)**_

name: Andy Kim
subject: LGBTQI+ inclusion, acceptance, and living openly make our country better.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Happy Pride!

Love is love, and LGBTQI+ inclusion, acceptance, and living openly make our country better.

Breaking down barriers and bringing more people to the table allows us to benefit from diverse ideas and perspectives. When we listen to members of the LGBTQI+ community, we can create a safer and more supportive country for everyone to be who they are.

Pride serves as a powerful reminder that community matters and progress is not inevitable, but it's worth fighting for.

As we've seen with Republicans' onslaught of discriminatory laws and policies, backsliding is not only possible, it is a real threat.

Our nation's direction will be determined by those who stand up in uncertain times.

Please join me in supporting LGBTQI+ Americans and standing against the spread of right-wing hatred and bigotry. Together we can create a world where everyone has the freedom to live safely wherever they call home.

In solidarity,

Andy

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: I’m demanding action from our leaders to end the epidemic of gun violence- will you join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
Change is possible when our Representatives take bold action

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64367674/409863426/1633369994?refcode=EM_PET_230605GunViolence_DBW_6_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzZiZTNiOTctZDUwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0EiyIwVu-pf9ODTBGAwsypmIT6PUa-HGrKtyX2p2nR4=)
Peter,

Throughout my career on the frontlines, I’ve seen too much preventable death and suffering as a result of gun violence. As a trauma surgeon, I’ve had to wreck the lives of far too many mothers by delivering the news of the deaths of their children.

Over Memorial Day weekend, there were more than 20 mass shootings in the US. In Texas, we’ve led the nation in mass shootings since the tragedy in Uvalde just over a year ago. And just days before I launched my campaign, 8 people were killed in Allen at the outlet mall I myself have visited with my wife and daughter many times.

June is Gun Violence Awareness Month, and together we must demand our elected officials take bold action to end the epidemic of gun violence.

We can do big things in Washington to save lives. As an advisor to Senator Chris Murphy, I learned that bipartisan solutions can be achieved in Congress, and witnessed our lawmakers pass the most significant legislation in three decades to increase gun safety and reduce violence. Still, our country endures the ceaseless human toll of gun violence every day. We need more leaders in Congress who will take bold action.

I’m calling on our leaders to display that courage by raising the age to purchase weapons of any kind and banning weapons of war from our streets. This campaign is just one part of my efforts to promote gun safety and save lives. Now, I need you to join me.

[Will you add your name to my petition, calling on our leaders in Washington to pass meaningful, comprehensive gun safety legislation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64367676/409863434/-104756312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzZiZTNiOTctZDUwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0EiyIwVu-pf9ODTBGAwsypmIT6PUa-HGrKtyX2p2nR4=&emci=5bb9e74d-5a01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=36be3b97-d503-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13106008)
| [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64367677/409863443/-104756312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzZiZTNiOTctZDUwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0EiyIwVu-pf9ODTBGAwsypmIT6PUa-HGrKtyX2p2nR4=&emci=5bb9e74d-5a01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=36be3b97-d503-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13106008)
---

Together, we can create life-saving change. Thank you for standing with me.

Onward,

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64367678/409863447/-104756312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzZiZTNiOTctZDUwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0EiyIwVu-pf9ODTBGAwsypmIT6PUa-HGrKtyX2p2nR4=&emci=5bb9e74d-5a01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=36be3b97-d503-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13106008)

Brian
Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives.

clean_body: Change is possible when our Representatives take bold action = Peter, Throughout my career on the frontlines, I’ve seen too much preventable death and suffering as a result of gun violence. As a trauma surgeon, I’ve had to wreck the lives of far too many mothers by delivering the news of the deaths of their children. Over Memorial Day weekend, there were more than 20 mass shootings in the US. In Texas, we’ve led the nation in mass shootings since the tragedy in Uvalde just over a year ago. And just days before I launched my campaign, 8 people were killed in Allen at the outlet mall I myself have visited with my wife and daughter many times. June is Gun Violence Awareness Month, and together we must demand our elected officials take bold action to end the epidemic of gun violence. We can do big things in Washington to save lives. As an advisor to Senator Chris Murphy, I learned that bipartisan solutions can be achieved in Congress, and witnessed our lawmakers pass the most significant legislation in three decades to increase gun safety and reduce violence. Still, our country endures the ceaseless human toll of gun violence every day. We need more leaders in Congress who will take bold action. I’m calling on our leaders to display that courage by raising the age to purchase weapons of any kind and banning weapons of war from our streets. This campaign is just one part of my efforts to promote gun safety and save lives. Now, I need you to join me. | Together, we can create life-saving change. Thank you for standing with me. Onward, Brian Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives. name: Team Tim Scott
subject: If you couldn’t tune in
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
We're not sure the hosts knew what they were in for!

| |
---
| | | Friend,

Wow. Tim just finished his appearance on The View and he was 🔥!
**"And one of the reasons why I'm on the show is because of the comments that were made frankly on this show, that the only way for a young African American kid to be successful in this country is to be the exception and not the rule that is a dangerous, offensive, disgusting message to send to our young people today that the only way to succeed is by being the exception."**
_\- Tim Scott, The View, 06/05/23_

---
| | | [STAND WITH TIM SCOTT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg08rtpfb5oj59tuj47r69pdupf20vne6fc1v98o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g66p72cdh2bs "STAND WITH TIM SCOTT")

He spoke on many of the tough issues facing our nation like poverty, crime, the economy, and had the hosts speechless. His message of optimism, of hope, is one they couldn't argue with, but they tried!

Friend, if you didn't get a chance to watch Tim, you can see a clip here:

If you think Tim did a great job of representing our shared conservative beliefs, then won't you join us in standing with him today? $5 or more will help us continue spreading Tim's message across this amazing country.

This race isn't going to be easy but Tim knows our future is worth fighting for. That's why he's giving this campaign everything he's got.

Team Tim Scott

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn4gsohfem5gns77oq761qm3e64vq2rhfqabhq48_rp22sh2s8i66o73c1g66p72cdh2bs "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. clean_body: Don't let our values be silenced. Stand with us today... | Not interested? . Dear Peter, I'm reaching out to you today as we face a pivotal moment in our history. The wokeness wave is crashing upon our society, threatening to erode the values we hold dear. The recent controversial Pride merchandising by Target and their financial support for organizations promoting questionable ideologies is an alarming testament to this disturbing trend. Imagine Florida - a state that once cherished freedom, individual liberty, and conservative values - being swept away in this tide of wokeness. I assure you, Peter, that the world our children and grandchildren would inherit could be very different from the one we've known and cherished. But here's the good news - it's not too late. We still have the power to change the course of this narrative. Your immediate action is crucial as we're rapidly approaching the deadline, 11:59 PM TONIGHT. PLEASE CONFIRM YOUR INFORMATION BELOW: | | PLEASE SIGN NOW >> By standing together, we can send a strong message to corporations like Target and others who choose to push these ideologies on us. We can show them that we will not be silent. We will not be ignored. We will stand up for our beliefs. Your support has always been the backbone of our mission, Peter. I want to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for your unwavering commitment to our cause. It's people like you who give us the strength to continue fighting for what's right. With sincere thanks, Chairman of the Vermont Republican Party

🌈 Happy Pride Month, friends! **This month, we celebrate all our LGBTQ+ friends, family, neighbors, and those whose shoulders stand on. 🏳️🌈 🏳️⚧️** Our congressional district, our state, our country, _our world_ would be a dimmer place without LGBTQ+ Pennsylvanians like...
* Civil rights leader **Bayard Rustin** , who organized the 1963 March on Washington
* **Peter Staley** , an influential member of ACT UP and the fight to end the AIDS pandemic
* Fashion designer **Will Smith** , who was regarded as one of the most successful Black fashion designers when he died in 1987
* Actors **Billy Porter, Jonathan Groff, and Hari Nef** who have represented the LGBTQ+ community on our screens and stages
* Iconic jazz singers **Billie Holiday and Carmen McRae**
* Athletes **Adam Rippon** – an Olympic figure skater – and NFL player **Carl Paul Nasib**

As we celebrate the beautiful diversity of our LGBTQ+ community, I’m also thinking about the rise in harassment of LGBTQ+ students in our schools... Pride flags ripped down from buildings... school boards erasing queer stories and books... and politicians restricting gender-affirming care and criminalizing drag performances. **There is no place for homophobia, transphobia, or any form of hatred in Pennsylvania.** In Congress, I will fight so that all of us – no matter who we love or how we identify – can be safe and thrive. And you’ll never have to guess where I stand in the fight for equal rights and freedom. I hope you are proud today and every day. ✊ — Ashley 🌈 P.S. **[If you want to send someone to Congress who will always have LGBTQ+ Pennsylvanians' backs, please pitch in your first donation of $5 to my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64371398/409866328/-1928036833?refcode=fl_em_na_20230605pride_ae_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGZhYTAwOS1kOTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lma7kme7y_YFjRvxwHImj82bgnlqrZ-IojT7DJ69u1g=)** | | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley’s new book “Manhood” is officially on sale now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This guy thinks he’s a masterclass in masculinity — but all he’s shown us is how to be a fraud and a coward.
#
Derek — Josh Hawley just wrote a book telling all of us that the only way to be a man is to be just like him. **It’s officially on sale now.**
But Missouri is the Show Me State — and the only thing Josh Hawley has shown us is how to be a fraud and a coward.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230605-1?refcode=em20230605-1-8397&refcode2=8397_434096_B-ttsO&akid=8397%2E434096%2EB-ttsO)
**[Defeat Josh Hawley »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230605-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230605-8397&refcode2=8397_434096_B-ttsO&akid=8397%2E434096%2EB-ttsO)**
**My name is Lucas Kunce, and I’m the 13-year Marine veteran and Democrat running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.**
I’m building a movement, without a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, to take back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley and put everyday Missourians in charge of our country — so we can finally rebuild our forgotten communities, invest into real working people, and fix our government’s broken status quo.
**[Will you help me get it done by splitting a donation of $5 or anything you can afford between my campaign and John Fetterman's right now? Early support from people like you in moments like these could make all the difference on Election Day.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230605-1?refcode=em20230605-1-8397&refcode2=8397_434096_B-ttsO&akid=8397%2E434096%2EB-ttsO)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230605-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230605-8397&refcode2=8397_434096_B-ttsO&akid=8397%2E434096%2EB-ttsO)**
Missourians deserve a U.S. Senator who will actually stand up and look out for them — not a fraud who’s obsessed with defining what it means to be a man.
Thanks for helping us make it happen,
Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230605-8397-footer&t=1&refcode2=8397_434096_B-ttsO&akid=8397%2E434096%2EB-ttsO)**

This is Tate Reeves. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64375164/409870756/-1470085607?refcode=ea.312e739c-db03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.312e739c-db03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzEyZTczOWMtZGIwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XTCAY8TX6GwxlLDRnnZmEAAarbdudGasMJXnhYMeNVY=) Peter, under his watch, millions of dollars meant to help the poor went to his longtime personal trainer and other buddies.

When a veteran investigator got just a little too close to the governor’s buddies and campaign contributors — Tate fired the investigator and replaced him with a firm run by his campaign donors.

His corruption is only the tip of the iceberg, though. Tate consistently prioritizes special interests over issues that would actually help the people of our state — denying Medicaid expansion, leaving hospitals to shut down, and rejecting state funding for essential repairs to Jackson's water infrastructure. This is Brandon Presley. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64375166/409870758/-1470085607?refcode=ea.312e739c-db03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.312e739c-db03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzEyZTczOWMtZGIwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XTCAY8TX6GwxlLDRnnZmEAAarbdudGasMJXnhYMeNVY=) Brandon’s a fighter. He stands up for the little guy against special interests and isn't afraid to ruffle a few feathers to deliver results for the hardworking people and families of Mississippi.

Brandon is ready to build a Mississippi where we fight corruption, not embrace it. Serve working people and families, not special interests. And lead with strength, courage, and real backbone. Brandon couldn’t be more different than Tate — but only one will lead the great state of Mississippi from the governor’s office after November’s election.

[The choice for Mississippi’s future is crystal clear. Brandon is the fighter we need in our corner, but he needs our help to come out on top in November. clean_body: Brandon or Tate? | = This is Tate Reeves. = Peter, under his watch, millions of dollars meant to help the poor went to his longtime personal trainer and other buddies. When a veteran investigator got just a little too close to the governor’s buddies and campaign contributors — Tate fired the investigator and replaced him with a firm run by his campaign donors. His corruption is only the tip of the iceberg, though. Tate consistently prioritizes special interests over issues that would actually help the people of our state — denying Medicaid expansion, leaving hospitals to shut down, and rejecting state funding for essential repairs to Jackson's water infrastructure. This is Brandon Presley. = Brandon’s a fighter. He stands up for the little guy against special interests and isn't afraid to ruffle a few feathers to deliver results for the hardworking people and families of Mississippi. Brandon is ready to build a Mississippi where we fight corruption, not embrace it. Serve working people and families, not special interests. And lead with strength, courage, and real backbone. Brandon couldn’t be more different than Tate — but only one will lead the great state of Mississippi from the governor’s office after November’s election. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Team Brandon | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. name: David Trone
subject: Supporting a local abortion clinic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Hey there –

URGENT: A new abortion clinic is opening in Maryland and needs our help!

DONATE >> https://secure.lglforms.com/form_engine/s/RIRzNh_iIrR2OoesVo9nYw?refcode=LOC_EM_2023.06.05_B1_abortionclinic

Since the landmark Supreme Court case Roe v. Wade was overturned, states have been rolling back the clock on reproductive rights left and right.

Take West Virginia for example. Republicans in the state enacted a near-total abortion ban, meaning that clinics that provide importation reproductive health services can no longer operate. So clinics like the Women’s Health Center of West Virginia are having to get creative – and brave.

Abortion access is still protected here in Maryland so the Women’s Health Center of West Virginia is courageously opening a new operation, the Women's Health Center of Maryland, right in Allegany county. When the new clinic opens, it will not only offer services to our Marylanders, but also serve as a lifeline for people in Central Appalachia who need abortions.

The new clinic is opening soon, but they need some help to get started and I’m wondering if you could lend a hand. Will you please rush a donation to the Women’s Health Center of Maryland right now so that abortion patients can get the care they need?

DONATE >> https://secure.lglforms.com/form_engine/s/RIRzNh_iIrR2OoesVo9nYw?refcode=LOC_EM_2023.06.05_B1_abortionclinic

Look, I believe that reproductive healthcare choices should be between patient and doctor.

These local abortion clinics like the Women’s Health Center of Maryland allow teens, women, and families to receive free and affordable reproductive healthcare.

With reproductive rights on a steep backslide, it’s more important than ever to support the work of these clinics who are providing life-saving healthcare to women.

Thank you for your contribution.

– David Trone

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.
David Trone for Maryland
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

subject: BREAKING: Nikki Haley, like Kevin McCarthy, announced her intention to steal our social security. Only these goons could make us send breaking story on top of breaking story about party leaders plotting to steal our retirement.
body:
Social Security attacks escalate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8525a1cf-af43-47f0-aed5-01a59c1e888e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_BREAKING_ : _Nikki Haley, like Kevin McCarthy, announced her intention to steal our social security_. She did it during her part-cyborg, part-fusillade-of-lies CNN town hall last night. Only these goons could make us send breaking story on top of breaking story about party leaders plotting to steal our retirement. Because, obfuscation aside: _This is what they intend to do._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2410098-7386-4017-94a9-9d118025bc3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We must fight back in media, Congress, courts, social media, etc. to let them know if they touch our Social Security and/or Medicare, we'll electorally destroy them. Or, we risk letting their narrative take hold that SS must be cut. _ **_Luckily, we have Social Security Works in Washington, one of the most successful advocacy groups, ready to take on this fight, be it against a House Speaker or former UN Ambassador running for President._** [**_So will you join us in sending Social Security Works $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can RIGHT NOW, to respond forcefully to the propagandistic nonsense Haley spread to millions of Americans last night?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2ad881e-58a6-4635-9fb7-849e9f487dab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for continuing this fight. They will NOT steal our retirements to use for their casino capitalism._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d0e3f79-de90-4e03-9498-26fb6306fbca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Dear Flyover Reader, This is your captain speaking... welcome aboard! I, and the entire Flyover crew, am so thankful that you start your mornings with us--reading the top headlines and the most important and interesting stories--free from the media bias and elite influences. The Flyover is now over 130,000 active readers and growing every single day--thanks to you!

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: A Pride Month message:
body:
| Happy Pride Month, Peter.

Pride has taken on a new meaning for me this year. It's my first as a member of Congress, and as the first openly gay federal representative elected in Illinois state history!

I'm an example of the progress that's been made on LGBTQ rights. But the truth is, it wasn't long ago that I was just a gay kid named Eric who never really believed I'd be accepted as a TV meteorologist -- let alone as a member of Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64382499/409877451/-665437442?refcode=em-6.5.23-nopnrs-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWI2NTY1Yy1lMTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d03ib5YIiRa1LkAcpTuraJd8PEhqL0lZ0Zm22LaXufA=)
After my first job as meteorologist in East Texas, I experienced discrimination and was ultimately pushed out of my job for being gay. Management was clear:

**“We can’t have a gay meteorologist at channel 7, Eric.”**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64382500/409877452/-665437442?refcode=em-6.5.23-nopnrs-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWI2NTY1Yy1lMTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d03ib5YIiRa1LkAcpTuraJd8PEhqL0lZ0Zm22LaXufA=)
_The suits have gotten an upgrade since my Texas days..._
It was a tough time, but after job searching and soul searching, I got the opportunity of a lifetime -- to serve my hometown of Rockford, Illinois -- where I could be my true, proud self. The rest, as they say, is history.

**So for those struggling this Pride Month, know that there’s hope. Whether it's your 10th year openly celebrating, your first, or maybe you're not ready to just yet -- know that you are loved and that I'm proud of you.**

Thanks for your time and support, and Happy Pride Month! 🌈

Eric

clean_body: | Happy Pride Month, Peter. Pride has taken on a new meaning for me this year. It's my first as a member of Congress, and as the first openly gay federal representative elected in Illinois state history! I'm an example of the progress that's been made on LGBTQ rights. But the truth is, it wasn't long ago that I was just a gay kid named Eric who never really believed I'd be accepted as a TV meteorologist -- let alone as a member of Congress. = After my first job as meteorologist in East Texas, I experienced discrimination and was ultimately pushed out of my job for being gay. Management was clear: “We can’t have a gay meteorologist at channel 7, Eric.” = The suits have gotten an upgrade since my Texas days... It was a tough time, but after job searching and soul searching, I got the opportunity of a lifetime -- to serve my hometown of Rockford, Illinois -- where I could be my true, proud self. The rest, as they say, is history. So for those struggling this Pride Month, know that there’s hope. Whether it's your 10th year openly celebrating, your first, or maybe you're not ready to just yet -- know that you are loved and that I'm proud of you. Thanks for your time and support, and Happy Pride Month! 🌈 Eric | = | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = To volunteer on Eric's campaign, We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Peter — it’s no secret that being an educator is one of the most challenging and underpaid professions in our country.

Teachers are crucial to molding the minds of our future generations. They put in countless hours preparing lesson plans, grading assignments, maintaining a safe classroom environment, and providing support to their students.

Despite their selflessness, they are forced to grapple with large class sizes, low wages, a lack of classroom resources, and tense public scrutiny — leading to extreme levels of stress and burnout.

President Biden recognizes the critical role that teachers play and is determined to fight for higher wages. He knows that a strong public education system starts with supporting our teachers.
But we want to know where you stand: **Do you agree that it’s time to give our public school teachers a raise?**
**[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64382710/409877558/1973686694?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2MjU3MzdmLWUxMDMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KNolmB9aPWTp1LK0jiFxPFN438BGBvn2owNdY_oQr5Q=&emci=7f39f729-d103-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=2625737f-e103-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16951753)** | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64382713/409877559/1973686694?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2MjU3MzdmLWUxMDMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KNolmB9aPWTp1LK0jiFxPFN438BGBvn2owNdY_oQr5Q=&emci=7f39f729-d103-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=2625737f-e103-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16951753)**

subject: Join Jim Herring for a book signing!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133076?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Join our Board Member Jim Herring as he signs copies of his new book, "The Switcher," tomorrow night at Lemuria Book Store!**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=898026b2da&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above for more information!_**
| **"The Switcher" is Jim Herring’s vivid, birds-eye account of the politicians, parties, and principles that competed for voters’ allegiances from the 1960s through 2008 in Mississippi.**

Readers witness unfurling political events, power plays, and personalities as the state’s upstart Republicans battled to achieve a viable two-party system against the state Democratic machine that was set on preserving its good-old-boy, powerful vice grip on state politics.

The son of passionate conservative Democrats, Jim Herring ultimately became the only State Chairman of the Mississippi Republican Party to serve previously on the Mississippi Democratic Party Executive Committee. Jim was elected in 2001 as Mississippi Republican Party Chairman, a post he held through 2008. Jim also rose nationally to become the Republican National Committee’s Chairman of the State Chairmen, a role that placed him on the Republican National Committee Executive Committee as a leader at the 2008 Republican National Convention.

**Tickets to the event are free, and reservations are not required! We hope to see you there!**
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e97ca3c76f&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the Best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
|
---
| | _ _

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

[**June 5, 1947:** Two years after WWII ended, U.S. Secretary of State George Marshall proposed his idea to restore Europe, which was still experiencing famine and post-war destruction. His proposal given at Harvard University was then relayed by President Harry Truman to Congress, and it eventually became known as the Marshall Plan.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8d899b2649ff4608a7c78fd22183906b&_e=lC0RXg-rbz5KaJfe1z5Q3KuSiT5YwPo6HYM_xeKldlSVGQPQV6EfkTy9cAzAeq8_S044_lmxiLWQBiq2J3Me0O0N2i27MVec06bYzFEYhOV4VoETkZff9CGHdV0NYNLv2InYEJMMVAlNrxhD5N-wSK1pauvyMwjQstgnQ5NoDVZlWXtFBDNvBOlmshQzCrvX5E83HvpJMpBpwUAK-od2FtynSP3alaOpyzPKAZxvES-P_Ppp2binZLU6iSXZ4SkW) **Source -[archives.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8d899b2649ff4608a7c78fd22183906b&_e=lC0RXg-rbz5KaJfe1z5Q3KuSiT5YwPo6HYM_xeKldlSVGQPQV6EfkTy9cAzAeq8_S044_lmxiLWQBiq2J3Me0O0N2i27MVec06bYzFEYhOVANls2ePOD0yU9PK7BHriQ4V3PyFCy27B2Q87XeoMuYMYfG_beC9VQVth68zYRcbkBA49HrDQNBAfwn_BeiifntFaZkyqzK4tYKk-t-U7ZbkBMbJfabsghIS_o7fDyz0UoFTDGlUOE49MFvvfSqg9h)**

[**June 5, 2004:** President Ronald Reagan was born on February 6, 1911, in Tampico, Illinois, and died on June 5, 2004, in Los Angeles, California. Reagan began his career as a sportscaster, then actor, before becoming president of the Screen Actors Guild, then Governor of California, and finally President of the United States. His presidency was marked by economic prosperity, conservatism, and the defeat of Soviet communism.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8d899b2649ff4608a7c78fd22183906b&_e=lC0RXg-rbz5KaJfe1z5Q3KuSiT5YwPo6HYM_xeKldlQtKvuXw1zVMwh00XzLEPf-7WbA9_CE8ReJ9BIoqCb4VpSxWLnHNZsoVwDfY-hPvAnk1OO6LedcuapksG1bC8qvmumqTUhuKNTzx3ehmpTS38E84uoojMlQLfvrpK3VuquWtuP7N-vXLPOdzBozBYtYok-QAmH9KJzaG8f3g_FzXuFvBhgL-q74ZmdriBuC6bVL69zB6h1q3aauDai1anca) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=8d899b2649ff4608a7c78fd22183906b&_e=lC0RXg-rbz5KaJfe1z5Q3KuSiT5YwPo6HYM_xeKldlQtKvuXw1zVMwh00XzLEPf-7WbA9_CE8ReJ9BIoqCb4VpSxWLnHNZsoVwDfY-hPvAlFbFBPq-4dOrWO9N7dQ37XMWQHBL3IgcGVaEq81WpBEirsGBE9by-P_VkxgSlfKnf12pDsQksDB24w9QfTEOoNQ11VQ-fs-iZXJRbIbcDU-7xm0BLtntoZz7SldJ9G6roe5lImoEh0JJyo-7u2weq1)**

❌ Out of 64 Black women who have run for the Senate since 2010, **only 8** have secured major-party nominations.

Here at The Collective PAC we are committed to achieving political equity, but we can’t do it without a Black woman representing us in the Senate. [Donate now to help us send a Black woman to the Senate in 2024! ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKsysMWCjOH7z9zOi5HV3cBAQGC3T3h9QR7fW8ucx_b0F3jbQD4EnuN-kT2uvq5Ew_Y94trG1Z9uBvirlFjbpbBZXr0dmW_Az-ICFIMOICGO5Ohb45hh0I2ZiQVsAVcHTILYIPbQYVkLSgSHza_cHsGY_mNkFU3CGhiKjiusByAK7Sbo8f1_jMiVEDAuNIlxOH8R5GNddpZ16z_xdPSelKbkGBL6vSXj1v6RwU5k7HdaVXmRjeXMKlXO9y7LqOZSXi61o6TyjWw6SafLXGkP6Kdv1YZAUQPyu1TnmpAHTF5W8TOFVCXSoFtzCT0W2wHPc7NWEhqlpR7mtQYC_FmFYTVXqS23pSPmbk2It2Cg8dXjQ5y465zjjB4lo_85y1xN3LjuFK-Sntrk_4dVSWINct2UF0kDR7ow8lFeQX4nkBqhd2Rnav2v5Mi8iYmk2ULVAz02zbORc0_R4xRRVVRqUwL5tGzhCsnKcp0akuj1PO4XjU9ml--_N5S5A_cjISw22u3pFQGK4THOShAYmiJVFg85Y-TaF9eLDFOE1TGfP_rOeIH9I3r_U8ZORhyqWP9_0/3ws/oO2GRWHBTgCdSJCIAvAjZg/h2/MDi_mcsDkG_ZfIDUApU6pUrlN3Yv2eNVk9CG2EV-yQk) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

**It’s _HIGH TIME_ we elected a Black woman to the Senate, Peter.** We know this fight won’t be easy — but we’ve never backed down from a challenge.

Our important work is powered by grassroots donors like you who understand what is at stake in this election. Your support helps us register, mobilize, and educate voters in Black communities because we know **_if we vote, we win._**

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: Rosen, Jacky
subject: I’m honored
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hello, this is Jacky Rosen. Tina asked me to reach out. I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. I was the first in my family to graduate from college, and I worked multiple jobs — including as a waitress at Caesars Palace — and took out student loans to make ends meet. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64383727/409880162/-1273059122?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230605_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjE1OTcyYy1lNDAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aRXq6abQT6mmLLeMI_0Jq8Ls1MznXgr_11qVjMA-n2A=) _My uncle, grandmother, and dad_ Now, I'm humbled to serve Nevada in the U.S. Senate. As a former union member, I'm especially honored to represent the hardworking families and union workers who have helped build our great state. Who I am and where I come from is why I've always fought to strengthen our middle class, create good-paying jobs, and lower everyday costs. But right now, I need your help. I'm back on the ballot next year, and CNN reports that I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection. The only way I can keep Nevada blue is with the support of people like you. **[So please — will you chip in $10 or more now — split between my campaign and Tina’s – so we can win in Nevada, defend the Senate, and continue delivering progress to working families nationwide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64383728/409880163/-1273059122?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230605_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjE1OTcyYy1lNDAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aRXq6abQT6mmLLeMI_0Jq8Ls1MznXgr_11qVjMA-n2A=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jacky Rosen and Tina Smith will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64383729/409880164/-1273059122?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20230605_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjE1OTcyYy1lNDAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aRXq6abQT6mmLLeMI_0Jq8Ls1MznXgr_11qVjMA-n2A=)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: This was a bad deal, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we want to
shout out the Justice Democrats in Congress who opposed the unfair debt
limit deal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134850?refcode=em20230605-29293&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29293%2E1203867%2ELb6aQe ]If you want to show your appreciation to the Justice Democrats who
voted against this deal, will you make a gift to support their re-election
today?

This was a bad deal,
Peter. Parts of this bill were
clearly designed to benefit corporate giants, ultra-wealthy tax cheats,
and increase our already-bloated military funding — all at the expense of
working families.

What's so frustrating is that this deal wasn't even necessary. The debt
limit itself is clearly unconstitutional; President Biden could have made
the case that it violates the 14th amendment.

Or Democrats could have just raised the debt ceiling before they lost
control of the House in last year's elections. Instead, they left working
people vulnerable to the GOP's nefarious games.

Justice Democrats in Congress stood up, spoke out, and opposed this bad
deal, but they were just unable to stop it. This is why our work is so
important — the more JDs we have in Congress, the more they can stand

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, we want to shout out the Justice Democrats in Congress who opposed the unfair debt limit deal. [ ]If you want to show your appreciation to the Justice Democrats who voted against this deal, will you make a gift to support their re-election today? This was a bad deal, Peter. Parts of this bill were clearly designed to benefit corporate giants, ultra-wealthy tax cheats, and increase our already-bloated military funding — all at the expense of working families. What's so frustrating is that this deal wasn't even necessary. The debt limit itself is clearly unconstitutional; President Biden could have made the case that it violates the 14th amendment. Or Democrats could have just raised the debt ceiling before they lost control of the House in last year's elections. Instead, they left working people vulnerable to the GOP's nefarious games. Justice Democrats in Congress stood up, spoke out, and opposed this bad deal, but they were just unable to stop it. This is why our work is so important — the more JDs we have in Congress, the more they can stand strong and united against GOP hostage-taking the next time around. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: May 14, 2008
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, May 14, 2008, was a busy day.
I was a freshman congresswoman, and the House was deep in the weeds of passing the Farm Bill — a huge piece of legislation that we work on every five years to feed our country. Over on the Armed Services Committee, I worked all day to pass a crucial amendment to the bill we were voting on.
All in all, it was a 13-hour day. The last vote took place at 8 p.m. **Around nine hours after leaving the floor of the House, I gave birth to my second son, Henry.**
I was lucky to have a job that allowed me to take leave after I gave birth. But millions of other moms aren't so lucky. That's why I've spent my career fighting relentlessly for the rights of families and women.

With ultra-conservative extremists sabotaging our efforts at every turn, it's never been more important to ensure we have leaders in Congress who are committed to supporting families at the highest level. **[Please, will you chip in before midnight tonight to help defend Democrats' Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64383987/409881458/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4196-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMThhYjNiMi1lNDAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yiw95rUe9Hv1l7z03pe-S_Ar045H1YupE9SwhtjBi3A=)**

I was proud to work right up until the day I gave birth. But I'll be the first to tell you, being a mom in Congress isn't easy. **Being a mom isn't easy,_period —_ especially given the lack of protections that our country offers to new parents.**
We're the only industrialized nation in the world that fails to provide paid family or parental leave. Child care has become impossibly unaffordable. The COVID-19 pandemic drove millions of moms out of the labor market. Being a parent in America is incredibly challenging and expensive.
I've spent years pushing for legislation to make it easier to raise children in this country, and I've built coalitions of support across party lines. But obstruction from the far-right has stopped us from passing the most substantial measures.
I'll never stop fighting for families — and I am certain that real change is possible. But New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades, and now they're targeting me for defeat.

I need people like you to have my back so that I can continue the fight for families and women in the Senate. clean_body: | | | Friend, May 14, 2008, was a busy day. I was a freshman congresswoman, and the House was deep in the weeds of passing the Farm Bill — a huge piece of legislation that we work on every five years to feed our country. Over on the Armed Services Committee, I worked all day to pass a crucial amendment to the bill we were voting on. All in all, it was a 13-hour day. The last vote took place at 8 p.m. Around nine hours after leaving the floor of the House, I gave birth to my second son, Henry. I was lucky to have a job that allowed me to take leave after I gave birth. But millions of other moms aren't so lucky. That's why I've spent my career fighting relentlessly for the rights of families and women. With ultra-conservative extremists sabotaging our efforts at every turn, it's never been more important to ensure we have leaders in Congress who are committed to supporting families at the highest level. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I was proud to work right up until the day I gave birth. But I'll be the first to tell you, being a mom in Congress isn't easy. Being a mom isn't easy,period — especially given the lack of protections that our country offers to new parents. We're the only industrialized nation in the world that fails to provide paid family or parental leave. Child care has become impossibly unaffordable. The COVID-19 pandemic drove millions of moms out of the labor market. Being a parent in America is incredibly challenging and expensive. I've spent years pushing for legislation to make it easier to raise children in this country, and I've built coalitions of support across party lines. But obstruction from the far-right has stopped us from passing the most substantial measures. I'll never stop fighting for families — and I am certain that real change is possible. But New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades, and now they're targeting me for defeat. A huge victory for preserving our local waters. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64384080/409881895/1504078835?refcode=EM_FR_230605_N_EUVTF_Actives_5_G_N_Logo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RkMzkwZjItZTUwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nocLmbqkEnpL1c_QwUy-q5wbXFfYphRcvdxNn90yT64=)

Peter,

Following a years-long battle to protect and defend our local waters, work is underway to remove the final invasive net pens from Puget Sound. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64384081/409881896/1504078835?refcode=EM_FR_230605_N_EUVTF_Actives_5_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RkMzkwZjItZTUwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nocLmbqkEnpL1c_QwUy-q5wbXFfYphRcvdxNn90yT64=) **Hilary has been at the forefront of this fight to end net pen fishing, and this marks an enormous victory in our efforts to support our waters, fishers, Tribes, and native salmon. **** **

The removal of these net pens is another example of Hilary’s commitment to protecting our environment and standing up to corporations who threaten them, and she is determined to continue this critical work as governor. ****[Will you pitch in what you can so Hilary can continue fighting for the sustainability of our waters, lands, and communities?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64384082/409881897/1504078835?refcode=EM_FR_230605_N_EUVTF_Actives_5_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RkMzkwZjItZTUwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nocLmbqkEnpL1c_QwUy-q5wbXFfYphRcvdxNn90yT64=)**** disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I keep an open Bible on my desk and read from it every day.

| |
---
| | | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=583ba5ac9fd249ca905b577c82bd6e5c&_e=TPWC1UfAtCyg5hRwGvLH8OEl7B1cLtYCdOGz98nRPSrfjZQe8JwicqfMFLI--4yry9Wn-vqZ48FS1nEvs8UkBAXiNf29MbGu_h5EHn9Nee-_E1RW1T870PnlbXRWVXUU219VWPt3agiu1hA81T-hUC9He7FZYWKh07lzhjxli_KE6j2_0Wy8vaIGdE8MRKTjGv3WA6pONMDi72DWL-bDtx4aQGCUxwQGbYg6G1rovDpbBcWkC3PP7c4kgDMCIHRb02DJH8RGj4yUP9SHkq02uD8iYmNCN7-Bk_VwpxnlL_KlyuXv0WeQlJwvF-TwFqms0ECd2zXkA9nrUIiFIY0UZ_CahVAgWpwkf_jJGbIKqEXiHqKz3_GMy_He1Gk5Lb1zJ9fsNJfMaF6SmPG1aWFc-S1Gf6BN8SkfS354pZCdBvqp6R86WthoBTuW1WZeNyj4)
---

**I am an Evangelical Christian.** 40 years ago, I came to know Christ through a Bible study led by fellow cadets at the United States Military Academy.

_**I keep an open Bible on my desk and read from it every day.**_

From its incomparable wisdom, I sought and attained the tools of leadership I needed to succeed and acquired the belief in a better world to come.

I learned that Christ gives each of us important work to do and that wisdom comes from humility and is enshrined by forgiveness.

---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=583ba5ac9fd249ca905b577c82bd6e5c&_e=TPWC1UfAtCyg5hRwGvLH8OEl7B1cLtYCdOGz98nRPSrfjZQe8JwicqfMFLI--4yry9Wn-vqZ48FS1nEvs8UkBAXiNf29MbGu_h5EHn9Nee-_E1RW1T870PnlbXRWVXUU219VWPt3agiu1hA81T-hUC9He7FZYWKh07lzhjxli_KE6j2_0Wy8vaIGdE8MRKTjGv3WA6pONMDi72DWL-bDtx4aQGCUxwQGbYg6G1rovDpbBcWkC3PP7c4kgDMCIHRb02DJH8RGj4yUP9SHkq02uLyOAa19Be7wk3OMjiTNwCCDv5EOU7qSJAlbrgnxvP9KrTgcKwvZIKNlwXz7qKDPPqhgSW_0zx6ob8Xyi6JGm-Q0q-EeO4aQp7jBP5MTMnDUyYN_7Oaa6MaTcZ4GUcR4hzBuaIrzKlxtnJoY-0eVOzHhLCv_MzXpjRZ4PeO37Evu)

Unfortunately, humility and forgiveness are virtues that far too many of our leaders in Washington disregard. Instead, they exude unfounded arrogance and display hatefulness to their fellow Americans.
**Our nation CAN NOT continue to be dominated by petty, amoral, and transactional politics.** ** **
---
| | [RESTORE FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERSHIP](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=583ba5ac9fd249ca905b577c82bd6e5c&_e=TPWC1UfAtCyg5hRwGvLH8OEl7B1cLtYCdOGz98nRPSrfjZQe8JwicqfMFLI--4yry9Wn-vqZ48FS1nEvs8UkBAXiNf29MbGu_h5EHn9Nee-_E1RW1T870PnlbXRWVXUU219VWPt3agiu1hA81T-hUC9He7FZYWKh07lzhjxli_KE6j2_0Wy8vaIGdE8MRKTjGv3WA6pONMDi72DWL-bDtx4aQGCUxwQGbYg6G1rovDpbBcWkC3PP7c4kgDMCIHRb02DJH8RGj4yUP9SHkq02uGHXhmPMzEBYT1Al57u6stPP0V-Im0xPvlb_3wK--x5QxWMvGk3ci7In6jpfGVOPJGwPYkKVLAG2ie4mgq1VC3TvcV92IWWUqMPYHmucm3Yut3waRH7wFh4aoss-apd-tQV2sAFLVNm-GKi76RD--FODFOkPNBOWU4Ur8WHqHeBD)

If we are to restore morality and integrity to our nation's capital, we MUST have more faith-driven leaders who will let God - not self-interest - be their guide.

If you agree, _**[please spare whatever you can](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=583ba5ac9fd249ca905b577c82bd6e5c&_e=TPWC1UfAtCyg5hRwGvLH8OEl7B1cLtYCdOGz98nRPSrfjZQe8JwicqfMFLI--4yry9Wn-vqZ48FS1nEvs8UkBAXiNf29MbGu_h5EHn9Nee-_E1RW1T870PnlbXRWVXUU219VWPt3agiu1hA81T-hUC9He7FZYWKh07lzhjxli_KE6j2_0Wy8vaIGdE8MRKTjGv3WA6pONMDi72DWL-bDtx4aQGCUxwQGbYg6G1rovDpbBcWkC3PP7c4kgDMCIHRb02DJH8RGj4yUP9SHkq02uM9s25XtDDrkkHioBgBnhh9x3VptLIkDdhpLuz-XE_PBPQLX02zBI3csY-pz0vTeD9LBXUiahk8O4iGF6SoNreMCHH-GrdZgmPmv20H0EaPeSfwW2qRdk5ENhkuJ6aIVlMVQG5NsxL4zyQjD4gwiFcmo_BxZUfkEFnl4SSBwk_7w "please spare whatever you can")**_ to support Christian conservatives who will lead with humility and show forgiveness to their fellow man.

clean_body: I keep an open Bible on my desk and read from it every day. | | | | | | | I am an Evangelical Christian. 40 years ago, I came to know Christ through a Bible study led by fellow cadets at the United States Military Academy. I keep an open Bible on my desk and read from it every day. From its incomparable wisdom, I sought and attained the tools of leadership I needed to succeed and acquired the belief in a better world to come. I learned that Christ gives each of us important work to do and that wisdom comes from humility and is enshrined by forgiveness. | Unfortunately, humility and forgiveness are virtues that far too many of our leaders in Washington disregard. Instead, they exude unfounded arrogance and display hatefulness to their fellow Americans. Our nation CAN NOT continue to be dominated by petty, amoral, and transactional politics. | | If we are to restore morality and integrity to our nation's capital, we MUST have more faith-driven leaders who will let God - not self-interest - be their guide. If you agree, "please spare whatever you can" to support Christian conservatives who will lead with humility and show forgiveness to their fellow man. God Bless, | Mike Pompeo | | | | "Mike Pompeo Is Calling on All Conservatives to Join Him in Championing Our American Values" | A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO Our God-given freedoms are under assault. That's why I created the Freedom Fund. To defend the freedoms and values that make America great against government overreach and the radical Left. "If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund." | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. PO BOX 2485 SPRINGFIELD, VA 22152 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: will you be 1 of 14?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
You’re a valuable supporter who I know understands what’s at stake.
| | |
---
Hi there,
I can’t believe that it’s already the beginning of June. And while we’ve been making progress, we still have not put the 2022 campaign to bed.
To combat the deluge of GOP money in the final days before the election, my campaign took on debt. Pundits moved our race to a toss-up, and **I was getting calls from other Senators concerned that we couldn’t win.**
We _had_ to take on debt. Fortunately, it worked, and we won.
The fact that we have outstanding bills makes emails like this one extremely important. In order to pay the bills down according to schedule, I need just 14 people to donate to this email. I hope that I can count on you to be one of them. Folks like you typically give about $3, but I’d be grateful for any amount you can manage.
You’re a valuable supporter who I know understands what’s at stake: **[Will you please be one of the 14 donors who help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64384181/409882224/-947982778?amounts=amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2292-fr-in&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZkNmIxNi1lNjAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c04ymNuXFGaEopj3vZ_N7U4FWJb7f54Ct_WhlyQQVLw=)**
Thanks so much. It’s already June so we really cannot fall short.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64384184/409882228/-2088849429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGZkNmIxNi1lNjAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c04ymNuXFGaEopj3vZ_N7U4FWJb7f54Ct_WhlyQQVLw=&emci=bfd749c2-e303-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=38fd6b16-e603-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5452893).

name: Brooke Lierman
subject: my friend, Angela
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1773?t=1007&amount=25&akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94 ]Angela Alsobrooks & Brooke Lierman

Hey Peter—it’s Brooke Lierman, Maryland Comptroller and the
first woman ever independently elected to one of our state’s
constitutional offices.

I’m writing to you today because I just announced I’m supporting Angela
Alsobrooks in her historic campaign for the U.S. Senate and we could
really use your help.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1773?t=1008&amount=25&akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94 ]Will you chip in $25 to help Angela’s campaign reach out to voters in
every corner of Maryland?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1773?t=1009&amount=25&akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94 ]Chip in $25
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1773?t=1010&amount=35&akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94 ]Other Amount

I know a thing or two about making history here in
Maryland, Peter.

And above all, I know you can’t do it alone. It may be one person’s name
on the ballot—but it takes a huge team to win.

It’s time to send a woman from Maryland to Washington again, and to do
that, we must build a grassroots movement the likes of which this great
state has never seen.

That includes spreading the word to our friends & network, and chipping in
whatever we can, whenever we can, to make sure Angela’s team can reach out
to folks online, via email, through text messages, and right there in
their communities.

But Angela’s campaign isn’t just about making history, Peter.

This campaign is about electing the best person for the job. And with
Angela’s career in public service and her long history of extraordinary
leadership in Prince George’s County, I’m confident she’s the best
qualified candidate to represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1773?t=1011&amount=25&akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94 ]So please, will you help my friend Angela Alsobrooks deliver real,
tangible change to Maryland’s communities by pitching in $25 to her Senate
campaign today? With your help, we’ll make history and elect the best
candidate for the job.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1773?t=1012&amount=25&akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94 ]Chip in $25
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1773?t=1013&amount=35&akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94 ]Other Amount

See you on the campaign trail!

My best,

Brooke

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=1001&akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94 ][IMG]

We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1002&akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94 ]click here.
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/115?t=1003&akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94 ]Text JOIN to 74064 to receive SMS updates
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/91?t=1004&akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94 ]Chip in a one-time donation
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/92?t=1005&akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94 ]Chip in a monthly recurring donation!

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=122%2E52803%2E6g_I94

Alsobrooks for Senate

Largo, MD 20792

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Biden Justice Department for Refusing to Reveal Names of Special Counsel Jack Smith’s Staff
body:
Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for records disclosing the names of staffers working in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office on two investigations targeting former President Donald Trump and other Americans.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 5, 2023
---|---|---

It is part of the administration’s costly and ill-fated effort to curb “irregular migration” via the southwest border from three targeted countries known as the northern triangle—El Salvador, Guatemala, and Honduras. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63636&L=29625&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvNjAtbWlsLWZvci12cHMtZmFpbGVkLXByb2plY3QvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=697ef9da30fa1a472b1514d3916b670d798e069e36a2dff0442f21e708ca2a80)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63636&L=29617&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWFqb3ItcmV2ZWxhdGlvbnMtaW4tdHJ1bXAtcnVzc2lhLXNjYW5kYWwvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=58ba5a6a51bec13cf7f76419c11e982706d384422f2d2a962fdc980e3eddec63) | **[Major Revelations in Trump Russia Scandal, Clinton Corruption—Hillary Did It, Obama Knew—Judicial Watch Warnings Came Early & Often](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63636&L=29617&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWFqb3ItcmV2ZWxhdGlvbnMtaW4tdHJ1bXAtcnVzc2lhLXNjYW5kYWwvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=58ba5a6a51bec13cf7f76419c11e982706d384422f2d2a962fdc980e3eddec63)** Early on, Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton smelled a rat. As Tom wrote in his 2020 book, A Republic Under Assault, Judicial Watch had for years been digging deep into the origins of the notorious anti-Trump Steele Dossier—“a thirty-five-page report filled with ludicrous, salacious and completely unfounded allegations”—and the relentless campaign against President Donald Trump. “Let us cast our minds back to April 2016,” Tom wrote. An investigative firm named Fusion GPS was hired to dig up dirt on candidate Trump. Fusion GPS in turn hired former British spy Christopher Steele. Steele produced the dossier, which was leaked to the press and caused a media sensation. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63636&L=29617&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWFqb3ItcmV2ZWxhdGlvbnMtaW4tdHJ1bXAtcnVzc2lhLXNjYW5kYWwvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=58ba5a6a51bec13cf7f76419c11e982706d384422f2d2a962fdc980e3eddec63)
