| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63636&L=29605&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWlncmFudC1nYW5nYmFuZ2VyLWluLWZvc3Rlci1ob21lLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b31959e737f2fcf83eb0266c34290d19491707e550706c5dea2f24e9345a4e1e) | **[U.S. Put Migrant Gangbanger with MS-13 Tattoos in Foster Home after Raping, Killing Woman](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63636&L=29605&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWlncmFudC1nYW5nYmFuZ2VyLWluLWZvc3Rlci1ob21lLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b31959e737f2fcf83eb0266c34290d19491707e550706c5dea2f24e9345a4e1e)** The teenager who raped and murdered a Maryland woman last summer was a known gang member arrested in his native El Salvador before coming to the U.S. under a special program that welcomes illegal immigrants under the age of 18 and provides them with a multitude of taxpayer benefits. Even after getting charged with homicide federal authorities placed the migrant offender, who sports tattoos displaying affiliation with the famously violent Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13), in a foster home with other children. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63636&L=29605&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWlncmFudC1nYW5nYmFuZ2VyLWluLWZvc3Rlci1ob21lLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b31959e737f2fcf83eb0266c34290d19491707e550706c5dea2f24e9345a4e1e)

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for records disclosing the names of staffers working in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office on two investigations targeting former President Donald Trump and other Americans. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jun 5, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for records disclosing the names of staffers working in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office on two investigations targeting former President Donald Trump and other Americans. ---|--- | | | | | Though American taxpayers spend billions on illegal immigrants in the U.S., the Biden administration keeps giving Central American nations tens of millions in humanitarian funding with the hopes that it will improve life enough to deter its citizens from coming here illegally. It is part of the administration’s costly and ill-fated effort to curb “irregular migration” via the southwest border from three targeted countries known as the northern triangle—El Salvador, Guatemala, and Honduras. ---|--- | | | | | Early on, Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton smelled a rat. As Tom wrote in his 2020 book, A Republic Under Assault, Judicial Watch had for years been digging deep into the origins of the notorious anti-Trump Steele Dossier—“a thirty-five-page report filled with ludicrous, salacious and completely unfounded allegations”—and the relentless campaign against President Donald Trump. “Let us cast our minds back to April 2016,” Tom wrote. An investigative firm named Fusion GPS was hired to dig up dirt on candidate Trump. Fusion GPS in turn hired former British spy Christopher Steele. Steele produced the dossier, which was leaked to the press and caused a media sensation. ---|--- | | | | | The teenager who raped and murdered a Maryland woman last summer was a known gang member arrested in his native El Salvador before coming to the U.S. under a special program that welcomes illegal immigrants under the age of 18 and provides them with a multitude of taxpayer benefits. Even after getting charged with homicide federal authorities placed the migrant offender, who sports tattoos displaying affiliation with the famously violent Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13), in a foster home with other children. ---|--- | | | Washington Examiner Microsoft is stonewalling on providing key details about its touted “review” into the State Department-funded Global Disinformation Index after suspending its relationship with the self-styled British “disinformation” tracker earlier this year. RealClear Investigations John Kerry, former Secretary of State and current special presidential envoy for climate, has a big staff and an even bigger budget, employing at least 45 employees with a budget of $16.5 million, according to Judicial Watch. Judicial Watch “The Biden National Archives agency is stonewalling the release of thousands of records that could go to the heart of Biden family corruption allegations,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

| Peter,

From the first moment Abigail began serving VA-07 in Congress, she’s centered accountability in all she does. She believes representatives ought to look out for their constituents, not their own interests.

It may seem obvious, _**but it’ll take a lot of reforms in Congress to meet that standard.**_

Abigail is stepping up to address that issue. Recently, she introduced a bill to suspend Congress’ pay if the debt limit is reached or the government shuts down. _**She believes if representatives aren’t doing their job, they shouldn’t be paid.**_

On top of that bold proposal, she’s leading the charge _**to ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and their dependent children from trading stocks.**_

Representatives should be focused on their districts, not their investment portfolios. Her bills would strengthen public trust in government, and we need to ensure she stays in office to see them across the finish line. [_**To do that, will you support our campaign with a contribution?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64384320/409882875/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230605-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg3YjY5NWEtZTcwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NzqXCh3Q8857iPqxVuyH6K0_EOKK_xnRI4N96ynONDY=)

clean_body: She believes representatives ought to look out for their constituents, not their own interests. | = | Peter, From the first moment Abigail began serving VA-07 in Congress, she’s centered accountability in all she does. She believes representatives ought to look out for their constituents, not their own interests. It may seem obvious, but it’ll take a lot of reforms in Congress to meet that standard. Abigail is stepping up to address that issue. Recently, she introduced a bill to suspend Congress’ pay if the debt limit is reached or the government shuts down. She believes if representatives aren’t doing their job, they shouldn’t be paid. On top of that bold proposal, she’s leading the charge to ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and their dependent children from trading stocks. Representatives should be focused on their districts, not their investment portfolios. Her bills would strengthen public trust in government, and we need to ensure she stays in office to see them across the finish line. = | = Thank you, Team Spanberger * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. Box 3112 Fredericksburg, VA 22402 United States | | | ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c89881196d7b451eadf5d34e49c84d6e&_e=BOZ3yjGicPZO9MSxyvOhRKHZc0kc5i0_8UF1a8BzYsmKXPH6eGXwu3PuzQBqJjgyIcz39PGo6Ah5hgbbGL1zANT7xhr3Y9_Rj1tRGDGu-lnbja-AY82DDrYekYLq2LSiFLyw0Er7fEhMHBOLbjaAA5Kv7z1zG-gAyjc-gaBwnWseLGBQYB9M7aw8hMpJ3xkGj1gPFpjvvDr0oE3snDXMBsoZagc0uYE1-W6Op_WKAxzKxFct46GA6fWRPIjgVNC-4KD7Sp_qUzMl-RtOvFCkouCAhWTvy9iEFnKV3LoiLaQ%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c89881196d7b451eadf5d34e49c84d6e&_e=BOZ3yjGicPZO9MSxyvOhRKHZc0kc5i0_8UF1a8BzYsmKXPH6eGXwu3PuzQBqJjgyIcz39PGo6Ah5hgbbGL1zANT7xhr3Y9_Rj1tRGDGu-lnbja-AY82DDrYekYLq2LSiFLyw0Er7fEhMHBOLbjaAA06Zav8zXeR5vDf0X5j2HU0u1Ag4fU_W06iy6ofeSac8DxRzzR3JO5WtCYLyq3Fw4FbsI56O_NI860treTHzt7vPS9LtcCZ3IPoCt8-A9-KT8RRUIO8HQn04OpbWPGYZxZaFhB3NPhWEAmPqPr3idNk%3D)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c89881196d7b451eadf5d34e49c84d6e&_e=BOZ3yjGicPZO9MSxyvOhRKHZc0kc5i0_8UF1a8BzYsmKXPH6eGXwu3PuzQBqJjgyIcz39PGo6Ah5hgbbGL1zANT7xhr3Y9_Rj1tRGDGu-lnbja-AY82DDrYekYLq2LSiFLyw0Er7fEhMHBOLbjaAAwkX3BBdWrFWhTzV45pYghMHO2T8F8xZyxHRjrREJUHBRzsBQF1ALpFW7QEUslcjeGucgojBiBtQQMA2-elg0Beg-MzYbts4BQPVAqVzKo_gUMq-Xth5t4ojVRmIcEEhYQPUoFEphjFy9upqFUd34MA%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c89881196d7b451eadf5d34e49c84d6e&_e=BOZ3yjGicPZO9MSxyvOhRKHZc0kc5i0_8UF1a8BzYsmKXPH6eGXwu3PuzQBqJjgyIcz39PGo6Ah5hgbbGL1zANT7xhr3Y9_Rj1tRGDGu-lnbja-AY82DDrYekYLq2LSiFLyw0Er7fEhMHBOLbjaAA-d0EKBfKezKlE-gCWQvIDzZecuGlvPB8YqMFHrBLO_6mjQ_56eqbNKzL4Xx-nn2HxLSECQuL6yzkzO3A_sVonFokDaYpO4QEP4K6iK8Hep5ZowxkAkOk3smj5Xxld7675YMH-8aQ-CS2HI-Pi-ZzBQ%3D)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c89881196d7b451eadf5d34e49c84d6e&_e=BOZ3yjGicPZO9MSxyvOhRKHZc0kc5i0_8UF1a8BzYsmKXPH6eGXwu3PuzQBqJjgyIcz39PGo6Ah5hgbbGL1zANT7xhr3Y9_Rj1tRGDGu-lnbja-AY82DDrYekYLq2LSiFLyw0Er7fEhMHBOLbjaAAyG65auO2fWUJeQL0lQm3J_W5RcM9yOmQfjCQ0V1yEm53xxzOpSrN1lcdmAsA1wlL20IvS_u50RKLMHo7EV3rqfFQDHQ8zj88KQ6AyqGwTYsndVH8QFcqBx7P0Z8ITV7C8fUXmLciL4cx0HlMfI4P3Q%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c89881196d7b451eadf5d34e49c84d6e&_e=BOZ3yjGicPZO9MSxyvOhRKHZc0kc5i0_8UF1a8BzYsmKXPH6eGXwu3PuzQBqJjgyIcz39PGo6Ah5hgbbGL1zANT7xhr3Y9_Rj1tRGDGu-lnbja-AY82DDrYekYLq2LSiFLyw0Er7fEhMHBOLbjaAA53EetNQpUf4CdY6ywub1BOj_WW6IgPZQ9mGXj6W4knkS2c8UUFo3EIa9p9MBsUOu_BPuRorz-nhx3iMyUynvvdwgmJYGFU2alJJ1dqbnhF6zY-KuAm8RdNHXrqiCXzFqI1X5jdsOkJ3t0CIks4wE3g%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---

clean_body: And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists. | | | Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. I was proud to share my new book, The College Scam, with President Donald Trump. I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the BIGGEST and most IMPACTFUL pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives. I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with The College Scam to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read The College Scam, you'll learn: my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! name: Team Zak
subject: It’s time to talk about next steps
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
What kinds of updates do you want to get from Zak and our campaign?
#
The first few weeks since Zak launched his campaign against George Santos have been an absolute whirlwind. Now that we’ve all had a chance to catch our breath **it’s time to think about what comes next.**

We’ve got a long road ahead as we hustle to defeat Santos and flip NY-03 blue. Emails like this are the best way for us to keep all of our supporters in the loop with what’s happening out on the campaign trail and how you can get involved.
[**So we’re asking: what kinds of updates do you want to get from Zak and our campaign? Take our Next Steps Survey and let us know now:**](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/next-steps-survey/?source=em20230605&akid=92%2E8507%2EfC2dnO)
**[Take the survey ››](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/next-steps-survey/?source=em20230605&akid=92%2E8507%2EfC2dnO)**
**There’s room for everyone to play a role in our campaign** — in fact, we’re going to need all hands on deck. We know this race is winnable so long as we can out-work and out-organize Santos and his Republican defenders.
Whether you’re interested in volunteering with our campaign or staying up to date with the latest news on the race, we want to make sure you’re in the loop from now until Election Day.

[**Will you take 30 seconds to respond to our Next Steps Survey and let us know what kinds of updates you want to get from us?**](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/next-steps-survey/?source=em20230605&akid=92%2E8507%2EfC2dnO)
Thank you,
Everyone on Team Zak
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=92%2E8507%2EfC2dnO)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=92%2E8507%2EfC2dnO)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

body:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64384909/409885429/1056734202?refcode=EM_FR_230605RP_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2FlODQ0OS1lYTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1JyoMktXtQQ6AlD1-m_-9nxP2ptO5DrdH6ZVyopNOM=)

We talk a lot about our extensive planning for 2024 – but today, I'm reaching out to talk to you about what's happening in Virginia _this_ year.

**In November, our Commonwealth's State Senate is on the ballot, and control will be decided by just a handful of seats.** Virginia is the last southern state without an abortion ban, and this year's election will be instrumental in determining reproductive rights in Virginia (Republicans would love nothing more than to advance an abortion ban through the Senate if they take control).

One of the three most critical districts in the fight for the State Senate is District 31 (which touches Loudoun and Fauquier Counties in Northern Virginia), and I'm proud to support Russet Perry for this seat. **[Will you split a donation between our campaigns to help her rally voters ahead of the June 20 primary and enter the general election in a strong position?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64384910/409885430/1056734202?refcode=EM_FR_230605RP_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2FlODQ0OS1lYTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1JyoMktXtQQ6AlD1-m_-9nxP2ptO5DrdH6ZVyopNOM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Russet Perry and Jennifer Wexton:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64384911/409885431/1056734202?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230605RP_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2FlODQ0OS1lYTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1JyoMktXtQQ6AlD1-m_-9nxP2ptO5DrdH6ZVyopNOM=)**

---
Over the years, I've seen Russet's determination and tenacity time and time again — whether as a prosecutor seeking justice or as a CIA officer standing up for our democracy.

Loudoun and Fauquier Counties need an advocate in Richmond who goes to bat for them every day, and I can think of no one better to be that voice than Russet.

I trust her to fight for her constituents on the right to choose, commonsense gun safety, strong schools, access to healthcare and so much more. **But if Republicans win District 31, they'll be on their way to taking the majority in the State Senate — meaning that abortion bans and more extreme legislation will be sent to Glenn Youngkin's desk.**

District 31 came down to less than _one percent_ in 2021's gubernatorial election. It's a truly purple district, and every bit of support Russet can get makes a difference.

[**So I'm asking: will you join and make a split donation for Russet Perry's State Senate campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64384917/409885437/1056734202?refcode=EM_FR_230605RP_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2FlODQ0OS1lYTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1JyoMktXtQQ6AlD1-m_-9nxP2ptO5DrdH6ZVyopNOM=)

Thank you,

Jennifer

**Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64384918/409885438/1056734202?refcode=EM_FR_230605RP_N_JW_FULL_8_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2FlODQ0OS1lYTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1JyoMktXtQQ6AlD1-m_-9nxP2ptO5DrdH6ZVyopNOM=)****

name: American Action News
subject: Report: Pelosi Committee Manipulated Jan 6. Footage With Added Audio

body:
Your unwavering support is truly the backbone of this campaign.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64384994/409885775/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjkzYTEyZjctZWEwMy1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VEO3RxeR3UBTMRIZ84fvj6CoX5nXlle63WX_2EBvNos=&emci=323a125e-ba03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=693a12f7-ea03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

I want to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude, Peter.

Last week, we faced an ambitious end-of-month fundraising goal, and I am thrilled to announce we met and _exceeded_ our target. We couldn't have done it without the dedication and generosity of folks like you.

I _know_ 2024 may still feel distant, but Election Day will be here before we know it. By building up our resources from now until then, we will be able to reach more voters, amplify our message, and ultimately build a movement strong enough to reclaim our Democratic House majority.

While our journey is far from over, I am confident that we are prepared to face any challenges that lie ahead, thanks to your unwavering support. I am sincerely grateful to have you on my side. Your contributions, both financially and through your time and energy, make all the difference.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.

name: CaucusRoom
subject: China's Act of Aggression
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday! OPEC+ is[ _planning to cut production_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-y/) of oil and drive up prices.**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-t/) **D.C. Area Explosion** **[_A loud explosion sound heard in the Washington, D.C. metroplex area_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-i/), **and areas as far east as Maryland and west as Virginia was a military aircraft in pursuit of a civilian plane. **Sounding the Alarm** Former White House physician**i[s raising red flags over Biden's health, concluding he is "not fit mentally or physically"](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-d/) **after the president fell on stage during a commencement ceremony at the U.S. Air Force Academy. **Offensive or Misunderstanding?** A children's choir from South Carolina **[was stopped from singing the Star Spangled Banner in the U.S. Capital last week.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-h/)** The Capital police claim it was a misunderstanding.

**Broken Promises** An American farmer is speaking out afte**r[ the Biden administration reportedly sent billions to U.S. adversaries](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-k/)**[.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-u/) **Act of Aggression** A Chinese warship reportedly**[came within 150 yards of hitting the USS Chung-Hoon ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-o/)**while the U.S. destroyer was conducting joint exercises with Canada in the Taiwan Strait. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* It keeps **[getting worse](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-m/)**.
* Right on **[target](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-c/)**.
* I can't believe it's **[come to this](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-q/)**.
* Don't **[look at me](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-alhjyjy-trhiujldw-a/)** that way.

name: Team WFP
subject: 12 new endorsements
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
This November, every single seat in the Virginia State Legislature is up for election — making Virginia one of the most hotly-contested battlegrounds of the year. And the primary election is just two weeks away! | | | Peter, This November, every single seat in the Virginia State Legislature is up for election — making Virginia one of the most hotly-contested battlegrounds of the year. And the primary election is just two weeks away! **We’re excited to announce that the Working Families Party is expanding our organizing in Virginia this year, with endorsements in 12 races so far — including Laschrecse Aird who is running to defeat the last anti-abortion Democrat in the state senate and Sally Hudson who is standing up to Dominion Energy.** With newly-drawn districts and a slew of retirements leaving so many races up in the air, we have a huge opportunity to elect champions in Virginia who will reform our criminal justice system, defend abortion access, and stand up to abusive utility monopolies. But because Virginia has no campaign donation limits on state races, billion-dollar corporations like Dominion Energy are able to spend unlimited sums of money to defeat our movement. **[Early voting in the primary election is already underway. Can we count on you to pitch in now to help elect our champions in the primary, and then lay the groundwork to flip newly-swing seats in the state legislature this November?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUR9o8xFYlgUllKphbs-D8I1lXjpSYYSbM7LaCW_2xEj6Jilsupsk3xRd3XEEatGIKO--1TDHFhtY1AatkoGVjydOsSI7eExQqsZ17sXAIVxznja-k6U5L9K-EVvwC-_XTwBSUiXhHytGzOzRykwAODjMijfcoVpy7ce8EWhMgUkev0GUZsIhSqu6k2AaLWNnens3paddBrtirlBR4jSbMl9x3hpeYgy8S0sFojRJ23PvdyXAWZ9JHAJQfXsSEmxR4_ZK9qSypX9jazeNl_R7Xl_acfnFgFupGzJM_WP14t4DWsrOcochHpw-LPmVAwAWJ/3ws/QER4gxyFTLmIzxWqifNatg/h0/BYI3NpfLWexRmCI7TAp4oaH5RZA58sJ_erliTkA_1oI)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUR9o8xFYlgUllKphbs-D8I1lXjpSYYSbM7LaCW_2xEj6Jilsupsk3xRd3XEEatGIKKB2-VaLvqvEB6rvhphm6-2EB_2m6Rqhnqr8YAfgzCIrgSrP0qCv2ryNDPG8lIZyen8FzQc_QARZbQG0VBB28KbCEW6N4S8Ulgwk24kxFvGE-nKM_-km4uIkuAWkLar4fQ_9lDoIJQ-I3DMALrbo9JreTBs2NuMXSCr8n40U8xOKSWXZNUca46fUIUNaESPRkd29QUXr9_X7ZbQ3VX1VFqZn1BybFf-mEeGi5AluDn3zp2ai35l0kvkF21zzzav1Q/3ws/QER4gxyFTLmIzxWqifNatg/h1/anes4jJHrqO0Ltd_J5hJqtVpj-rBSYZUlRT-_05Yy4c)** With just two weeks until the primary, we wanted to take a minute and tell you about a few of the candidates we are excited to throw our support behind. In Virginia Senate District 13, **Lashrecse Aird** is taking on Joe Morrissey, the last anti-abortion Democrat in the Virginia State Legislature. Last year, Morrissey co-sponsored a bill that would ban abortion in Virginia, one of the last states in the south without an abortion ban. WFP champion **Jennifer Carroll Foy** is running to bring clean water, safe communities, and affordable health care to Senate District 33. With an opponent whose top donor is Dominion, the energy company abusing its monopoly and taking advantage of Virginia residents, Jennifer needs our support to beat the corporate interests working against her. **Sally Hudson** is a proven leader on reproductive justice and clean energy running to secure a fairer, brighter future for Senate District 11. Her opponent is part of Virginia’s entrenched “good ol’ boy” network and has taken over $100,000 from Dominion over the course of his career. **Buta Biberaj** is up for re-election as Commonwealth Attorney for Loudoun County. A trailblazer in criminal justice reform, Buta has worked to end the school-to-prison pipeline, reform the unjust bail system, seek alternatives to incarceration for non-violent offenses, and invest in mental health treatment — all while reducing crime rates in the county. These amazing candidates and more are ready to build a Virginia that works for the many, not the few — and so are we. **That’s why we’re expanding our organizing in Virginia during the primary and through the general election in order to reform our justice system, flip the House of Delegates, and ensure abortion access is protected in the commonwealth.** **[Pitch in $10 now to help grow our movement in Virginia and win the change that our communities need.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUR9o8xFYlgUllKphbs-D8I1lXjpSYYSbM7LaCW_2xEj6Jilsupsk3xRd3XEEatGIKT1IFz1dbpNUvjVTEA7rpKQQUrMHEo4cW4hWPZD_nsq9Ig-HnQ72cu3mYP772fnjgb41tsL6K-IdZYGfIAG9HxIC49hH2Qhx3HjdKREtkHPVauOJc7KEvJhW-M9vrRGYtzhjEc6omyL0tbHQRZoL1LK5cSxJNGxD-QBeJsizZ-KEGweYglcCekMCiI1pvzuGFjQFum2Icr_ZHt_Xk5Z26b9_cu8TtuSJpCEt__1JkIomgql4e0-vh1x0Qet8xiP0A/3ws/QER4gxyFTLmIzxWqifNatg/h2/qbWJnjjFmGM9_lJIDMXdcVgH_Wmr-Mt9-cAQYMWck2o)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUR9o8xFYlgUllKphbs-D8I1lXjpSYYSbM7LaCW_2xEj6Jilsupsk3xRd3XEEatGIKsopqgQcX597uREjVrNYiijY0cpJSoEkZKvdDyBqjrekX-nAg0WkFD2WRH_dp7B6gE-XvBvkcgGP4wnmgpnmlyzoSaw-reXbgLcrflD4h7RvE1yESxEeqe_u0mCPVu8otqDCFZBy10j71hm1flshFjSMtTr_r8hN4B_cRb9LbDkqqMVesxXPPYMzeZj_zpEPgeuYUZYPY837UC7hSU6chDP126evfhp-02_c_Qyw-D40XBbM-SEPMXqb58f3NRDm9/3ws/QER4gxyFTLmIzxWqifNatg/h3/NcCd6SQBDabhRugC5fi2KqJYtIcXYfzetYgfKPjz8DE)** In solidarity, Team WFP P.S. clean_body: This November, every single seat in the Virginia State Legislature is up for election — making Virginia one of the most hotly-contested battlegrounds of the year. And the primary election is just two weeks away! | | | Peter, This November, every single seat in the Virginia State Legislature is up for election — making Virginia one of the most hotly-contested battlegrounds of the year. And the primary election is just two weeks away! We’re excited to announce that the Working Families Party is expanding our organizing in Virginia this year, with endorsements in 12 races so far — including Laschrecse Aird who is running to defeat the last anti-abortion Democrat in the state senate and Sally Hudson who is standing up to Dominion Energy. With newly-drawn districts and a slew of retirements leaving so many races up in the air, we have a huge opportunity to elect champions in Virginia who will reform our criminal justice system, defend abortion access, and stand up to abusive utility monopolies. But because Virginia has no campaign donation limits on state races, billion-dollar corporations like Dominion Energy are able to spend unlimited sums of money to defeat our movement. With just two weeks until the primary, we wanted to take a minute and tell you about a few of the candidates we are excited to throw our support behind. In Virginia Senate District 13, Lashrecse Aird is taking on Joe Morrissey, the last anti-abortion Democrat in the Virginia State Legislature. Last year, Morrissey co-sponsored a bill that would ban abortion in Virginia, one of the last states in the south without an abortion ban. WFP champion Jennifer Carroll Foy is running to bring clean water, safe communities, and affordable health care to Senate District 33. With an opponent whose top donor is Dominion, the energy company abusing its monopoly and taking advantage of Virginia residents, Jennifer needs our support to beat the corporate interests working against her. Sally Hudson is a proven leader on reproductive justice and clean energy running to secure a fairer, brighter future for Senate District 11. Her opponent is part of Virginia’s entrenched “good ol’ boy” network and has taken over $100,000 from Dominion over the course of his career. Buta Biberaj is up for re-election as Commonwealth Attorney for Loudoun County. A trailblazer in criminal justice reform, Buta has worked to end the school-to-prison pipeline, reform the unjust bail system, seek alternatives to incarceration for non-violent offenses, and invest in mental health treatment — all while reducing crime rates in the county. These amazing candidates and more are ready to build a Virginia that works for the many, not the few — and so are we. That’s why we’re expanding our organizing in Virginia during the primary and through the general election in order to reform our justice system, flip the House of Delegates, and ensure abortion access is protected in the commonwealth. In solidarity, Team WFP P.S. Are you ready to take the next step? Just a few hours of your time could make the difference to help beat back abortion bans and stand up to utility monopolies. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

| Peter,

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Now is the time to be loud, vocal, and proud
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=374%2E35263%2EaGJyZT)
Peter — At a time when hundreds of right-wing efforts are underway to strip away the rights and freedoms of the LGBTQ community, it’s more important than ever that we elect more LGBTQ candidates to office. **When Tammy made history as the first openly gay member elected to the US Senate, she added a valuable voice for the LGBTQ community in one of the highest offices in our country.** Having historically marginalized voices in positions of power is critical to bringing lasting change, Peter. Tammy has worked tirelessly to bring more diverse voices to the table, because our elected leaders should be representative of the myriad of unique identities in our country. This Pride Month, Tammy and all of us on Team Baldwin are resolved to continue supporting LGBTQ candidates and causes in Wisconsin as well as across the country. We have to be loud, vocal, and proud about the progress we’ve made to achieve equality for gay and trans Americans — and we need to fiercely fight back against any attempt to harm the LGBTQ community. **[As we celebrate Pride Month, now marks a crucial moment to support Tammy’s work to advance LGBTQ equality in the Senate and across the country. Will you chip in to support her important work today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230605_PM1_V2_S1&t=4&akid=374%2E35263%2EaGJyZT)** | [DONATE 🏳️🌈](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230605_PM1_V2_S1&t=5&akid=374%2E35263%2EaGJyZT)
---
Thank you so much for your continued support of Tammy! Stay tuned for more updates on what we’re working on this month in celebration of the vibrant LGBTQ community.
— Team Baldwin
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=374%2E35263%2EaGJyZT) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=374%2E35263%2EaGJyZT)**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Our clean energy future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Show your support for a clean energy future >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64385838/409888994/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230605_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWQ5OWNlNS1lZTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Y1QmrOxCdnaG2S9eAjlLkEyG5pDTcd6XHyhj_8jIBw=&emci=6dd99ce5-ee03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=79d99ce5-ee03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
It’s not rocket science, folks: more renewable power on the grid means we are better equipped to fight climate change, create jobs, and save families like yours money. That’s why I just introduced two key bills in the Senate:
1. The _FASTER Act_ to improve our nation’s transmission permitting process and help cut the red tape that gets in the way of approval of transformative renewable energy projects.

2. And the _Grid Resiliency Tax Credit Act_ to incentivize building more transmission projects across the country by establishing an investment tax credit — providing customers with the reliable, cheaper renewable energy they deserve.

**[If you’re ready to move forward into the clean energy future, can you add your name in support of this legislation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64385839/409888995/-1662052031?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230605_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWQ5OWNlNS1lZTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Y1QmrOxCdnaG2S9eAjlLkEyG5pDTcd6XHyhj_8jIBw=&emci=6dd99ce5-ee03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=79d99ce5-ee03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64385840/409888996/-1662052031?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230605_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWQ5OWNlNS1lZTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Y1QmrOxCdnaG2S9eAjlLkEyG5pDTcd6XHyhj_8jIBw=&emci=6dd99ce5-ee03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=79d99ce5-ee03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)

Thank you for believing in building the renewable energy workforce of the future. Let’s make it happen together.
— Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

name: Team Biden-Harris
subject: $46.99, Peter. That’s what we need right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
If you want to make an impact on this campaign, now is one of the absolute best times to get involved. Here’s why: | | |
---
$46.99, Peter. That’s the average donation that grassroots supporters have pitched in to support President Biden and Vice President Harris’s reelection campaign over the last few weeks. That early support is crucial, Peter -- it helps fund our work to:
* Register voters
* Scale up organizing efforts across the nation
* Counter misleading attacks

body:
Gov. Wes Moore’s Gun Safety Act of 2023 is an important step toward curbing our country’s gun violence epidemic.

| **_BREAKING NEWS:_ NRA sues Maryland governor, Wes Moore, after he signs gun safety legislation.**

Dear team,
We are quickly reaching out to you because the Supreme Court could rule on the student loan forgiveness case any second _this month_.
In 2022, the average college student in America found themselves at about **$37,574 in federal student loan debt.**
Since taking office, President Biden has made student loan forgiveness a priority of his administration. But now, any chance of relief for our students hangs in the balance of the Supreme Court — a court with MAGA-influenced appointments and special interests.
**No matter how SCOTUS rules on the case this month, we know that student loans will remain an issue.**
_**Why? Because interest rates will continue to accumulate and add to the thousands of dollars in student loan debt of many hard-working Americans.**_
Look, Eric believes that quality education prepares students for their future in our global economy and communities. But Eric also believes that no one should suffer a lifetime burden of thousands of dollars of debt just to compete in today’s economy.
So we wanted to ask you ourselves, team:
**Should there be interest rates on student loans?**

name: Josh Stein
subject: The truth about abortion bans:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
This is wrong for North Carolina.

| _Let’s get one thing straight:_

Restrictions on reproductive health care aren’t about protecting women. They’re about controlling them.

Abortion bans only harm patients and providers and strip women of their ability to make decisions about their own bodies. They’re cruel. **And they’re wrong for North Carolina.**

I’m furious that far-right legislative Republicans recently enacted an abortion ban, and I’m ready to lead the fight against them, but I can only win with your help — and the support of all of us who believe in protecting reproductive health care access. [_**I’m personally asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress today to help defeat the anti-abortion NC GOP General Assembly >>>**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64386488/409891436/1635010129?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230605-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxMmJmYjVkLWYzMDMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cSUhuKz9FczzyW3O1OC84dux1-VnAz_hzAHf9G8SE_A=) **Democratic governors are a critical line of defense against Republican extremism, and Politico recently called our race THE MOST important gubernatorial contest next year.**

My opponent is a Trump-inspired radical who would sign a total ban on abortion care.

We HAVE to stop him. We have to win the Governor’s election and pick up seats in the General Assembly. And I am all in!

name: Special Election Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: 18 special election victories and counting →
body:

Friend,

June marks the beginning of our first full month since launching our 2024 election bid:
**🇺🇸 RON DESANTIS FOR PRESIDENT 🇺🇸**
In May, we raised over $8.2M because of over 40,000 generous donors. **This month, we want to prove how much your support means to us. **

**Our team has decided to build a giant donor wall with the names of our first 100,000 donors (that includes our first 40,000 donors already). Not because we don't enjoy our beige walls but because when we say you 're a part of this team we mean it - your support is the foundation of our campaign.**

Every day when our team is in the office, we think about the mission and the people across the country who have chipped in because they're focused on it with us. We take that responsibility and that trust very seriously, and we want everyone who works here to see it.

**[So with that in mind, why wouldn't we put you on the actual brick-and-mortar of Ron DeSantis for President HQ?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=76350c085f69499287b8ec0d696efc2d&_e=LEJw5JJBKtpqWJLnBa3Nzkf9z_DCIYTs6ZSx7x-GrcxlWLUzpg79rTPsDKpbTdap70tNPK6I4MyC0zZWQcrs8D1LVgHrWoJIc4ER-3kzmZFZThdRDgehRzT8pVrIi_6lo98qVigVNRIW8kMyfEU-2gJmje_yXvkmfTrmJ36TMM56vYPlhJunx2jYrK4Hf6cyPrE5UkHFnC8Fv7oU6vaLq6UDb-w-NouOv98G_KtlEjRW7bLlDrxbMNgnZVk8T5_sYuGrfwwT9sjlKWxnbCIBQGq37vqh1XP-WMZcyauMI8GUktoIS9HrgCFY4UUI1teM2nqzQ5KUt6Zaw25JFQN7Ro1ebX89PcJiYUKuMZiUoibE9qgjkgefUNz834vwYJCbM9REODWrz6H3L9Rugn6Nw3I9Fh1ywPbtbkP7Osbwhs0%3D "So with that in mind, why wouldn’t we put you on the actual brick-and-mortar of Ron DeSantis for President HQ?")

Don't believe us? **

**We 'll be pushing out live updates weekly so you can see how your support holds up the walls of our home base. **

Friend, we have pledged to you to never lose sight of our mission -- to achieve our Great American Comeback. Despite what the woke mob will tell you, **STEP 1 is building the resources we need to win this election.**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

There’s no sugarcoating this, Fellow Conservative:

If Republicans don’t win back control of the Senate in the 2024 election, it’s quite possible we will be locked out of the majority for the rest of this DECADE due to the Senate map in play.

It’s no exaggeration to say that this upcoming election will change the course of our nation - **which is why I entered this fight to take back the Senate.**

**If you have not heard from me, I am Jim Justice, the two-term West Virginia Governor challenging Democrat Joe Manchin for his current Senate seat.** I recently launched my campaign, and I’m looking for grassroots conservatives like yourself to join my team.

[_Official West Virginia Battleground Fund_ _
Join Team Justice-> _](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d98fe06007524f5d8a84755aac43949b&_e=9b_QcvoXRU3aS6usHXTC3j1O-vvTA7ISGHVoFyKlieYnsjKSyEQx4uRbmvmCHo_x8DLPeMnW0EaFmD9Df_Q9VQgN5Zq5A_45KI1ACBGmeX_uwBbivuXgoSAEkQzhkfADah9YAzN2Z6TFO4IrqcvI-ADiT57O_pEpLWUKa2ViR7vkKAU0aEN9yY20F4yyLLmkHJvK59-BcrWzJ_YtnPWLf7RsVLOQ5WEMLdRjp7OVXp-VkEXehMJlFrfPZghVawY6P2YZunqTVwod4bCYZz0R_3QJOO9C_5RhDO_0wxFLrF5YFyiBrJTZniSqDAyxYd48BfP-KJneRVaWETN30uwx6k2lRctXmVQ57mMEa3wAno4XNCY9bWi_80mZF2OaymvHKakVtsSJjHzLaD_KtRqKus_EisNde8YrotUvL65B-lM%3D)
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d98fe06007524f5d8a84755aac43949b&_e=9b_QcvoXRU3aS6usHXTC3j1O-vvTA7ISGHVoFyKlieYnsjKSyEQx4uRbmvmCHo_x8DLPeMnW0EaFmD9Df_Q9VQgN5Zq5A_45KI1ACBGmeX_uwBbivuXgoSAEkQzhkfADah9YAzN2Z6TFO4IrqcvI-ADiT57O_pEpLWUKa2ViR7vkKAU0aEN9yY20F4yyLLmkHJvK59-BcrWzJ_YtnPWLf7RsVLOQ5WEMLdRjp7OVXp-VkEXehMJlFrfPZghVawY6P2YZunqTVwod4bCYZz0R_5UJ8Ct140rEZ_PWsnB3xw5zXtZZT768puiVvOmLYpN6YWQBxmQRmV4awnIA6oYXZyt2JkJmQRRkPUcIta53RohqwARYsuT1mDx_0vTpdzYoMhI92bPpN2PrfUAlVsAd7BqN4-ZlboSPGCYdsF6CMfI%3D)
I’m under no illusions that you will invest in this fight the first time you hear from me, but **I’m willing to work for your support**. I hope once you see that winning my race is a critical component in securing a Republican Senate Majority, you will feel inclined to help.

_Take a look at the math, Fellow Conservative:_

Republicans are only TWO seats away from a Senate majority, and there are THREE Democrat incumbents up for re-election in ruby-red states. If we win in Montana, Ohio, and right here in West Virginia, we will win back the Republican majority in 2024.
_
**This West Virginia race is a TOP PRIORITY INVESTMENT for all conservatives, no matter where you live**_.

[** JOIN TEAM JUSTICE **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d98fe06007524f5d8a84755aac43949b&_e=9b_QcvoXRU3aS6usHXTC3j1O-vvTA7ISGHVoFyKlieYnsjKSyEQx4uRbmvmCHo_x8DLPeMnW0EaFmD9Df_Q9VQgN5Zq5A_45KI1ACBGmeX_uwBbivuXgoSAEkQzhkfADah9YAzN2Z6TFO4IrqcvI-ADiT57O_pEpLWUKa2ViR7vkKAU0aEN9yY20F4yyLLmkHJvK59-BcrWzJ_YtnPWLf7RsVLOQ5WEMLdRjp7OVXp-VkEXehMJlFrfPZghVawY6P2YZunqTVwod4bCYZz0R_-cF_sIwf25gN1pPA9vBV3wQ-8orvWnmdiHbPN8gnI2mZWJ_0zihMx-DV72CMYydSAHVzzcL6SK71xB4iR0h3LIPjNAuBGHcmCchHVCZqCtIRDhxDHnwEuSyGZEEABuFzqGSaq71Kr6M-_rihQZT1Yw%3D)

**My opponent is one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the Senate, with an abysmal 40% approval rating**. Plus, Republicans have won in six-straight presidential elections here in West Virginia!

Then this should be an easy win for Republicans here in 2024, right? **Not in the slightest,_Fellow Conservative_. **

Democrats like Joe Manchin have continually outraised Republican candidates in the past years, allowing him to win elections and hold on to this Senate seat. In 2018, Manchin won his race by three points, despite Republicans adding two seats to their majority at the time.

**Joe Manchin is sitting atop a $9.7 MILLION war chest, which he will use to buy this Senate seat, and with it, the Democrats’ Majority in 2024.**

**We won’t stand a chance of winning back our Senate majority if we can’t fight back against all this Democrat cash.**

I’m urgently calling for grassroots Republicans to **[join my team and pitch into our West Virginia Battle Fund today](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d98fe06007524f5d8a84755aac43949b&_e=9b_QcvoXRU3aS6usHXTC3j1O-vvTA7ISGHVoFyKlieYnsjKSyEQx4uRbmvmCHo_x8DLPeMnW0EaFmD9Df_Q9VQgN5Zq5A_45KI1ACBGmeX_uwBbivuXgoSAEkQzhkfADah9YAzN2Z6TFO4IrqcvI-ADiT57O_pEpLWUKa2ViR7vkKAU0aEN9yY20F4yyLLmkHJvK59-BcrWzJ_YtnPWLf7RsVLOQ5WEMLdRjp7OVXp-VkEXehMJlFrfPZghVawY6P2YZunqTVwod4bCYZz0R_wSas0bZdx5k7v-vgWsJaSyQc9JjkLwmRefM2n8BQyAc8ZgB_k-Di-3TxHhrlS3k5FVK10ZQW9YGT0JKdHJQqOavfoL_wC4_pZTUzEcpTSzLk2nDOOjbT48jmA5-5QCcroKxHm1QO0bb8YyhGD9Jazc%3D)**.

[_Official West Virginia Battleground Fund_ _
Join Team Justice-> _](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d98fe06007524f5d8a84755aac43949b&_e=9b_QcvoXRU3aS6usHXTC3j1O-vvTA7ISGHVoFyKlieYnsjKSyEQx4uRbmvmCHo_x8DLPeMnW0EaFmD9Df_Q9VQgN5Zq5A_45KI1ACBGmeX_uwBbivuXgoSAEkQzhkfADah9YAzN2Z6TFO4IrqcvI-ADiT57O_pEpLWUKa2ViR7vkKAU0aEN9yY20F4yyLLmkHJvK59-BcrWzJ_YtnPWLf7RsVLOQ5WEMLdRjp7OVXp-VkEXehMJlFrfPZghVawY6P2YZunqTVwod4bCYZz0R__PHhlfWVge3znFhiAz2qYYDsm4vGk0t9ntPbg9csWTc8d4x_AFpi7iEE3VfWPfFCiI7Gfqa2yb70GgC95zwnebGIj-3yBRS7F_0ayzKXzQII9PoMBLguqfY00r1qMhZ5YrLpJxT_cd7PuZWuoxW8I8%3D)
Regardless of the amount, your contribution will directly fund our grassroots efforts, allowing us to reach more voters, amplify our message, and counter Manchin and his Democrat fundraising machine.

The implications of falling short here in West Virginia are grave—we risk locking Republicans out of the Senate majority for the rest of this decade and leaving America’s future in the hands of radical Democrats.

Remember, the stakes are high, and **[every contribution counts](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d98fe06007524f5d8a84755aac43949b&_e=9b_QcvoXRU3aS6usHXTC3j1O-vvTA7ISGHVoFyKlieYnsjKSyEQx4uRbmvmCHo_x8DLPeMnW0EaFmD9Df_Q9VQgN5Zq5A_45KI1ACBGmeX_uwBbivuXgoSAEkQzhkfADah9YAzN2Z6TFO4IrqcvI-ADiT57O_pEpLWUKa2ViR7vkKAU0aEN9yY20F4yyLLmkHJvK59-BcrWzJ_YtnPWLf7RsVLOQ5WEMLdRjp7OVXp-VkEXehMJlFrfPZghVawY6P2YZunqTVwod4bCYZz0R_5ZY0-zB7HpkRKvAw32ydCE9l1b_-4SBbKZuN-9PgBsdkWlWAknpx-Hksul-iLY-MiDMMyZmHy6XLk4OkSFpLbCOfUU6I9PtnLY2H4Ru_Rg4bVUjFSOjfLu9HRupyHUfCMO2J_P6PT3GgFtr_xZUV4I%3D)**.

Sincerely,
Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Take Action Against Ranked Choice Voting NOW!
body:
This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4bec9eebbc14e27b05aeb6a2f5972d3&_e=5xZxJoPgRUCOo5VW4ocllNit2IlRK6qETMzWzg3OsufqrkXHDSMn7-RNVPpsotKx086JKbLsi73LO--LyUsN7hi9Ck3A6H_6i8zoSCh7N55duDuGDuomeg94-EnbuoF8WjSndfSluyLqvHw2TTC73rArKKnh2OZ9FmER77M_hEqnAvHeZOFchHuMEkRRomOI_Do-UGkYjVCZBAGqshBIgEydFP4712wLyrGfDMGfBQ_1htPejLZvL5ABzAI8TvyHXX4nfefg561GlHCvafUyWQgaJY6Olk_8Qf-Aar0o62yunPMS2oav2tOtMQicAr2CUfUrltYXLR8BuycbVD4Awq9amobTvL7xOrYHq06eOos_IjYbOZfHI_Q6F-6cgn6d)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

As the President of The Heritage Foundation, I must urgently ask for your help in fighting against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). This chaotic and confusing election "reform" is being pushed by mega-liberal donors and activists, threatening to disenfranchise voters and potentially elect marginal candidates without the support of a majority.

It's time to take a stand! We need your voice and input to tackle this dangerous reform that could wreak havoc on our electoral process.

**Please, take just a few minutes to complete our RCV survey by clicking the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4bec9eebbc14e27b05aeb6a2f5972d3&_e=5xZxJoPgRUCOo5VW4ocllNit2IlRK6qETMzWzg3OsufqrkXHDSMn7-RNVPpsotKx086JKbLsi73LO--LyUsN7hi9Ck3A6H_6i8zoSCh7N55duDuGDuomeg94-EnbuoF8WjSndfSluyLqvHw2TTC73rArKKnh2OZ9FmER77M_hEqnAvHeZOFchHuMEkRRomOI_Do-UGkYjVCZBAGqshBIgEydFP4712wLyrGfDMGfBQ8MT7HdE1Qh4GyzhfShv_gHRF1KHHhjDCYLDeOz23V2MWjrznaLrN3Tir5eIebFHVWUdH9scTc5lKrYD7dCFr06RcDG0aqM99a4PCWETYCliz1S75un1X9B0m1k5--cRA-elC4zbRWo8lvzWjPbbsna)**

By participating, you'll be joining the battle to protect our democracy and ensure the integrity of our elections. After completing the survey, you'll receive a copy of our exclusive RCV fact sheet that lays out the shocking truth behind this controversial system.

Together, we can make a difference and preserve the democratic process that defines our great nation.

**[Let's take action against Ranked Choice Voting today!](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4bec9eebbc14e27b05aeb6a2f5972d3&_e=5xZxJoPgRUCOo5VW4ocllNit2IlRK6qETMzWzg3OsufqrkXHDSMn7-RNVPpsotKx086JKbLsi73LO--LyUsN7hi9Ck3A6H_6i8zoSCh7N55duDuGDuomeg94-EnbuoF8WjSndfSluyLqvHw2TTC73rArKKnh2OZ9FmER77M_hEqnAvHeZOFchHuMEkRRomOI_Do-UGkYjVCZBAGqshBIgEydFP4712wLyrGfDMGfBQ_gW2M29wdj5ykItQK-uuwvsn-ztkpm258UQVtRdviYeA6tiUVv6VOz95aJgpE1_ydP2_R9FluCoCOFESm1r_IfoL6Z8zFgkWtSmL6mcsac3TIQCJWt6ZLVU7midFYh0yxnt612lOvMWAf3oUL2ECwx)**

Thank you for your passion for preserving our democracy.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

It’s Pride Month! Now more than ever, we must fight together to ensure equal opportunities for all Americans.

To kick off the month, I want to highlight our exclusive Sharice for Congress Pride merch! **[Click here to check out our online store and claim your merch before it runs out!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64386994/409893357/-582268478?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230605_FR_pridemerch.1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_pridemerch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmRjNjQxMi1mNTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3xe9-9miPU_LN0l-Eder9JzCF9d0qGhO8fA9tkAg94=&emci=a69a660a-f503-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=cfdc6412-f503-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

This past year, we made some big strides for the LGBTQ+ community. I am proud to have led the way for the passage of the Respect for Marriage Act—my measure to protect marriage equality—in federal law. Even with this great achievement, I know we still have a lot of work to do.

As a Co-Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus, I will always stand up for the LGBTQ+ community and am ready to keep up the fight this Pride month and beyond.

**[Shop your Pride now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64386996/409893359/-582268478?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230605_FR_pridemerch.1.1_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_pridemerch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmRjNjQxMi1mNTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q3xe9-9miPU_LN0l-Eder9JzCF9d0qGhO8fA9tkAg94=&emci=a69a660a-f503-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=cfdc6412-f503-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

Sharice

clean_body: | Hi there, It’s Pride Month! Now more than ever, we must fight together to ensure equal opportunities for all Americans. To kick off the month, I want to highlight our exclusive Sharice for Congress Pride merch! This past year, we made some big strides for the LGBTQ+ community. I am proud to have led the way for the passage of the Respect for Marriage Act—my measure to protect marriage equality—in federal law. Even with this great achievement, I know we still have a lot of work to do. As a Co-Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus, I will always stand up for the LGBTQ+ community and am ready to keep up the fight this Pride month and beyond. Thank you, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS Sharice for Congress 13851 W. 63rd St. #303 Shawnee, KS 66216 United States

name: Adam Frisch
subject: a few reasons I’m running against Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
When I decided to throw my hat in the ring against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I knew what I was signing up for. I’ll admit, I never expected it to get that nasty... But I believed from the start that we could win, despite all the naysayers.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64386542/409891660/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFlNjM1YS1mNDAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js-gUcg4NMRmACEAl4TEeZNAYnM0dLtHlT3ywwp8XVw=&emci=8a4af50b-ed03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d5ae635a-f403-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64386543/409891661/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFlNjM1YS1mNDAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js-gUcg4NMRmACEAl4TEeZNAYnM0dLtHlT3ywwp8XVw=&emci=8a4af50b-ed03-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d5ae635a-f403-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
When I decided to throw my hat in the ring against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I knew what I was signing up for. I’ll admit, I never expected it to get _that_ nasty... But I believed from the start that we could win, despite all the naysayers.
In the end, though, we fell 546 votes short of defeating Boebert – just over one vote per precinct.
Now, I’m running again, and here are just a few of the reasons why:
1. The people of Western and Southern Colorado are tired of the circus in Washington, and Lauren Boebert is one of the ringmasters.

Boebert and her ‘extreme caucus’ peddle in fueling an _angertainment_ industry – one more focused on generating headlines than actually solving people’s problems. And voters are sick of it.

2. Democrats, Republicans, and Independents are all ready for a change. Every day, I meet Republican voters out on the trail who tell me they’re going to cast their ballot for me instead of Boebert.

Because Boebert wants to ban all abortions nationwide – even in cases of rape, incest, or the life of the mother. Because she is everything that's wrong with Washington. And because she cares more about Lauren Boebert than creating jobs or fixing the water crisis in our state.

It’s clear that Lauren Boebert is in big trouble in 2024.

3. I believe, simply, that there is too much at stake for me to sit this one out. The last campaign was hard on our family – especially our two kids. No one wants to turn on the TV or go on social media and see vicious lies being told about you.

But when I think about what happened on January 6th... when I travel the district and see how Boebert has left people without anyone advocating for them in Congress... I had to run again. Especially when we came so close to winning last time.

**If you’re in this with me, and if you believe that we can defeat Lauren Boebert – that we _must_ defeat Lauren Boebert – then I’m humbly asking:** [**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – any amount you can afford – to help me send Lauren Boebert packing? I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so every dollar goes a long way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64386544/409891662/1610638071?refcode=em20230605pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=d5ae635a-f403-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFlNjM1YS1mNDAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=js-gUcg4NMRmACEAl4TEeZNAYnM0dLtHlT3ywwp8XVw=)

name: Zak Malamed
subject: I’m running for Congress against George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
This is the most consequential congressional race this election cycle
| | |
---
Hi friend, I am Zak Malamed – the Democrat running against George Santos.
This email is going to be a little different than the others you receive because this race is _actually_ going to decide whether or not Democrats win back the House.

**To differentiate myself from the incumbent, I will also tell you the truth upfront:** I want your support ([you can split a donation with my partners at American Bridge here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64387030/409893507/-1572480541?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2685-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmN2Q1Nzc2LWY1MDMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5BhfeH4-EC3pjzyLKXbceoS1knWKwAR_zon2gAlSUFM=)). Before you decide to contribute, though, you deserve to hear a little about me:
| | I am a third-generation resident of the district and attended Great Neck Public Schools from K-12. From an early age, my family instilled three principles in me: service, struggle, and sacrifice.

My grandmother immigrated to New York to pursue the American dream. Both sets of grandparents struggled and sacrificed to provide opportunities for their kids. My father worked in the garment industry before it collapsed and he had to start over. My mother was an educator who turned into a caretaker when some of her closest friends fell ill to cancer, all while dealing with her own chronic health issues. These are the people who have taught me everything — how to work hard, to care for others, and to give back to the community that gave to you.

I have spent the last four years defeating MAGA extremists across the country in some of the most competitive districts and states with my organization, The Next 50. Now, I am stepping up to run myself and defeat George Santos so we can restore integrity and pride in our district.
---
Winning this race is not just about unseating George Santos and restoring dignity to the office. As I mentioned earlier, the path to the House majority runs directly through this district. We know Kevin McCarthy and national Republicans will not give up without a fight.
We fully expect them to spend millions of dollars more than this district has ever received to hold on to this seat. And that is why I need you, friend.
**[Will you play a critical role in our campaign by chipping in to help me unseat George Santos? Make a donation to me and American Bridge right now so we can hit the ground running.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64387031/409893512/-1572480541?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2685-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmN2Q1Nzc2LWY1MDMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5BhfeH4-EC3pjzyLKXbceoS1knWKwAR_zon2gAlSUFM=)**
| | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64387032/409893520/-1572480541?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2685-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmN2Q1Nzc2LWY1MDMtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5BhfeH4-EC3pjzyLKXbceoS1knWKwAR_zon2gAlSUFM=)

It is that frustration and fear that carried George Santos — and MAGA Republicans like him — to victory across Queens and Long Island, as well as the rest of the country. But their extreme MAGA agenda is not the answer.

This email is going to be a little different than the others you receive because this race is actually going to decide whether or not Democrats win back the House. My mother was an educator who turned into a caretaker when some of her closest friends fell ill to cancer, all while dealing with her own chronic health issues. These are the people who have taught me everything — how to work hard, to care for others, and to give back to the community that gave to you. clean_body: Did you hear the news? | | | The news is out, friends: ** Labeled as “unapologetically progressive”, Tom’s challenger represents the most extreme aspects of her party. She even backs defunding the police. Simply put, she wants to take us backwards. If you missed our first email on this big announcement, I’ve attached it below so you can get back up to speed. Thanks, Jason, Team Kean \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: Kean HQ AlertsDate: Wed, May 31Subject: Tom Kean’s Challenger | | Today’s the day, friends. The first Democrat to challenge Tom Kean, Jr. next year has finally stepped up: Progressive Activist Sue Altman. Sue’s vision for NJ-07 is one seen through the rearview mirror. If enacted, the policies that she champions would take all of us backwards. She represents the most divisive and extreme aspects of the fringe of her party. While she backs dangerous movements like defunding the police, Congressman Kean is fighting to make New Jersey more affordable, secure the border and work across the aisle to find bipartisan, common-sense solutions to our national challenges. Under Altman, these important victories would vanish into thin air. This can’t go unanswered, friends. Team Kean is mounting a rapid response and we need your help. The only answer to an announcement like this is to rally the strength of our grassroots supporters and deliver an unmistakable message to the fringe left that we stand with Rep. Kean, and aren’t going to let our district, and our progress, be taken backwards. Let’s make that happen: You may have rolled your eyes in the past when we said that the race for 2024 was closer than it seemed, but now it’s here and it’s time to stand up and fight for our district. Let’s get to work, Kean HQ | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is:** Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation.
