name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Rebuilding our broken immigration systems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Today, and every day moving forward, we must reaffirm our commitment to fighting for immigrants’ rights, rebuilding our broken immigration systems, and amplifying our call for compassion and unity.
#
Hi Peter — it’s Pramila.
This June marks National Immigrant Heritage Month, and I wanted to take a moment to urge all of us to acknowledge, celebrate, and support the contributions immigrants have made in our country.
I came to the United States when I was just 16 years old, with nothing in my pockets. After 17 years on an alphabet soup of visas to become a U.S. citizen, I was lucky enough to have the opportunity to live the American Dream. But this dream is out of reach for too many immigrants today.
As the first South Asian woman elected to the House of Representatives and one of only two dozen naturalized citizens in Congress, **I know how important it is to have true representation in our government.**
And as the first immigrant in recorded history to serve as Ranking Member of the House Judiciary Subcommittee on Immigration, I am honored to be in a position to move the needle and recenter our broken immigration system around dignity, humanity, and justice.
While Republican leadership shows no intention of engaging in good-faith negotiations to reform our immigration laws, **I will not rest until we see a government that welcomes and supports us all.** Long before I ran for Congress, I was organizing on the grassroots level in the immigrants’ rights movement. I’ll never give up on this fight.
**And there’s so much more work to be done outside of Congress.** As a progressive movement rooted in love, compassion, and unity, we all have a moral obligation to ensure our communities can welcome and celebrate everyone who is looking to build a better life for themselves and their families.
**Today, and every day moving forward, we must reaffirm our commitment to fighting for immigrants’ rights, rebuilding our broken immigration systems, and amplifying our call for compassion and unity.**
[**If you’re ready to see what this looks like in our communities and in our government, please chip in today to help strengthen our collective momentum and continue breaking down the pillars of injustice in our democracy.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42329?source=em20230605-2566&t=1&akid=2566%2E420207%2EJmT8Tf)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42329?refcode=em20230605-2566&t=20&akid=2566%2E420207%2EJmT8Tf)**
Thank you for your support and faith in this movement, Peter.
Together,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230605-2566-footer&t=21&refcode2=2566_420207_JmT8Tf&akid=2566%2E420207%2EJmT8Tf)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=22&akid=2566%2E420207%2EJmT8Tf)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=2566%2E420207%2EJmT8Tf)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

subject: Dodgers re-invite fake “sisters”, so we're fighting back.
body:

I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group. | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f5752f6c6f5842ef84987fe752bdab40&_e=P3zaLtFOu7wOZjz2CR9oLh9oWo1Toys0vq6_RzeNiOkd3lY0DPfaJNL6FRw0fKhm1r-_T6t9Mlpc7PglGWB1FyDLrE0dOKkNFUw5CiiaoHGnEY0g-s6FdEYfqY70jZVi9fHO7R8bY2vd-XZ6SmDQ_5KvScOyshAgqQ3wclo0fhSeBOWidBOJG_R-Y_G7y_4HwX3HHaJEn5paMzoIJnuqOp9p6-cAiXFLQtdeO9KE0VO-86x15n37DeY5QkakRrxCLXeknjeArc_AyX9S8kYW9dc9MtY2kTbrFuwNhXvnzn5unZDmfM3nGp8rA6DUBwef)
---
| | **I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group.** The group calls itself the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” And their motto is “go forth and sin some more.” **The “sisters” are a bunch of men who dress up in sexually explicit and rainbow-colored “nun” clothing with one purpose: ** _To mock Christians. _ Then they perform stunts designed to be as shocking and offensive as possible.
* A “condom savior mass”
* An annual “Jesus in drag” competition
* Pole dancing on a cross
* And much more.

_They even tricked an archbishop into giving them communion, then defiled the Eucharist._ **And the Dodgers are choosing to honor this anti-Christian hate group with their “Community Hero Award” during so-called “Pride month.”**
---
[FIGHT BACK](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f5752f6c6f5842ef84987fe752bdab40&_e=P3zaLtFOu7wOZjz2CR9oLh9oWo1Toys0vq6_RzeNiOkd3lY0DPfaJNL6FRw0fKhm1r-_T6t9Mlpc7PglGWB1FyDLrE0dOKkNFUw5CiiaoHGnEY0g-s6FdEYfqY70jZVi9fHO7R8bY2vd-XZ6SmDQ_xF2a8d1qwC52WD-GBy5_fxXawmod3W12G_hiKR4Do4ZyTdAQcCGvR7AF9a7meRolbT2yh4Em8HzKU0wkZvi1q5CUWwGu5WOgEAyfXK0HdjpWCu6qMKU_EujQkI_CXBidiu0Dpvp3tp3nLZ8W31FRnk-SbP7Vz3Ocn2qU5YCyYu4)
---
It’s vile. It’s disgusting. It’s a blatant attack by a major American corporation on our Lord. _And faithful Christians like you and I must not tolerate this kind of hatred._ ** ****That’s why CatholicVote is raising $1 million to run ads on every Dodgers-linked radio station and TV channel to send a clear message:**** ****Any business that promotes anti-Catholic bigotry WILL suffer the consequences.**
---
[FLOOD THE AIRWAYS!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f5752f6c6f5842ef84987fe752bdab40&_e=P3zaLtFOu7wOZjz2CR9oLh9oWo1Toys0vq6_RzeNiOkd3lY0DPfaJNL6FRw0fKhm1r-_T6t9Mlpc7PglGWB1FyDLrE0dOKkNFUw5CiiaoHGnEY0g-s6FdEYfqY70jZVi9fHO7R8bY2vd-XZ6SmDQ_xtPStkHU-T_ihtRXYl02Tt5P2A_UXBsuZ4QUBkYVwVwjyGchMAktrZUbXrl3BrMNv5Lm_Zgie1pzwrE-3UUfYSSI0LvHGkBzyKZVzpfkO4vL3i8tlCZZoQEcF5lHQDU3kaDi-cuE_fKGutfwhgruzs7xhY0IpfCuZmIYsWvCq6m)
---
If you’ve been following the news closely, you may have read about CatholicVote’s campaign to ask the Dodgers to remove this anti-Catholic group of fake “sisters” from their celebration. Thanks to our public pressure campaign, thousands of CatholicVote supporters FLOODED Dodger stadium with phone calls. _Within minutes, we filled up their voicemail inboxes._ The Dodgers almost immediately disinvited the “sisters.” A HUGE thank-you to everyone who made those calls! I’m incredibly proud of our CatholicVote family for taking action right away. **But unfortunately****Patriot,****the story doesn’t end there.** As soon as the Dodgers disinvited the “sisters,” the leftwing LGBT movement went crazy. Other gay and transgender groups began to pressure and threaten the Dodgers for daring to cross the LGBT agenda. **Then, the Dodgers**** _re-invited_****the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence back and decided to honor them with the baseball team’s “Community Hero Award.”** They also offered their “sincerest apologies to the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence, members of the LGBTQ+ community and their friends and families.” And they made the decision without even consulting any faithful Christians – people like you and me. _The Christians who the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence” target with their hatred in the first place._ It’s shocking, but not surprising. Patriot, this is the state of American culture today. If anyone dares to call a “transgender” person by their biological name or pronoun, they risk being fired by woke corporations. **_But those same woke businesses heap honor on bigots who insult Christians, hate our biblical values, and mock our Lord and Savior._**
---
[DEFEND CHRIST!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f5752f6c6f5842ef84987fe752bdab40&_e=P3zaLtFOu7wOZjz2CR9oLh9oWo1Toys0vq6_RzeNiOkd3lY0DPfaJNL6FRw0fKhm1r-_T6t9Mlpc7PglGWB1FyDLrE0dOKkNFUw5CiiaoHGnEY0g-s6FdEYfqY70jZVi9fHO7R8bY2vd-XZ6SmDQ_7W0TeMU4MNz6qEcz7ucLLwL8akOoOI_czJKyvIH5Hx4EcXnnfi0NSayARj03g2EL9iL60bX0WiTvS3Mrnpi1SdCDjg4Pt0RUgdL20jzSiDVieQmUPqvwwOvE2m2gziNdEfKMxVdcfovnJSa1ux9f37HaYC4pPvUFL8fhT1caK7R)
---
As Senator Marco Rubio said last night after the news broke, “Today our great country is controlled by socio-political ruling elites who don’t just tolerate anti-Christian bigotry, they encourage & celebrate it.” He’s spot on, Patriot. One thing is absolutely clear today: **_Hate has a home at Dodger stadium._** **And it’s our job to stand up for the majesty of our Lord and our Church.** For God and for country, Brian BurchPresident, CatholicVote

\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ P.S. Like I mentioned earlier, we’ve set a goal to raise $1 million to run ads exposing the anti-Christian bigotry of the LA Dodgers and the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” [**Please click here to donate anything you can spare today.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f5752f6c6f5842ef84987fe752bdab40&_e=P3zaLtFOu7wOZjz2CR9oLh9oWo1Toys0vq6_RzeNiOkd3lY0DPfaJNL6FRw0fKhm1r-_T6t9Mlpc7PglGWB1FyDLrE0dOKkNFUw5CiiaoHGnEY0g-s6FdEYfqY70jZVi9fHO7R8bY2vd-XZ6SmDQ_zWp03qm7p3cC8-7A1kBmdQVaPkzlllhaQDSQWFBJ_Yir5srI74qdkJ1Q1rMZ10a4pILjnc7qJEPXMAbvwLWmzwceElua4Np9DAv_HOWSwXt2USn9_0uMZ2yRYrV7KT587lYtDdTqMDuwgBwFi_nTXfLJrG2EPrKLe6Cbf5rQmwJ) We didn’t have this in our budget, and we need to raise the money in the next few days. So no matter what you can afford to chip in – please don’t hesitate. The most important thing is time. Thank you in advance, and please keep our work in your prayers.
---
| |
---

Then they perform stunts designed to be as shocking and offensive as possible. A “condom savior mass” An annual “Jesus in drag” competition Pole dancing on a cross And much more. They even tricked an archbishop into giving them communion, then defiled the Eucharist. And the Dodgers are choosing to honor this anti-Christian hate group with their “Community Hero Award” during so-called “Pride month.” It’s vile. It’s disgusting. It’s a blatant attack by a major American corporation on our Lord. And faithful Christians like you and I must not tolerate this kind of hatred. That’s why CatholicVote is raising $1 million to run ads on every Dodgers-linked radio station and TV channel to send a clear message: Any business that promotes anti-Catholic bigotry WILL suffer the consequences. If you’ve been following the news closely, you may have read about CatholicVote’s campaign to ask the Dodgers to remove this anti-Catholic group of fake “sisters” from their celebration. Thanks to our public pressure campaign, thousands of CatholicVote supporters FLOODED Dodger stadium with phone calls. Within minutes, we filled up their voicemail inboxes. The Dodgers almost immediately disinvited the “sisters.” A HUGE thank-you to everyone who made those calls! I’m incredibly proud of our CatholicVote family for taking action right away. But unfortunatelyPatriot,the story doesn’t end there. As soon as the Dodgers disinvited the “sisters,” the leftwing LGBT movement went crazy. Other gay and transgender groups began to pressure and threaten the Dodgers for daring to cross the LGBT agenda. Then, the Dodgers re-invitedthe Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence back and decided to honor them with the baseball team’s “Community Hero Award.” They also offered their “sincerest apologies to the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence, members of the LGBTQ+ community and their friends and families.” And they made the decision without even consulting any faithful Christians – people like you and me. The Christians who the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence” target with their hatred in the first place. It’s shocking, but not surprising. Patriot, this is the state of American culture today. If anyone dares to call a “transgender” person by their biological name or pronoun, they risk being fired by woke corporations. But those same woke businesses heap honor on bigots who insult Christians, hate our biblical values, and mock our Lord and Savior. As Senator Marco Rubio said last night after the news broke, “Today our great country is controlled by socio-political ruling elites who don’t just tolerate anti-Christian bigotry, they encourage & celebrate it.” He’s spot on, Patriot. One thing is absolutely clear today: Hate has a home at Dodger stadium. And it’s our job to stand up for the majesty of our Lord and our Church. For God and for country, Brian BurchPresident, CatholicVote \------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ P.S. Like I mentioned earlier, we’ve set a goal to raise $1 million to run ads exposing the anti-Christian bigotry of the LA Dodgers and the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” We didn’t have this in our budget, and we need to raise the money in the next few days. So no matter what you can afford to chip in – please don’t hesitate. The most important thing is time. Thank you in advance, and please keep our work in your prayers. | |

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: A note for my LGBTQ+ friends, neighbors, and constituents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
You deserve love, dignity, and acceptance. And you deserve to be celebrated for exactly who you are.

Hi team, I just wanted to take a moment to wish you a happy Pride Month! No matter who you are or who you love, no matter how you identify, no matter if you’re out to the world or you haven’t told a single soul — you deserve love, dignity, and acceptance. And you deserve to be celebrated for exactly who you are. I know that these are difficult times for many of my LGBTQ+ friends, neighbors, and constituents. It’s deeply unjust that anyone should have to see their basic humanity used as a partisan talking point or their very existence treated as a matter of political debate. In particular, the attacks that transgender Americans are facing — and even more especially trans and gender nonconforming children are facing — are heartbreaking. Nobody should need to conduct a poll before standing up against that kind of oppression. So to the LGBTQ+ community, let me just say that you deserve better. You deserve the freedom and security to live openly and proudly as exactly who you are. And please know that I’m one of millions of Americans who are standing with you in this fight. I wish you a loving and happy Pride Month. Yours truly, Brittany | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64387360/409894899/-1140694937?refcode=email_060523_pride&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjM1NGMyZi1mYTAzLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YYWlrCKRs8RIdYn6aRkDktxcg_ZUbFYKprgAoxCd0aA=)
---

But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/y6N32-PBR02A61hdKqQ9kg2?unsubscribedata=iAdVXgYZa5Wn5Sx%2B9ad6J%2Fw6aAP62LylrRof7Sy63JAi0eGyn9H3a2aDbWq4WrgMmdpg43mRzLezcP0fjut7UGDUUTyW5fUtbsXmTBhadV5Qlv%2BzAOQQeCbxV%2BC8FVt%2B0z%2F1Bx9Dy0ooSHcNpNhCRF64WC3DTvFh4caGWPvxyzJiHnkLp9R86Em6VOAWNxCIoDfshGyhWqgERZyKWwV%2BIyLFsa%2B3u5UkjIeP3KItj5hyhOk7LVnpWsCLweFzKr3m0eC0hlo1kDxAApZiYtUpJwX%2BunfKzs%2BLQzHCtRm56P06jL4xQyfYR1DJzQDySVPC6COjtMUtKcdJhuVDKmRQ9YmtSwVbB9lIRevqA2S2j9yLetSRkMcDmUNceGp%2FohrN%2BSVUKgWOVCLe3f2DnMaaj5MQF8tlCq71HI3lWYGXuvszaVcJ2VO1Rf5yUqTlKLz4)**.

name: Peter, it's Sen. Scott
subject: It’s out of control, do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Crime in this country is out of control, and we have Democrats to blame.

Across America, Democrat governors and mayors are signing bills to let criminals roam free without consequences while families worry for their safety.
_It’s almost like the radical Left loves criminals because they think they can get their vote._
Peter, it’s time for America to stop prioritizing criminals and put families first.
**American cities MUST get tough on crime, and it’s up to US to hold liberal politicians accountable.[Stand with me now and DEMAND America starts holding criminals accountable. ](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3aadb21fc3224d3690611b566ddeb74c&_e=cWVnhI3dPIfProz3df2HgXYveO_CLuaRA4ztYEZc_lt5sXMaEvFBLFk0eQe7ViMu0FQym1XU6BEX84cUqczdjd3MzmRvPrvudTkLUTPPbygoDVaWV28u_tEJDwzbf76kLhhR4SXZ06kjb4JNWwX2pvLeiGPHAJqMsXW05YgJBsE0GRaskjd0BYKsBoHb-LRMU98YL_dcMknCFXAH5iV8PzYMeY_YNFIgtoATAN5XM5JdTNi0yimWlEmDbtf5l2wLQYA2afghWn-efW8sazMDnnhARV37Xb4pS1jlM_M-d7LExg_nv9thoWrA3urylrj-z-UxmxubDHP1avwb0lBArFmYexdBVbedk2wI46UKftc%3D)**

---
[**HELP ELECT TOUGH-ON-CRIME REPUBLICANS**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3aadb21fc3224d3690611b566ddeb74c&_e=cWVnhI3dPIfProz3df2HgXYveO_CLuaRA4ztYEZc_lt5sXMaEvFBLFk0eQe7ViMu0FQym1XU6BEX84cUqczdjd3MzmRvPrvudTkLUTPPbygoDVaWV28u_tEJDwzbf76kLhhR4SXZ06kjb4JNWwX2pvLeiGPHAJqMsXW05YgJBsE0GRaskjd0BYKsBoHb-LRMU98YL_dcMknCFXAH5iV8P3SGaUW1KztKX5pwpgT956Q5e0jrjZv6I725C_bHwGXTrA2jc1bpl8uWYVbPiiv996adLsmmVFC9FnsM5RXOEgiWt3D_mgNn99wIioOOPiuXjgNY9__K2330eIpkSRxd7oVjnpoM2aUETogZhwL9bxI%3D)
---
The ONLY WAY to keep Americans safe from hardened criminals is to uphold the rule of law and put criminals behind bars.

It’s time to get serious about crime, and that means prioritizing families over socialist, pro-criminal politics.
[**Stand with me today and get criminals OFF of our streets!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3aadb21fc3224d3690611b566ddeb74c&_e=cWVnhI3dPIfProz3df2HgXYveO_CLuaRA4ztYEZc_lt5sXMaEvFBLFk0eQe7ViMu0FQym1XU6BEX84cUqczdjd3MzmRvPrvudTkLUTPPbygoDVaWV28u_tEJDwzbf76kLhhR4SXZ06kjb4JNWwX2pvLeiGPHAJqMsXW05YgJBsE0GRaskjd0BYKsBoHb-LRMU98YL_dcMknCFXAH5iV8Pxam-daUDchPMS7_TalMqJmri2O5QQPm1w7fWgTFzcQktWN_Csm46tjYfo1axL9zxEJqjs4UyV0TNCpT6NBWeqcDo0_MoX6T3PeF37zEOQxcj7ZK2dI71vEAsr4TgNimSGFmskEdfqin2h09M2N5-E0%3D)

[** HELP LOWER CRIME**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=3aadb21fc3224d3690611b566ddeb74c&_e=cWVnhI3dPIfProz3df2HgXYveO_CLuaRA4ztYEZc_lt5sXMaEvFBLFk0eQe7ViMu0FQym1XU6BEX84cUqczdjd3MzmRvPrvudTkLUTPPbygoDVaWV28u_tEJDwzbf76kLhhR4SXZ06kjb4JNWwX2pvLeiGPHAJqMsXW05YgJBsE0GRaskjd0BYKsBoHb-LRMU98YL_dcMknCFXAH5iV8PxtqHhw7NBZKVzeI4Z47KejcANmL61NGoR7WBg_oN_RQHrbaT-8Omujv9meLE3V4VqYcbm3OjEWug0t69oGAjJ56GFRyAJm8angqJImdbnQjmn9l98KbBLIE32BhIYvFYM_G1z32a0B31jaYZueZEyQ%3D)
